akkadian: gín kù.babbar sig₅ i-ṣé-er puzur₄-a-šur dumu a-ta-a a-lá-hu-um i-šu
english: puzur-aššur son of ataya owes 22 shekels of good silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša ì-lí-dan itu.kam ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um e-na-sú-in a-na itu 14 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal
english: reckoned from the week of ilī-dan, month of ša-kēnātim, in the eponymy of enna-suen, he will pay in 14 weeks.

akkadian: túg u-la i-dí-na-ku-um
english: <gap> he did not give you a textile.

akkadian: i-tù-ra-ma 9 gín kù.babbar
english: he returned and 9 shekels of silver <gap>

akkadian: kišib šu-{d}en.líl dumu šu-ku-bi-im kišib ṣí-lu-lu dumu
english: seal of šu-illil son of šu-kūbum, seal of ṣilūlu son of uku.

akkadian: ú-ku i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-wa-sú iq-bi-ú 10 ma-na kù.babbar a-na
english: when iddin-abum spoke his will, he gave 10 minas ofדsilver to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-in um-ma šu-ut-ma i-ṣí-ba-at kù-pì-a li-il₅-qé
english: he said: he may take it from the interest on my silver.""

akkadian: <gap> ša lá ta-ha-dì-ri a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí qí-bi₄-ma šu-ma a-ha-tí
english: to ištar-lamassī: if you are truly my sister, then encourage her.

akkadian: a-ta li-ba-am
english: do not fear.

akkadian: dì-ni-ší-im lá ta-ha-da-ar a-na ni-ta-ah-šu-šar qí-bi₄-ma
english: to nitahšušar: air the -textiles that i left.

akkadian: túg-pì-ri-kà-ni ša e-zi-bu na-pí-ší-šu-nu ù
english: also, the tablets should be guarded.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-ú lu ša-ṣú-ru pì-ri-kà-nu ša ma-tí ù tí-bu-lá ma-a-<gap> iš-ta-ú-mu-ni a-dí en-um-a-šùr i-lá-kà-ni a ma-ma-an lá tù-šé-ri <gap> gín kù.babbar {d}utu-tap-pá-i
english: the which mati? and tibula <gap> have bought do not release (them) to anyone before ennam-aššur arrives. šamaš-tappā'ī brought you <gap> shekels of silver.

akkadian: um-ma šu-ta-mu-zi e-lá-a en-um-a-šùr ù lá-ma-sí-ma a-na en-um-a-šùr ù a-lá-hi-im
english: from šu-tammuzī, elaya, ennam-aššur and lamassī to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum: in accordance with your missive we have hired a attorney for you; abiya son of bebe is our attorney.

akkadian: i-na ša-ha-tí-ku-nu li-zi-iz-ma i-na
english: the compound interest should not grow too big for you and make you unhappy.

akkadian: kù.babbar pá-ni-ma
english: act so as to save your father's house.

akkadian: ta-da-ga-lá-ma ṭup-pu ha-ru-mu-tum ú ba-ba-a-tum ru-qá-tum i-ba-ší-ú ṭup-pí
english: we gave 16.3333 shekels of silver for their disposal; 36.6666 shekels of silver, their expenses, we borrowed in a merchant-house against interest.

akkadian: ku-un-kà-ma a-na dumu um-me-a-nim ke-nim
english: seal silver there and send it with the first transport so we can pay back the merchant.

akkadian: ša ki-ma ku-nu-tí pí-iq-da-ma u₄-me-e-ku-nu ba-lu-um
english: also, send at least 1 or 2 minas of silver; send it so we can store 40 litres of grain before you come.

akkadian: mì-ma-ma lá tù-ri-qá-ma lá ta-sà-hu-ra iš-tí
english: elaya says: if you are truly my brothers, you must seal the proceeds from the textile in silver and do me a favour.

akkadian: ub-lu-ú mì-ma pí-ri-kà-ni-e a-ni-ú-tim a-na ta-ad-mì-iq-tim ištar-lá-ma-sí ta-ta-dí-in
english: all these pirikannus ištar-lamassī has given as free loans.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šu
english: witnessed by aššur-idī, by elāli; puzur-ilī son of balzuenum was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: um-ma i-tur₄-dingir-ma a-na en-um-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma a-pu-tum a-pu-tum ra-ma-ku-nu za-ki-a-ma mì-ma urudu a-na bu-ru-uš-ha-dim
english: from itūr-ilī to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum: urgent, urgent, clear yourselves and do not send any copper to burušhaddum!

akkadian: lá tù-šé-ba-lá a-ma-tum-ma a-ba-tí-iq ú ú-tù-ur dí-na-ma kù.babbar le-qé-a-ma tí-ib-a-ni-ma
english: sell even the slave-girls for any price, take the silver and set out and come!

akkadian: a-tal-kà-nim a ma-lá i pá-ni-tim a-na be-el kù.babbar ú-sá-li-ú-ma lá im-gu₅-ru-ni-ni ú-ma-am im-ta-ag-ru-ni
english: as i previously pleaded with the financiers and they did not agree - today they have agreed!

akkadian: a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu lu a-wa-tum ba-at-qá-at a-ni-tum lá a-ni-tum tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam-ma uz-ni pè-té-a
english: my dear brothers, send me word and inform me one way or the other whether the affair has been settled.

akkadian: a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da
english: my dear brothers, take care.

akkadian: <gap> a-ki-dí-e ku-nu-ki-a 1 anše ṣa-lá-ma-am ša-lim-be-lí ú a-šur-pí-lá-ah na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí 15 gín kù.babbar
english: <gap> akkadian textiles under my seal, 1 black donkey, this šalim-bēlī and aššur-pilah bring to you (plural).

akkadian: 1 gín pá-zu-ur-tí-šu-nu ša-bu-ú túg ku-nu-ki-a li-im-nu-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí-ma ú túg
english: they have been paid in silver 0.3333 mina 1 shekel for their smuggling.

akkadian: ša é a-lá-hi-im e-zi-bu-ni a-na ú-ku pí-iq-da-ma a-na dur₄-hu-mì-it a-na ṣé-ri-a lu-ub-lam 4 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-a ú-ku na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-ma-kam šu-ma
english: let them count the textiles under my seal for you, and then entrust the textiles that i left in ali-ahum's house to uku and have him bring them to me in durhumit.

akkadian: anše i-ha-ša-ah anše ša-ma-šu-um ú
english: uku brings you 4 minas of tin under my seal.

akkadian: sá-hi-ir-tám ša-ma-šu-um anše ṣa-lá-ma-um ú
english: if he wants a donkey there, buy him a donkey.

akkadian: ú-nu-ut anše a-ší-ni
english: also, buy him small goods.

akkadian: <gap> sú ú ší-na pa-li-li ša ša-lim-be-lí ú a-šur-pí-lá-ah i-ra-dí-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí-ni a-na ú-ku dí-na-ma túg li-is-ri-dam <gap> na-ru-qá-tim
english: give uku a black donkey plus the donkey's harness <gap> plus 2 that šalim-bēlī and aššur-pliah lead to you and have him pack the textiles.

akkadian: ú iš-ri-im dí-in <gap> a-na na-hu-ur ṭur₄-da-ni-šu <gap> na-áp-ri-sí a-ma-kam <gap> lu-ub-lam a-ga-da-tim <gap>-na-áš-a-kum
english: give <gap> sacks <gap> send him to nahur <gap> my chisel <gap> let him bring there <gap> he brings to you.

akkadian: kišib a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-mur-lu-ṣú kišib a-bu-ša-lim dumu a-šùr-e-mu-qí a-na a-wa-tim
english: seal of aššur-imittī son of amur-luṣu, seal of abu-šalim son of aššur-emūqī.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim ša ili₅-ba-ni dumu a-mur-a-šur ù a-hu-qar dumu šu-ištar gír ša a-šùr iṣ-bu-tù-ni-ma a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu a-mur-lu-ṣú ù a-bu-ša-lim dumu a-šùr-e-mu-qí pí-šu-nu iš-me-ú-ni <gap>-ni <gap> a-šur <gap> ṭup-pu <gap> a-bi-ni
english: for these proceedings concerning ilī-bāni son of amur-aššur and ahu-waqar son of šu-ištar - they seized aššur's dagger and aššur-imittī son of amur-luṣu and abu-šalim son of aššur-emūqī heard their statement. <gap>

akkadian: urudu 18 gú 6 ma-na urudu i li-bi i-dí-a-šur a-lá-an
english: the rest of the copper, 18 talents 6 minas of copper, is in iddin-aššur's possession.

akkadian: a-nim mì-ma i li-bi-šu ú-lá
english: apart from this nothing is in his possession.

akkadian: i-ba-ší šu-ma a-na qá-ta-tí-šu-nu en-um-a-šur ù i-ku-pí-a i-ma-ṣí-ú qá-ta-tí-šu-nu li-il₅-qé-ú-ma ší-bi šu-uk-na-šu-nu-tí bé-lu-ni a-tù-nu
english: if ennam-aššur and ikūn-pīya take responsibility for their shares, they may receive their shares, but set witnesses for them.

akkadian: ú tí-ir-ta-ku-nu li-li-kam ù bé-lu kù.babbar ma-du-tum ša lá il₅-qé-ú-ni a-hu-ru
english: our dear lords, also, send us word, for a great many creditors who have received nothing remain.

akkadian: šu-ut-ma kù.babbar a-nim a-ha-a ú-ša-qí-il₅
english: he is to say: this silver i paid in different places.""

akkadian: <gap> ša-lim-ar-dí ú šu-nu-nu áp-qí-id igi a-šùr-i-dí dumu
english: <gap> i entrusted to šalim-wardī and šu-nūnu.

akkadian: mu-mu-lá-nim igi a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku dumu i-ku-nim dumu sá-ma-a mì-ma a-nim a dur₄-hu-mì-it <gap> ša ki-ma i-a-tí ú-šé-bi₄-il₅
english: witnessed by aššur-idī son of mu-mulānum, by aššur-taklāku son of ikūnum son of samaya.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí igi iš-me-dingir igi bi-<gap> dumu ha-na-ni-a igi dingir.sipa dumu ša-ak-ṣí-im
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī, by išme-ilum, by bi<gap> son of hannāniya, by ilī-rē'ī son of šakṣum.

akkadian: i-šu itu.kam a-lá-na-tim
english: contracted in month xii.

akkadian: a-na itu.kam i-ša-qal
english: he will pay within a month.

akkadian: igi a-šur-i-dí
english: witnessed by aššur-idī

akkadian: um-ma bu-bu-ra-num-ma a-na a-bi₄-a ù a-šùr-du₁₀ qí-bi-ma a-na a-šùr-du₁₀ qí-bi-ma iš-tù na-ar-ma-ak-a-šur ba-dí-a a-ma-kam wa-ša-áb-ma
english: from buburānum to abiya and aššur-ṭāb; specifically to aššur-ṭāb: badiya has lived there since the month narmak-aššur, and you just kept silent.

akkadian: ù a-ta ta-áš-ta-pu šu-ma a-hu-a a-tù-nu iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-nim-ma pì-iq-da-ni-šu-ma a-na a-lim{ki} li-li-kam-ma
english: if you are truly my brothers, then hand him over to the very first caravan and let him come to the city, and i shall pay his fees.

akkadian: da-a-sú a-ša-qal šu-ma a-lá-kam lá i-mu-a a-pu-tum
english: if he refuses to come, then it is important that he does not cheat you.

akkadian: lá i-ṣa-li-ku-nu kà-sí-a-šu-ma šé-ri-a-ni-šu
english: bind him and have him brought.

akkadian: en-na-num dumu ku-zi-a ub-lá-ku-um a-hi a-ta na-áš-pè-ra-tim ša a-lim{ki} ša en-na-num ub-lá-ku-ni i-hi-id-ma a ba-tí-qí-im pá-ni-im-ma dí-in-ma
english: my dear brother, pay attention to the missives from the city that ennānum brought to you, and give it (an answer?) to the very first express transport so they may bring it.

akkadian: lu-ub-lu iš-tí wa-ṣí-im pá-ni-im-ma lu-ṣí-am
english: he should leave with the first travellers to depart.

akkadian: um-ma a-šur-ša-du-e a-mu-ur-ša-ra-sà ù ša-lim-wa-ar-dim-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma 31 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-kà
english: from aššur-šadū'e, amur-šarrassa and šalim-wardī to ali-ahum: šalim-wardī brought 31 minas of tin under your seal.

akkadian: a-na qá-tí-šu ni-dí-in a-na šu-mì
english: we gave 1 shekel of silver for his disposal.

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl lá-šu a šu-mì-šu
english: after šalim-wardī came šu-illil was gone.

akkadian: ša-lim-wa-ar-dim 10 u₄-me ú 20 u₄-me
english: because of him we made šalim-wardī wait 10 or 20 days.

akkadian: nu-sá-as-hi-ir-šu i-na a-lá-ak šu-{d}en.líl tí-ir-tám za-ku-tám ni-ša-pá-ra-kum
english: when šu-illil arrives we shall send a final report to you.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-sá-num-ma a-šu-mì a-ší-im sá-ah-ra-a-ku
english: to kuliya, say, thus says asānum: i am still staying (here) because of the meteoric iron.

akkadian: a-ši-a-im i-ma-gu₅-ru a-da-šu-ma a-ta-be-a-am-ma a-ta-lá-kam a-dí-i na-áš-pè-er-tí-kà ša a-šu-mì
english: when they agree with the (quality / price of the) iron i will sell it, get ready and leave to you.

akkadian: kà-lá-pí-im i-li-kà-ni ší-bé-e a-dí-ni lá ah-ri-im i ší-be-a a-zu kà-ṣa-ar
english: as for your letter which arrived here concerning the axe, i have not yet recorded (the dispositions) of the witnesses.

akkadian: puzur₄-a-mur be-li a-ta a-na a-na
english: among my witnesses figures azu, the transporter of puzur-aššur.

akkadian: puzur₄-a-mur pu-nu-ma a-zu-ú li-iṭ-ru-dam iš-tí tap-pá-i-šu ší-bu-tám li-dí-nam i-na lá i-da-i-a a-mì-ša-am i-tal-kam um-ma šu-ut-ma a-na e-lá-lí a-lá-ak
english: please, my lord, approach puzur-aššur and let him send azu to me, so that he can testify for me together with his colleagues. whithout my knowledge he has left for there, saying: i am going to elālī.""

akkadian: a-na en-um-a-šur ù sig₅-pí-a-šur a-na sig₅-pí-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-ta-na-ma 10 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na ší-a-ma-tim
english: to ennam-aššur and damiq-pī-aššur; specifically to damiq-pī-aššur from šāt-anna: i gave you 10 shekels of refined silver for purchases.

akkadian: a-dí-na-kum 3 ša-lá-ší-šu qá-dum ša ha-ra-an a-lim{ki} ha-ra-nam ú-qá
english: three times i waited for the caravan together with those on the road to the city.

akkadian: a-ma-kam kù.babbar ú ší-a-ma-tí-šu a-na en-um-a-šur šu-qúl
english: pay the silver or the goods bought with it there to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: i-na 1.5 gú 4 ma-na urudu sig₅ ù 1 gú 14 ma-na urudu ṣa-lá-mì-im ša a-lá-hu-um e-zi-bu 31 ma-na urudu sig₅ ší-im <gap> a-šur-du-gul il₅-qé <gap> 4 ma-na urudu
english: of 1.5 talents 4 minas of good copper and 1 talent 14 minas of black copper that ali-ahum left, aššur-dugul took 31 minas of good copper as the price of <gap> enna-suen took <gap> 4 minas of copper.

akkadian: en-na-sú-in il₅-qé 8 ma-na urudu sig₅ zi-kur-{d}im il₅-qé 15 ma-na urudu ší-im ku-ta-nu a-na qá-tí-šu né-eš-qúl 1 ma-na urudu ṣa-lá-ma-am hi-<gap> ma-na urudu um-<gap> il₅-qé <gap>
english: zikur-adad took 8 minas of good copper. 15 minas of copper were paid to his account as the price of a kutānu. 1 mina of black copper <gap> minas of copper <gap> um-x took.

akkadian: kišib a-lá-hi-im dumu e-lá-lí kišib en-nam-a-šur dumu en-na-sú-in kišib dan-a-šur dumu šál-mì-hi-im kišib pu-šu-ki-in dumu
english: seal of ali-ahum son of elāli, seal of ennam-aššur son of enna-suen, seal of dan-aššur son of šalim-ahum, seal of pūšu-kēn son of sueyya.

akkadian: na-ru-qám a-na en-nam-a-šur lá i-tí-dí-in 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am pu-šu-ki-in a-na en-nam-a-šur i-ša-qal šu-ma en-nam-a-šur
english: if pūšu-kēn has not given a joint-stock investment to ennam-aššur (in time), pūšu-kēn must give 10 minas of refined silver to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: qá-tám im-ta-ha-aṣ 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na pu-šu-ki-in i-ša-qal
english: if ennam-aššur has refused, he must pay 10 minas of refined silver to pūšu-kēn.

akkadian: ta-ah-sí-is-tum a-ni-tum me-hi-ir ṭup-pì-im ha-ar-mì-im ša ku-nu-uk pu
english: this memorandum is a copy of a certified tablet sealed by pūšu-kēn.

akkadian: šu-ma kà-nu-tum a-na a-na-ah-ì-lí ta-tù-wa-ar a-lá-bu-um ú-ša-ha-sú-ú
english: should kannutum come back on anah-ili, then ali-abum will clear him.

akkadian: <gap> a-šùr <gap> li-pu-ul-kà-ma <gap> ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am šu-qú-ul um-ma i-dí-ku-bu-ma
english: <gap>-aššur <gap> he should answer you and you shall pay <gap> mina of refined silver.

akkadian: ṭup-pá-am gal ṭá-bi₄-a-nim i-na ú-mì-im ša
english: iddin-kūbum said: erase the big tablet for me.

akkadian: ú-bi₄-il₅ igi lá-qé-ep dumu i-zi-za-am-ì-lí igi a-šur-na-da
english: in the presence of lā-qēp, son of izzizam-ilī, of aššur-nādā.

akkadian: en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lá-hi-im iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im-ma al-kam lá-áš-a-al-kà um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma a-na mì-nim ta-ša-a-lá-ni um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na ta-ah-sí-sá-tim ša a-na-ku ù a-ta ni-kà-sí ni-sí-ú i ku-nu-ki-kà
english: ennam-aššur seized us against ali-ahum and said to ali-ahum: come, let me question you!" ali-ahum answered: "why do you want to question me?" ennam-aššur said: "about the memoranda stating that i and you settled accounts.

akkadian: ù ku-nu-ki-a kà-an-kà-ni ik-ra-ni ú-lá kà-i-na-ni um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma ta-ah-sí-sá-tim ša ku-nu-ki-a ú ku-nu-ki-kà kà-an-kà-ni ke-na ku-nu-ku-a lá a-na-ki-ir um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} <gap> ta-mu-ú kà-i-lá <gap>
english: contest or confirm to me that they are sealed by you and me." ali-ahum answered: "as to the memoranda sealed by me and by you - yes, i do not contest my seal." ennam-aššur said: "keep in mind what was sworn by the city!

akkadian: um-ma ku-zi-zi-a-ma a-na en-um-a-šùr qí-bi-ma a-na ma-lá tí-ir-tí-kà hu-ur-ší-kà ša ṭup-pé-e pí-la-ah-ištar i-dí-nam hu-ur-ší-a-nu-um ù ku-nu-ku-kà ku-nu-ku ša a-lu-lá-a
english: from kuzizya to ennam-aššur: in accordance with your message pilah-ištar gave me (access to) your store-room with the tablets - the container and your seal, sealed by alulaya.

akkadian: um-ma a-na-ku-ma ú-ṭá-tám <gap>-a-ku-ma a-we-el-tim dí-in ú tí-ir-ta-kà
english: i wrote to you and said: "give the grain <gap> to(?) the lady." so, send word.

akkadian: um-ma ku-zi-zi-a-ma ù a-mur-ištar-ma a-na a-la-hi-im qí-bi-ma túg.hi-tù-kà i-na ma-ri-it-hi-im <gap> sig₅ i la <gap>-kam túg ra-qá-tum <gap> ša
english: from kuziziya and amur-ištar to ali-ahum: your textiles <gap> in marithum, <gap> thin textiles that have been sold <gap> the rest of your textiles are available.

akkadian: ta-da-nim i-ni-id-nu ší-tí túg.hi-tí-kà
english: the trade is at a stand-still.

akkadian: a-na en-na-nim ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-šùr-ma 20 ma-na kù.babbar
english: to ennānum and ali-ahum from puzur-aššur: ennānum brings 20 minas of silver under my seal.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-a en-na-num na-ší kù.babbar i-na ma-na-i-šu áš-du a-na e-na-ah-dingir i-ta-ší-a-ma ṭup-pá-am ša
english: ašdu weighed the silver with his one-mina weight for enah-ilī so let him give you a tablet with my seal.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-a li-dí-na-ku-nu-tí ki-lá-lá-ku-nu-ma li-tí-a-šu-ma ri-hi ú tù-ra-ma ku-un-kà-šu-ma a-šar a-šùr-ni-im-ri e-ez-ba-šu
english: both of you should split (the envelope) <gap> and seal it again and leave it for aššur-nimrī.

english: šalim-aššur's attorney questioned man-mahir.

akkadian: hu-sà-ru-ú ú-ta-ru-ú ša lá ú-ta-e-ru-ú i-ša-ri-iq-šu-um
english: he who does not return it will have it taken away by force.

akkadian: šál-ma-a-šùr i bu-ul-ṭí-šu hu-sà-ra-am a-na ší-a-ma-tim
english: when šalim-aššur was alive he gave you lapis lazuli for purchases.

akkadian: i-dí-na-kum lu hu-sà-ra-am dí-nam lu kù.babbar ší-im hu-sà-ri-im dí-na-ma a-na a-lim{ki}
english: either give me the lapis lazuli or give me the price in silver of the lapis lazuli, so i may bring it to the city.

akkadian: lu-bi-il₅ lá tù-ni-hi ra-bi-ṣa-am i-a-tí
english: do not create difficulties for me, the attorney!

akkadian: ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} ú ru-ba-im ta-mu-ú lu ú-kà-al ki-ma ú-ni-hi-ni
english: i shall indeed remember what was sworn by an oath by the city and the king - that he has obstructed me.

akkadian: šu-ma en-nam-a-šùr dumu kà-ri-a a-na a-šùr-du₁₀ i-tù-ar en-nam-a-šùr dumu šu-{d}en.líl ú-ba-áb-šu iš-tù
english: if ennam-aššur son of karriya raises claim against aššur-ṭāb, ennam-aššur son of šu-illil will clear him.

akkadian: ša-lim-ar-dí ù šé-ep-ištar i-ra-dí-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí a-ma-kam ša-áp-tám ú maš-ki i
english: lock the wool and the hides in the store room there and send me the servants.

akkadian: a-na ṣú-ha-ri dí-na-ma lu-ub-lu-nim
english: they should not rest a single night.

akkadian: ú-ma-kál lá i-bi-tù ú du-ug-li
english: also, as to the -implements, guard them.

akkadian: uṣ-ra-šu-nu-tí bi-tám i-na ku-nu-ki-ku-nu ku-un-kà
english: seal the house with your own seals.

akkadian: a-na ni-ni ú i-lá-áb-ra-at-ba-ni kišib
english: to nini and ilabrat-bāni; seal of kunila.

akkadian: a-pu-tum a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pì-im ih-da
english: pay attention to the words of the letter.

akkadian: a-ta-ta a-na en-na-sú-in dumu šu-a-nim iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-ta-ta-ma a-ma 3 li-me urudu ru-ba-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na-i-um
english: atata seized us against ennam-suen, son of šu-anum and atata said: look here, 3000 (minas of) copper the ruler of wahšušana has promised to pay to you as a final settlement.

akkadian: a-na ga-ma-ar-tim e-pu-ul-kà kù.babbar ší-im-šu a-na
english: you would see to it that the silver paid for it would reach me in the city.

akkadian: a-na lu-lu ù en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma a-na lu-lu qí-bi-ma <gap> ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú igi tù-ra-am-ì-lí ù šu-ištar a-na ší-a-ma-tim i-nu-mì a-na a-lim{ki} ta-li-ku a-dí-na-kum a-hi
english: to lulu and ennam-aššur; specifically to lulu from <gap> i gave you <gap> minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, with tūram-ilī and šu-ištar as witnesses, for purchases when you went to the city.

akkadian: im-dí-lúm i-šu itu.kam kán-wár-ta li-mu-um i-dí-a-šùr
english: month ix, epoynmy of iddin-aššur, son of kubīdi.

akkadian: dumu ku-bi-dí um-ma e-la-ma-ma 1 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar-áp-kà
english: elamma said: 'your 1 mina 6 shekels of silver amur-ištar has collected'.

akkadian: a-mur-ištar il₅-qé e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim a-mur-ištar ú-kà-an-ma šu-ma i li-bi a-mur-ištar lá uk-ta-in kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim i-ša-qal
english: elamma shall confirm amur-ištar (as having it) to imdī-ilum and if he does not confirm that amur-ištar has it, elamma will pay the silver and its interest to imdī-ilum.

akkadian: um-ma ša-lim-a-šur a-na i-dí-a-bi-im i-tur₄-dingir e-na-nim i-na-ah-dingir ù en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma a-hu-a be-lu-a a-tù-nu lá li-bi₄ dingir-li-ma i-be-sà-e
english: from šalim-aššur to iddin-abum, itūr-ilī, ennānum, inah-ilī and ennam-aššur: my dear brothers and lords, unfortunately i have suffered great losses.

akkadian: i-pá-al i-sà-bi-i ma-du-tim a-ta-ma-ar
english: i have experienced great losses.

akkadian: a-hu-a a-tù-nu i ni-kà-sí-a i-na bé-et kà-ri-im šu-ùh-ta ú qá-tí mì-ma lá ta-na-dí-a
english: my dear brothers, withdraw at my accounting in the office of the colony and do not deposit anything on my account.

akkadian: a-na ku-zi-zi-a ù pí-lá-ah-ištar qí-bi-ma um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma 2 túg ra-qá-tim 0.5 ma-na 3 gín hu-sà-ru-um ša-lim-wa-ar-dí ù šé-ep-ištar a-ṣé-er ku-zi-zi-a ub-lu-nim 3 túg ša ma-e sig₅-tum 1 túg
english: to kuziziya and pilah-ištar from ennam-aššur: šalim-wardī and šēp-ištar brought 2 thin textiles and 33 shekels of lapis lazuli to kuziziya. šu-bēlum and aluwa bring 3 good waterproof textiles and 1 garment under my seal to kuziziya.

akkadian: lu-bu-šu-am ku-nu-ki-a a-ṣé-er ku-zi-zi-a šu-be-lúm ù a-lu-a na-áš-ú ù mì-šu ša a-dí
english: but why is it that although i wrote to you about pilah-ištar, my servants have stayed until today?

akkadian: a šu-mì-šu le-tí-iq a-na-kam kù.babbar li-ìš-qú-lu ṭup-pu-šu a-na ša ki-ma
english: they can pay the silver here; i shall (then) give his tablet to his representatives.

akkadian: šu-a-tí lá-dí-in a-na ku-zi-zi-a qí-bi₄-ma a-bi₄ a-ta ší-im 2 ra-qá-tim
english: to kuziziya: my dear father, the proceeds from the 2 thin textiles<gap>

akkadian: kišib šu-ku-bi₄-im dumu qá-a-tim kišib a-lá-hi-im dumu a-šur-ma-lik kišib ku-na-a dumu
english: seal of šu-kūbum, son of qa'atum, seal of ali-ahum, son of aššur-mālik, seal of kunnāya, son of manana.

akkadian: ma-na-na a-na gám-ri-im ù hu-lu-qá-e ša illat ì-lí-a-lim a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ku-na-a
english: for expenses and losses of the caravan of ilī-ālum, whatsoever, kunnāya shall not raise claim against elamma.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma ú-lá i-tù-ar a-na 30 ma-na an.na ša ku-na-a a-na illat ì-li-a-lim nu-du-a-e i-dí-ú qá-de₈ illat-ma a-na a-wi-tí-šu i-za-sú-um
english: as for the 30 minas of tin, for which kunnāya served ilī-ālum's caravan a notice, it will belong to him together with (the other members of) the caravan according to its declared value.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im ú zu-ku-a um-ma puzur₄-a-šur-ma 13 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-a i-na za-al-pá a-na en-nam-a-šur
english: to ali-ahum and zukuwa from puzur-aššur; i gave 13 minas of tin under my seal in zalpa to ennam-aššur son of narām-suen.

akkadian: a-na a-šur-<gap> qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-mu-<gap> lu 2 kà-ar-pè lu 3 kà-ar-pè ṭá-áb-tám
english: to aššur-<gap> from amu<gap>: give either 2 or 3 jars of salt to the porters.

akkadian: a-na itu-<gap>-kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at
english: if he does not pay he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the .

akkadian: kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb wa-bi-il₅ ṭup-pí-im
english: the bearer of the tablet is the creditor.

akkadian: šu-ut dam.gàr li-mu-um a-šùr-mì-ti dumu
english: eponymy of aššur-imittī, son of iddin-ištar.

akkadian: iš-tí kù.babbar uk-ta-al šu-ma a-e-ma ú-da-pì-ir-ma ag-ra-am ú-ga-ar-ma ig-re ag-ri-im ú-ma-lá <gap>
english: if he goes away to somewhere else, i will hire a hireling and he will compensate the wages of the hireling.

akkadian: túg a-na ni-is-ha-tim il₅-qé-ú 1 gín kù.babbar i-pu-lu <gap> li-wi-tum <gap> 2 túg ku-ta-nu <gap>-ra-am <gap> a-na zi-<gap> iš-tí i-<gap>
english: of the 25 dark textiles they took 2.5 textiles as import-tax and they balanced 1 shekel of silver <gap> textiles as wrapping, <gap>-2 tiles <gap>

akkadian: 8 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am puzur₄ <gap> a-na
english: puzur-<gap> gave 8 minas of refined silver to iddin-abum.

akkadian: i-lá-pá-at igi la-qé-pí-im igi la-qé-ep dumu {d}en.líl-ba-ni
english: witnessed by lā-qēpum, by lā-qēp s. of illil-bāni.

akkadian: <gap> ù i-na ma-lá i-na <gap> ba-ab-tí-a kù.babbar ta-ma-ha-ra-ni <gap> en-um-a-šùr ṭù-ur-da-nim <gap> iš-tí-in i-na ra-dí-i a-<gap> i-na kà-ṣa-ri-a ša ta-na-ta <gap>-lá <gap> ki-il₅-a-ma i-re-ší-ku-nu li-zi-iz-ma
english: <gap> and from what you receive from my outstanding claims <gap> send ennam-aššur <gap> one of the guides <gap> of my harnessors that you observe, keep him and let him serve you, and have my outstanding claims paid.

akkadian: ba-ab-tí ša-áš-qí-lá a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma <gap> ba-ab-tí-a ša kà-ni-iš-ki kù.babbar 10 ma-na ša-áš-qí-lá-ma gi-im-lá-ni
english: my dear brothers, take care to have paid at least 10 minas of my outstanding claims in kanesh and do me a favour.

akkadian: i-na a-al ší-a-ma-tim wa-áš-ba-ku a-šu-mì ša
english: i am staying in a city where purchases can be made.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar le-qé-a ù šu-ma lá ki-a-am <gap> ma-na
english: if an investor does not answer you, then take 15.5 minas 3 shekels of silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar ki-il₅-a-ma a-dí e-lá-i-a ma-ma-an <gap> a-li <gap> a-na <gap>-na-nim li-il₅ me lá ni
english: but, if it not so, then hold on to <gap> minas of silver and noone must <gap> until i come up. <gap>

akkadian: an.na-ki-a tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam-ma li-bi₄ lá ip-ta-na-ri-id
english: give them their wages, 12.5 shekels of silver.

akkadian: an-ni-ki é-be-et iš-té-en-<gap> i-na ba-ri-ku-nu li-ib-ší a-lá-ha-am ú ṣú-ha-ri ma-lá wa-áš-bu-ni ù e-ma-ri ša ili₅-we-da-ku ú-šé-ri-a-ni ù i-a-am ša wa-ší-ib-ru-ba-ni ir-dí-a-ku-nu-tí-ni ú ú-nu-sú a-lá-hu-um li-ir-dí-a-am
english: as for ali-ahum and the servants who are present - plus the donkeys that ilī-wēdāku conducted to me plus my own that wašibru-bāni led to you, including its harness - let ali-ahum lead that to me.

akkadian: kišib ša-lim-a-šur a-na en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im ša-na-am
english: sealed by šalim aššur; to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum.

akkadian: ša 20 ma-na ma-<gap>
english: a kettle of 20 minas <gap>

akkadian: a-ṣé-ri-ni ú-šé-bi-lam wa-ar-kà-tám 18 ma-na kù.babbar
english: later the son of ṣallāmum produced 18 minas of silver.

akkadian: um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na i-dí-a-bi-im en-na-nim i-na-ah-dingir ma-ma-hi-ir en-um-a-šùr ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bí-ma <gap>
english: from šalim-aššur to iddin-abum, ennānum, inah-ilī, man-mahir, ennam-aššur and ali-ahum: check my certified tablets concerning my outstanding claims, and make anyone who owes me a single shekel of silver pay the silver and its interest.

akkadian: ṭup-pé-e-a ha-ru-mu-tim ša
english: you yourselves must decide there in whatever matter you observe.

akkadian: ba-a-ba-tí-a am-ra-ma ma-ma-an kù.babbar
english: take care to have the silver paid and send it to me as soon as possible.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tí šu-ul-ṭá-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: and the lady is robbing even me, but you, you keep quiet!

akkadian: ù šu-ma ta-áš-bi-tí qá-tí i-du-nu-ni-ku-nu-tí le-qé-a ù šu-ma
english: concerning 37 minas 10 shekels of silver, 2 minas 3 shekels of gold and <gap> thousand minas of copper i left my tablets and ṣdocuments with ennam-aššur in burušhaddum.

akkadian: ma-ma-an i-na tap-pá-i-a lá ma-gi₅-ir-ku-nu
english: as for the losses of ali-ahum's son i heard about <gap>-5 shekels which they imposed and he returned.

akkadian: qá-tí dí-na iš-té-ni-iš
english: of all this ennam-aššur has not sent me any silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar šé-bi-lá-nim
english: there, let him send <gap> that he took.

akkadian: puzur₄-a-šùr dumu a-zu-za ha-bu-lam iš-tù itu.kam na-ar-ma-ak-a-šùr li-mu-um en-na-sú-in
english: he is to pay within 7 months from the month narmak-aššur in the eponymy of enna-suen.

akkadian: a-na 7 itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: if he has not paid (in time), he is to add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb a-hu-ú-a be-lu-ú-a a-tù-nu a-wi-lúm a-dí
english: my dear brothers and lords, the man has cheated me once or twice.

akkadian: kišib a-lu-lá-a dumu a-li-a kišib a-šur-pì-lá-ah dumu
english: seal of alulāya, son of aliya, seal of aššur-pilah, son of šu-anum.

akkadian: qá-té en-na-ma-nim a-wi-lu a-ni-ú-tum da-a-a-nu
english: the above mentioned men were judges.

akkadian: a-na kur-ub-ištar ù tám-kà-ri-im qí-bi-ma um-ma i-dí-a-šur-ma 50 túg ku-ta-ni 2 anše ša tám-kà-ri-im e-na-ah-ì-lí ip-qí-dam
english: say to kurub-ištar and the merchant, thus iddin-aššur: 50 -textiles (and) 2 donkeys belonging to the trader ēnah-ilī entrusted to me (for transport).

akkadian: mì-li-ik lu-qú-tí-ku-nu mì-il₅-kà 0.3333 ma-na
english: consider what to do with your merchandise.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na pá-ni-a šé-bi-lam
english: send me en route 0.3333 mina of silver.

akkadian: a-šur-du₁₀ šu-ištar ù a-na-ku lu né-ta-wu i-na ta-am-ni-a ha-mu-uš-tum ša
english: aššur-ṭāb, šu-ištar and i myself, we will discuss in tawiniya; the week eponymy of aššur-bāni.

akkadian: a-šur-ba-ni iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša e-lá-lí ù a-šur-iš-ta-kál a-na 6 <gap>
english: reckoned from the the week eponymy of elalī and aššuriš-tikal within 6 weeks / months <gap>

akkadian: ni-im-lik-ma lu né-pu-us a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-na-ku a-na ma-nim ú a-tù-nu a-na ma-nim i-šu-ma ku-nu-um ha-bu-lá-ku
english: my dear brothers, to whom can i turn and to whom can you, for it is your property that i owe - it is indeed yours!

akkadian: ku-nu-um-ma al-kà-ni-ma li-ba-am dí-na-ma <gap> ša
english: come and encourage me <gap> they had enter.

akkadian: a-na tí-bu-lá ta-nu-uš-ta ù áš-ta-ah-šu-šar qí-bi₄-ma um-ma šu-ku-tum-ma mì-šu ša a-ma-kam a-na kà-ri-im a-we-lúm
english: to tibula, tanušta and aštahšušar from šukkutum: why is it that when the man goes to the colony there you release him?

akkadian: i-li-ku-ni a-tí-na
english: he listened to lies.

akkadian: tù-šé-ra-šu sà-ru-tí iš-me lá iš-ta-na-me ki-ma a-na-kam a-hi ù tap-pá-i
english: does he not hear all the time that they maltreat my brother and my partner here?

akkadian: im-šu-hu-ni a ší-a-tí a-na-kam
english: for that reason i am delayed here.

akkadian: dí-ni-ší-im a-tí-ma a-na kà-ri-im kà-ša-dim
english: indeed, you <gap> to reach the colony.

akkadian: šu-ma um-mì a-tí ša ma-ma-an
english: if you are truly my mother, listen to no one!

akkadian: lá ta-ša-me ha-ra-ni a-ku-ša-am
english: my trip has been put off.

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma a-na ku-ra qí-bi-ma ha-ra-ni a-na
english: from ennam-aššur to kura: my journey goes to the city.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} 3 gú 35 ma-na urudu ší-kam ša ṭup-pí-kà ša-ni-im e-li-im u₄-mu-kà 2
english: as to the 3 talents 35 minas of copper from your second, upper tablet, your term is exceeded by 2 years.

akkadian: ša-na-at e-tí-qú i-na tù-wa-ar ṣú-ha-ri-a iš-tù pu-ru-uš-ha-dim urudu-ú-šu ma-sí-a-am a-na ah-ša-lim ù a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-qú-ul-ma
english: when my servant returns from purušhaddum pay his washed copper to ah-šalim or to my representatives, and get your tablet from ah-šalim.

akkadian: ṭup-pá-kà iš-tí ah-ša-lim le-qé šu-ma urudu lá ta-kà-ša-ad 1 gú urudu sig₅ šu-qú-ul-ma ta-ah-sí-is-tám pá-tí-tám id-a-ma i-na hu-bu-li-kà
english: if you do not acquire enough copper, then pay 1 talent of good copper and set down in an open memorandum that it will be deducted from your debt.

akkadian: li-iṣ-hi-ir ù urudu na-am-a-dam ša ṭup-pì-kà a-dí tù-wa-ri-a ni-sí 1
english: then we have settled the majority of the copper from your tablet until my return.

akkadian: ma-na urudu a-na qá-té ṣú-ha-ri-a dí-in
english: give 1 mina of copper to my servant to dispose of.

akkadian: ku-um-ri-im ša-ni-tám-a-na e-na-ni-a e-zi-ib 36 ma-na urudu 5 gín kù.babbar ki zu-ba 1 ṣú-ha-ru-um mì-ma a-nim a-na e-na-ni-a e-zi-ib
english: a second (slave-girl) i left to ennāniya. 36 minas of copper (and) 5 shekels of silver due from zuba, 1 young slave - all this i left to ennāniya.

akkadian: a-ni-im i ší-im ì.giš
english: all this from the price of oil.

akkadian: kišib ni-mar-ištar dumu puzur₄-a-šùr kišib en-nam-a-šùr dumu kà-ri-a a-šùr-na-da dumu šu-{d}en.líl tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: sealed by nimar-ištar son of puzur-aššur, by ennam-aššur son of karriya; aššur-nādā son of šu-illil is our (absent) partner.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ù kur-ub-ištar a-na ša-na-at i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu lá iš-qúl
english: if he has not paid at the completion of his term, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: month ša-kēnātim, eponymy ali-ṭāb son of sassātum.

akkadian: ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er šu-ma-bi₄-a en-um-a-šur i-šu iš-tí kù.babbar a-nim uk-ta-al igi a-ta-dí-a dumu en-na-nim igi a-šur-ni-šu dumu
english: witnessed by atadiya son of ennānum, by aššur-nīšu son of amuraya. šum-abiya owes <gap> 5 shekels of refined silver; he will pay when he comes up from the city.

akkadian: a-mu-ra-a <gap> 5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um ki šu-ma-bi₄-a
english: if he has not paid, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na e-lá-i-šu i-ša-qal
english: month bēlat-ekallim, eponymy after ilšu-rabi.

akkadian: šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-ab itu.kam
english: witnessed by atadiya, by annali. <gap> mina of refined silver owed by <gap> son of dudiki.

akkadian: be-el-tí-é.gal-lim li-mu-um ša qá-tí dingir-šu-ra-bi₄ igi a-ta-dí-a igi a-na-lí <gap> ṣa-ru-pá-am
english: puzur-aššur owes <gap>; they will pay within <gap> weeks reckoned from the week of aššur-malik and šamaš-bāni.

akkadian: <gap> dumu du-dí-ki <gap> i-ṣé-er puzur₄-a-šur i-šu iš-tù
english: if they have not paid, they will add interest at the rate <gap> per month per mina.

akkadian: ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ma-lik ù {d}utu-ba-ni a-n
english: month qarraʾātum, eponymy after <gap>
