english: in the presence of adad-bāni, son of ganaya, (and) of kulumaya.

akkadian: um-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ma a-na ša-qí-il₅ da-tim ší-ip-ri-ni kà-ar kà-ar-ma ú wa-bar-ra-tim qí-bi₄-ma ṭup-pu-um
english: thus kanesh, say to the -payers, our messenger, every single colony, and the trading stations: a letter of the city has arrived.

akkadian: ší-ip-ri-ni šé-bi₄-lá-nim me-he-er ṭup-pì-ni a-na kà-ar kà-ar-ma ú wa-bar-ra-tim
english: send a copy of (this) letter of ours to every single colony and to all the trading stations.

akkadian: um-ma en-na-num-ma a-na id-na-a ù a-šur-<gap> qí-bi-ma a ma-lá áš-pu-ra-ku-nu-tí-ni a-na tí-ir-tí-a ša <gap> im <gap> i-ra-dí-ú a-pu-tum i-hi-id-ma ki-ma ša qá-qí-dí-kà lu-qú-tí ù e-ma-ri-a a ma-lá
english: from ennānum to idnaya and aššur-<gap>: in accordance with what i wrote to you with my orders that <gap> leads - urgent, pay attention and guard my goods and my donkeys like your own life as you are a gentleman.

akkadian: bé-ú-lá-at ha-al-gi-a-šu a-šur-i-mì-tí il₅-qé ma-lá ṣú-ba-tí ù an.na a-na ra-mì-ni-šu
english: clear what textiles and tin he brings on his own and let it remain with him.

akkadian: na-áš-ú za-ki-ma
english: send me word.

akkadian: iš-tí-šu li-ib-ší tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam ú <gap> a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-a
english: also, carry out <gap> in accordance with my instructions i sent to you.

akkadian: ša áš-pu-ra-ku-nu-tí-ni ep-ša ù ṣí-ba-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí mì-ma lá i-sà-li-ma li-bi₄ lá i-ma-ra-ṣa-kum
english: also, with respect to the interest(?) of aššur-imittī he must not lie and make me angry at you.

akkadian: li-bi-a hi-na-a il₅-qé igi a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim dumu šu-a-nim
english: in the presence of aššur-bēl-awātim, son of šu-anum, of ennam-adad, son of zira.

akkadian: igi en-nam-{d}iškur dumu zi-ra um-mì-a-nu-šu a-na ší-a-ma-tim ú-ra-ki-sú-ni
english: his investors had contractually bound me to (provide it) for making purchases.

akkadian: um-ma lá-ma-sí-ma a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma mì-šu-um na-áš-pè-ra-tí-kà a-na a-bi-kà lá ta-ša-pá-ar a-lá-hu-um <gap> a-ša-pu-ru-šu-ni
english: from lamassi to ennam-aššur: why is it that you do not send your messages to your father?

akkadian: <gap> lá i-mu-a šu-ma li-bi-kà <gap> ú
english: ali-ahum will not <gap> that i write to him.

akkadian: é a-bi-ni ta-áš-ku-un <gap> a-bi₄-kà e-ṣa-ma ku-a-a-tum <gap>
english: is your father's <gap> your own affairs are so small!

akkadian: 1 gín ša ú-šé-ṣí-ú i
english: the matter with man-mahir has been settled.

akkadian: a-ma-kam i-za-zu-ni <gap> 3 gú urudu ki ma-ma-hi-ir ša ku-a-tí <gap> sig₅ ša e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí-ni <gap>
english: in addition to <gap> mina which stand there, 3 talents of copper, owed by man-mahir, that he left with you <gap>

akkadian: ša i-na lu-hu-za-tí-a i-ba-ší-ú-ni šu-ma a-mì-ša-am ù-šé-ri-bu-ni-šu-nu a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-a a-na
english: if they have brought them in there, then convert them to silver in accordance with my instructions.

akkadian: kù.babbar ta-er-šu-nu šu-ma lá ú-šé-ri-bu-ni-šu-nu tí-ir-ta-kà ki pá-ni-im-ma li-li-kam-ma
english: if they have not brought them in, send me word with the first transport to inform me.

akkadian: úz-ni pé-té-e 1 ma-na kù.babbar ha-tù-ma ša ma-ṣa-ra-tim ha-bu-lu ṭup-pu-šu ha-ar-ma-am ù-kà-al u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú i-ma-ṭá a-na a-šùr-ma-lik dumu i-na-a qá-ta-tum
english: as to the 1 mina of silver that hattu owes for the guards, i hold his certified tablet; his terms are overdue. <gap> i have been booked as guarantor for aššur-malik son of innaya.

akkadian: na-al-pu-ta-ku a-ma-kam a-šùr-ma-lik i-na ša-ha-tí-kà li-zi-iz-ma ṣa-áb-ta-ṣú-ma kù.babbar
english: have aššur-malik assist you there, seize him and make him pay the silver.

akkadian: ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma kù.babbar lá iš-ta-qal a-ša-sú me-er-a-sú e-ru-ba-tù-a šé-ṣí-šu-nu-ma i be-tí-kà lu wa-áš-ba
english: if he has not paid the silver, take out his wife and daughter, my security, and let them stay in your house.

akkadian: ta-ša-me-a-ni ṭù-ur-da-šu i-na pá-ni-tim <gap>-ga-<gap> tám-kà-ri-im kù.babbar 1 gín tù-šé-ṣí-a ù i-na
english: earlier <gap> of the merchant <gap> you realised every shekel of silver, and silver was cleared for me from my goods.

akkadian: tù-ša-as-ha-ra-ni ha-ra-na-am dí-na-ni-ma li-ba-am a-na tám-kà-ri-im dí-na-ma a-m-ru u₄-me-šu lá
english: arrange a caravan trip for me and encourage the merchant, so his ill-wishers will not multiply.

akkadian: <gap> nim-ma <gap>-mì-tí a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma i-na bu-lu-uṭ a-hi-kà a-na a-hi-kà ta-ak-la-tí-ma ù a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim la ta-az-ku-a-am u₄-ma-am a
english: from <gap> to <gap> and aššur-imittī; specifically to ali-ahum: while your brother was alive you trusted in your brother, and still, until today you have not cleared me.

akkadian: ma-nim ta-ta-kà-al i-na
english: today, in whom do you trust?

akkadian: é a-bi₄-kà a-ta-ma ù ku-lu ma-e-em a-ṣé-ri-kà-ma ta-ur a-pu-tum a-ma-kam
english: you yourself are in your father's house and all the water has fallen back upon you.

akkadian: i-hi-id-ma ra-ma-kà za-ki-a-ma tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam a-na-kam kù.babbar
english: urgent, take care there, clear yourself, set out and come!

akkadian: la-pì-im mì-ma la ta-pá-la-ah ù i-na bu-lu-uṭ a-hi-kà
english: to ali-ahum: do not be afraid at all with respect to lā-qēp there.

akkadian: a-dí ma-la ù ší-ni-šu a-mì-ša-am a-na a-wa-tí-šu ga-ma-ri-im iš-ta-na-pá-ra-ku-nu-tí mì-ma <gap> šu-ku-bu-um ba-al-ṭù-nu-ni <gap> na
english: also, while your brother was alive he often write you there in order to conclude his affair. <gap> as <gap> šu-kūbum is alive <gap>

akkadian: a-na dumu um-me-a-nim ke-nim dí-in-ma lu-ub-lu-nim a-šu-mì
english: concerning the narrow track i keep hearing that orders are strict.

akkadian: ha-ra-an sú-qí-nim áš-ta-na-me-ma a-wa-tum
english: my dear brother, send word to inform me.

akkadian: dan-na a-hi a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma úz-ni pé-té-e 0.5 ma-na 2
english: i left 0.5 mina 2 shekels of silver under my seal for ennānum son of abiya in purušhaddum.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a i-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim a-na en-na-nim dumu
english: ennānum said as follows: i gave <gap> to ataya and he sent <gap> to you.

akkadian: i-dí-na-ni šu-ú-ša-al-šu-um lá-áš-qú-lá-kum igi 2 dumu um-me-a-ni
english: seize ennānum and have him pay the silver and send it to me.

akkadian: ú-ra-ki-sú en-na-nam ṣa-ba-at-ma kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu-ma a-na pá-ni-a šé-bi₄-lam šu-ma ta-da-gal-ma
english: if you observe that the narrow track is not opened up then send it with the caravan itself.

akkadian: ha-ra-an sú-qí-nim lá wa-šu-ra-at-ma iš-tí illat-tim-ma
english: close up <gap> with straw worth 2 shekels of silver for me.

akkadian: šé-bi-la-am tí-ib-nam ša 2 gín kù.babbar ša
english: my dear brother, i hear that they have not yet sent my maid.

akkadian: um-ma me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi₄-im-ma a-na ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na a-i-tim tù-kà-al-ni-a-tí lá-mì-id-ni-a-tí
english: the sons of iddin-abum said as follows to šalim-aššur: for which things do you detain us?

akkadian: a-na-ku kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú ú ṣí-ba-at ṣí-ib-tim a-šé-e-ku-nu a-na
english: i am the guarantor: i sue you for the silver, the interest and the compound interest.

akkadian: a-ni-tim ú-kà-al-ku-nu ù
english: for these things i detain you.

akkadian: a-ha-ma 8 ma-na kù.babbar šu-bé-lúm ša-al-ṭí ša i-na ha-hi-im il₅-qé-ú šu-be-lam₅
english: furthermore, 8 minas of silver, my funds, that šu-bēlum took in hahhum, for that i sue šu-bēlum alone.

akkadian: igi i-ri-ší-im dumu a-mur-{d}utu igi šu-a-šur <gap> a-šur igi šu-ištar dumu šu-ki-tim
english: witnessed by erišum son of amur-šamaš, by šu-aššur son of <gap>-aššur, by šu-ištar son of šukkutum.

akkadian: a-na a-ta-ta dumu ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šùr ù kà-nu-tim dumu.mí en-na-sú-in
english: to atata, son of mannum-balum-assur, and kannutum, daughter of ennam-suen.

akkadian: kišib a-na-ah-ì-lí dumu du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr
english: seal of anah-ili, son of tab-silli-assur

akkadian: 8 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-ku-mì-šar
english: 8 shekels of refined silver ikūn-mīšar owes to elamma.

akkadian: e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù a-lim{ki} i
english: he will pay when he returns from the city.

akkadian: tù-a-ri-šu i-ša-qal igi šu-ištar
english: in the presence of šu-ištar.

akkadian: 1 túg ra-qá-tám sig₅ a-na en-um-a-šur iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na e-lá-i-šu a-šur-du₁₀
english: aššur-ṭāb will bring 1 thin textile of fine quality for ennam-aššur up here when he comes up from the city.

akkadian: ú-šé-lá-a-am igi en-um-a-šur dumu
english: witnessed by ennam-aššur son of narām-suen.

akkadian: na-ra-am-zu 3 gín kù.babbar me-eh-ra-tim ša kà-ku-uš al-ma-tim iš-tí a-lu-wa en-um-a-šùr ú-šé-ba-al-šum
english: ennam-aššur will send him 3 shekels of silver, the corresponding amount for the -flour of the widow, with aluwa.

akkadian: kišib ú-ra-a-a dumu ma-na-na kišib {d}mar.tu-ba-ni dumu
english: seal of uraya son of manana, seal of amurrum-bāni son of manana.

akkadian: ma-na-na a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in bu-zu-ta-a ša-li-iš-ni
english: buzutaya was our third man.

akkadian: a-na en-na-ma-nim qí-bi₄-ma um-ma kà-kà-ba-ma a-na-kam dam.gàr-ru
english: to ennam-anum from kakkaba: the merchant belittles me here.

akkadian: ú-ša-am-ṭá-a-ni a-na a-ša-ša-bi um-ma
english: you said to ašašabi: i shall go.

akkadian: sí-ki ú-ṭá-ra-ad 10 ma-na urudu ša aq-bi₄-ú dumu zu-ba lá i-dí-nam 10 ma-na urudu a-na ṣí-ib-tim é nu-a-e al-qé-ma ṣú-ha-ar-kà ip ta an ú-ma-am ṣú-ha-ar-kà ar-ta-na-pu-ud dingir
english: as for the 10 minas of copper that i promised, zuba's son has not given it to me; i have borrowed 10 minas of copper against interest in the house of an anatolian and your servant <gap> today i am running around (as) your servant.

akkadian: um-ma i-dí-sú-in-ma a-na sig₅-pì-i-a-šùr ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma a-dí-i na-áš-pè-er-tí ša be-lúm-ba-ni ša té-zi-ba-ni iš-tí-in i-na ba-ri-ku-nu li-li-kam-ma
english: from iddin-suen to damiq-aššur and ali-ahum: concerning the missive about bēlum-bāni that you left me, one of you should come and receive your silver.

akkadian: i-ru-aq a-dí-i be-lúm-ba-ni a-na-kam lá na-ṭù-ma tí-ir-tí lá e-zi-ib a-na tí-ša-mu-ur-na lá e-tí-iq
english: concerning bēlum-bāni it is not appropriate for me to leave instructions here; he will not go overland to tišmurna.

akkadian: a-na sig₅-pì-i-a-šùr qí-bi₄-ma wa-dí a-wa-tim ša ni-ta-ú-ni ta-am-tí-ší
english: to damiq-pī-aššur: apparently you have forgotten the matter we discussed.

akkadian: e-et-qám-ma e-et-qám-ma a-šar a-wa-tim i-lá-ku lu né-pu-uš
english: do come here, come here, so we can do what the situation demands.

akkadian: kà-ru-um <gap> dí-nam i-dí-in-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ù me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi-im i-na ki-dim a-hu-um a-na a-hi-im da-na-sú i-qá-be a-dí 3
english: the <gap> colony passed a verdict, stating that šalim-aššur and the sons of iddin-abum will each say binding words to each other outside (the city).

akkadian: u₄-me ma-ma-an gán-lam i-na ba-ri-šu-nu ú-lá i-lá-ak
english: within 3 days no one among them may go away (from here).

akkadian: a-na ì-lí-ba-ni ù ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šùr-e-nam-ma i-na ša-lá-tí-wa-ar 0.8333
english: to ilī-bāni and kuliya, say, this is what aššur-ennam says: in šalatiwar kuliya gave me 0.8333 mina of silver under his seal.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-šu ku-li-a i-dí-nam-ma a-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na a-na ṣé-ri-kà
english: i brought it to wahšušana to you and i said: herewith i entrust to you the silver under the seals of kuliya.

akkadian: ta-pu-lu um-ma
english: i entrusted the packet to you.

akkadian: a-ta-ma ke-na a-pu-ul kù.babbar igi
english: what did my paternal house that your brother came back on me?

akkadian: ma-num li-mu-um um-ma a-na-ku-ma a-šùr-lá-ma-sí ú šu-iš-ha-ra li-mu-ú
english: i booked 1 mina of silver as due by him. <gap> silver iddin-aššur, son of šu-bēlum, promised me <gap>.

akkadian: kišib be-lá-nim dumu šu-ku-bi-im kišib a-gu₅-a dumu dan-na-a-šur kišib ú-ṣú-ur-ša-ištar dumu da-da-a 1 ma-na kù.babbar
english: seal of belanum, son of su-kubum, seal of agua, son of dan-assur, seal of usur-sa-istar, son of dadaya. 1 mina of refined silver belanum, son of su-kubum, owes to kulia, son of ali-abum.

akkadian: ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er bé-lá-nim dumu
english: he will pay within one year and six months.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ú-me-šu
english: month v, eponymy of iddin-suen, son of iddin-abum.

akkadian: li-mu-um i-dí-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi-im kišib i-ku-pí-a dumu pí-lá-ah-ištar kišib ili₅-ba-ni dumu mu-ta-lim kišib a-šur-sipa dumu ú-ṣú-ra-nim
english: if he does not pay he will add interest in conformity with the rule of the karum. <gap> silver, a loan belonging to kuliya, son of ali-abum, ennam-suen, son of zarniqum holds; he is held by the silver.

akkadian: 8 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-ku-pí-a dumu pí-lá-ah-ištar ku-li-a dumu
english: if he goes away to somebody else, he will hire someone in his place and he will compensate the wages of the hireling.

akkadian: a-lá-bi-im i-šu-ú a-na 6 ur-hé kù.babbar i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb <gap> 10
english: seal of ili-malik, son of adad-ellat, seal of iddin-assur, son of su-belum, seal of ennam-suen, son of titinatal. 10 shekels of refined silver ili-malik, son of adad-ellat, owes to kuliya, son of ali-abum.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar be-ú-lá-at ku-li-a
english: per mina he will add 12 shekels as interest per year.

akkadian: dumu a-lá-bi-im i-na-sú-in dumu za-ar-ni-qí-im ú-ka-al iš-tí
english: either in the city or in the countryside, wherever he will be seen, he will pay the silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar uk-ta-al šu-ma šu-ma a-e-ma ú-dá-pí-ir
english: month v, eponymy of su-rama, sons of uzua.

akkadian: a-na i-ku-pí-a a-bu-a e-ri-ší-im ku-da-tim šu-ištar ù en-na-sú-in qí-bi-ma um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma a-na en-na-sú-in qí-bi-ma a-šùr ù i-lá-a-bi-ni lu i-dí-a-kà
english: to ikūn-pīya, abuwa, erišum, kudātum, šu-ištar and enna-suen from ennam-aššur; specifically to enna-suen: may aššur and the god of our fathers reject you, since you stood ready to separate me from my father's breast!

akkadian: ša ke-na-tim li-mì-im a-šur-na-da
english: you promised to pay the silver in 20 weeks.

akkadian: dumu puzur₄-a-na ha-bu-lá-tí-ma ṭup-pá-kà ha-ar-ma-am ú-kà-al
english: you will have to pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akkadian: a-na 20 ha-am-ša-tim
english: your terms are exceeded by 4 years.

akkadian: kù.babbar ša-qá-lam qá-bi-a-tí
english: has any silver been left for me?

akkadian: ša a-šé-e-ú-šu a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí qí-bi-ma a-na mì-ma kù
english: to my representatives: my dear brothers, if enna-suen answers you <gap> send me his answer soon and let him travel here.

akkadian: um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma a-na ša-lim-ìr-dí ù a-lu-wa qí-bi₄-ma mì-šu ša a-na-kam ra-dí-ú e-ta-wu-ú um-ma šu-nu-ma ṣú-ha-ru-kà ú-ṭá-tám a-ba-kam lá i-mu-ú ša a-lim{ki} wa li ša ta-hu-ur-a wa-li-wa-li ha-ri-a ša šu-mì-a áš ta-aq-bi₄-a-šu-nu-tí um-ma
english: from ali-ahum to šalim-wardī and aluwa: why is it that the guides have been arguing here, saying: your servants refuse to ship the grain." of the city <gap> waliwali <gap> you (plur.) said to them as follows: "haul the grain before spring!

akkadian: áb-kà-nim mì-ma lá i-ri-ah
english: ship the rest of the grain here.

akkadian: ší-tí ú-ṭí-tim áb-kà-nim a-ba-kam lá a-ba-kam
english: send me word as to whether it is shipped or not.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam
english: i shall come.

akkadian: kišib ú-zu-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im kišib sú-kà-lim dumu i-dí-sú-in
english: seal of uzua, seal of iddin-abum, seal of sukkallum son of iddin-suen.

akkadian: sú-kà-lim lu-zi i-šu itu.kam
english: month ab-šarrāni, eponymy kūbiya.

akkadian: áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ku-bi-a ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
english: he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akkadian: 1 ku-ta-nu-um sig₅ 1 ku-ta-num tár-dí-ú-um 1 ra-qú-tum 1 ša a-ki-dí-e ku-nu-ki ša šál-ma-a-šùr šé-ep-ištar ù ša-lim-wa-ar-dí a-na a-lá-bi₄-im ù i-dí-a-šùr ip-qí-du
english: šep-ištar and šalim-wardi have entrusted 1 kutanum of good quality, 1 kutanum of secondary quality, 1 thin textile, 1 akkadian textile — under šalim-aššur's seal — to ali-abum and iddin-assur.

akkadian: igi bu-zu-a igi du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr
english: witnessed by buzuwa, by tab-sill-aššur.

akkadian: a-na puzur₄-a-šur id-na-a ù i-ku-pí-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma šu-ištar-ma a-na id-na-a qí-bi₄-ma 3 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ha-bu-lá-at u₄-mu-kà
english: say to puzur-aššur, idnāya and ikūn-pī-aššur thus šu-ištar, say (in particular) to idnāya: 3 minas of refined silver you owe (me), your term is 12 weeks overdue.

akkadian: 12 ha-am-ša-tim e-tí-qú a-hi a-ta kù.babbar ú ṣi-ba-sú šu-qú-ul-ma a-na té-er-tí-a
english: please, my brother, pay the silver and its interest and let them give it to where i will instruct'.

akkadian: li-dí-nu <gap> a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí qí-bi₄-ma i-hi-da-ma kù.babbar ú ṣi-ba-sú ša-áš-qí-lá-šu-ma a-na té-er-tí-a pá-ni-a
english: say to my representatives: 'take care to to make him pay the silver and the interest on it and transfer it to where i will instruct'.""

akkadian: šé-bi₄-lá-nim anše é tam-kà-ri-im
english: ask for a donkey at a merchant's house.

akkadian: sí-sí-a-nim i-na sí-sí-kà-at pì-ri-kà-ni šu-mì tám-kà-ri-im
english: indicate the name of the merchant on the hem of the .

akkadian: wa-dí-a a-hu-a a-tù-nu i-ih-da-ma iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-im-ma áb-kà-nim
english: my dear brothers, take care to ship it with the very first transport.

akkadian: ší-im er-dí-im ša a-dí-nu a-lá-qé-ma an.na a-ša-am-ma ù-šé-ba-lá-kum <gap> mì-ma li-ba-kà lá <gap> dingir-šu ú-na-zu-mu
english: as for the 1 mina of silver, the price of the slave, whom i sold, if i collect it i will buy tin and send it to you.

akkadian: <gap>-a-<gap> i da <gap> šu <gap> ú ni-a-am li-ba-am ha-dí
english: do by no means worry. <gap> they complain <gap> and make us too happy!""

akkadian: a-tù-nu ta-ša-a-ma-ni a-tù-nu iš-tí-šu ku-un-kà a-na ší-tí
english: buy textiles from talhat for the rest of my silver.

akkadian: ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a ša-ma-nim a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma
english: my dear brothers, take care to send me adad-pilah.

akkadian: {d}im-pí-lá-ah ṭur₄-da-nim a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma a-na ša ú-na-hi-du a-hi a-ta i-hi-id-ma ṣú-ha-ri ṭur₄-dam
english: to ennam-aššur: pay heed to what i instructed you to do, my dear brother, and send my servant.

akkadian: kišib en-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi-im kišib a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku dumu i-ku-nim kišib pí-lá-ah-ištar dumu a-šur-sipa 6.8333 ma-na
english: seal of enna-suen son of iddin-abum, seal of aššur-taklāku son of ikūnum, seal of pilah-ištar son of aššur-rēʾī.

akkadian: ša en-na-sú-in dumu ku-ra-ra a-na 7 ha-am-ša-tim kù.babbar i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na
english: reckoned from the week of enna-suen son of kurara he will pay back the silver in 7 weeks.

akkadian: áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um šu-sú-in dumu ba-bi-lim 3 gín
english: month ab-šarrāni, in the eponymy šu-suen son of babilum.

akkadian: mì-ma a-nim a-šu-mì ku-da-tim ú-ša-qí-il₅
english: all this i paid on behalf of kudātum.

akkadian: um-ma ku-zi-a-ma a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma urudu ku-nu-ki ša
english: from kuziya to ennam-aššur: we broke open the copper sealed by šu-zuzu.

akkadian: lu gám-ru-ma lu ni-is-ha-tum lu mu-ṭá-ú 4 gú lá 5 ma-na
english: the wool - both expenses, import duty and deficit - has been cleared as 4 talents less 5 minas.

akkadian: iz-ku-a-am ṭup-pí ku-nu-ki-kà na-áš-ú-ni-kum
english: they bring you my tablet with your seal.

akkadian: mì-ma lá ta-ša-kà-na a-pu-tum
english: urgent, the orders are strict.

akkadian: a-wa-tum da-na-at mì-ma e šé-bi₄-lá-ma
english: do not send anything lest you be sorry.

akkadian: ṣú-ha-ru-ú a-sà-nim ša é ás-qú-dim ú pì-lá-ah-ištar dumu e-lá-ma ha-ra-nam iš-té-ni-iš i-li-ku-nim-ma i-na hu-ra-ma a-na é ku-bi-a iš-té-ni-iš e-ru-bu-ma ni-is-ha-tí-šu-nu é.gal-lúm iš-té-ni-iš i-sú-ùh i-na
english: the servants of asānum, who belongs to the house of asqūdum, and pilah-ištar, son of elamma, together went on a business trip and in hurama they together entered kubiya's house and the palace levied the import-tax from them together.

akkadian: wa-ar-ki-tim lu-qú-tum i-ṣí-bi-it-ma lu-qú-tám ša a-sà-nim é.gal-lúm i-ta-ba-al
english: afterwards merchandise was seized and the palace took away asānum's merchandise.

akkadian: <gap> ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam qá-ra-a-tim li-mu-um
english: <gap> month qarra'ātum, eponymy buzuzu.

akkadian: bu-zu-zu 20 ma-na kù.babbar i da-na-ma qá-tí a-ša-kà-an
english: he will give me 20 minas of silver and i shall lay claim to that.

akkadian: igi a-šur-gal igi a-šur-{d}utu-ši igi pí-lá-ah-a-šur 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tí puzur₄-a-na ni-a-im
english: witnessed by aššur-rabi, by aššur-šamšī, by pilah-aššur. 10 minas of refined silver is owed by our own puzur-anna.

akkadian: iš-tù-i-ša-qal ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku ù kà-sí-a a-na 30 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of aššur-taklāku and kasiya he is to pay in 30 weeks.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam té-i-na-tim li-mu-um a-mur-a-šur igi
english: month te'inātum, eponymy amur-aššur son of karriya.

akkadian: puzur₄-{d}im dumu i-dí-ištar igi du-um-qá-a dumu kur-ub-a-a <gap> mu-hu-ur-šu <gap> a-ṣé-er kù.babbar <gap> a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku <gap> ak-lá-ku <gap>
english: witnessed by puzur-adad son of iddin-ištar, by dumqaya son of kurub-ištar. <gap> receive <gap> on to of the silver <gap> aššur-taklāku <gap>

akkadian: kišib a-ku-za dumu šu-a-nim kišib lá-qé-ep dumu {d}ab-ba-ni kišib ṣí-lu-lu dumu
english: sealed by akuza son of šu-anum, by lā-qēp son of illil-bāni, by ṣilūlu son of uku.

akkadian: ú-ku a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr i-na ba-áb dingir ṭup-pá-am ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave a tablet before aššur's dagger in the gate of the god.

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-ša-dí-li-ma a-na ku-li-a ù a-šur-la-ma-sí a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma a-šu-mì a-wa-tim ša é sà-ba-sí-a a-wu-tum ša ma-ah-ri-kà lá iz-ku-ú lu-qú-ut-kà ša i-na a-pí-im té-zi-bu-ma
english: thus says aššur-šad-ilī to kuliya and aššur-lamassī and in particular to kuliya: because of the affair of sabasiya's house, the case that was not settled in your presence, latarāk has seized your merchandise that you had left behind in apum.

akkadian: lá-ta-ra-ak iṣ-ba-at áš-me-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tim ú ší-ip-ra-am al-qé-ma a-na a-pí-im i-li-ik-ma lu-qú-tám ú-ší-ir-ma a-bi-we-du-um i-ra-dí-a-ku-um be-et-kà urudu
english: when i heard it i availed myself of a tablet of the elders and a messenger who went to apum and obtained the release of the merchandise and abī-wēdum is now leading that to you.

akkadian: lá i-pá-ri-id ki-ma a-wi-lu-tí-kà lu-qú-ut-kà
english: there is absolutely no reason to get nervous.

akkadian: a-na kù.babbar ta-e-er-ma tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam a-hi a-ta tí-de₈-e ki-ma
english: gentleman as you are, convert your merchandise into silver and come immediately here.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr
english: the kanesh colony has given us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi a-ku-za igi mar.tu-ba-ni
english: witnessed by akuza, by amurrum-bāni, by lā-qēpum.

akkadian: igi lá-qé-pì-im i-tur₄-dingir dumu a-mur-ištar tap-pá-i-ni
english: itūr-ilī son of amur-ištar was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: ha-bu-lu kù.babbar a-al-du₁₀ iš-qú-ul a-al-du₁₀ i-lá-ak-ma né-mu-lu-um i-ta-áb-ší i-né-mì-li-im i-lá-qé šu-ma né-mu-lu-um
english: suhurpiyala (!) will make a business trip and if there is profit, he will take it (the silver) from the profit.

akkadian: lá-šu kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú a-li-a ù ha-ar-ša a-na a-al-du₁₀ i-ša-qú-lu
english: if there is no profit aliya and harša will pay the silver and the interest on it to āl-ṭāb.

akkadian: igi ší-il₅-ma-šu igi šu-pu-nu-ma-an
english: in the presence of šilmašu, of šuppunuman.

akkadian: um-ma šu-ištar-ma a-na šu-ma-li-ib-ší ì-lí-a-lim ù a-mur-ištar qí-bi-ma a-na šu-ma-li-ib-ší ù ì-lí-a-lim qí-bi-ma 14 gín kù.babbar
english: from šu-ištar to šuma-libši, ilī-ālum and amur-ištar; specifically to šuma-libši and ilī-ālum: you owe 14 shekels of refined silver.

akkadian: ṣa-ru-pá-am ha-bu-lá-tù-nu ṭup-pá-ak-nu ha-ar-ma-am
english: i hold your certified tablet.

akkadian: ú-kà-al u₄-mu-ku-nu ša-na-at e-tí-qú
english: your terms are overdue by a year.

akkadian: kù.babbar i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-ku-nu ù
english: the silver (loan) was with joint liability.

akkadian: tám-kà-ri-im a-ma-kam kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú a-na
english: pay the silver and its interest there to amur-ištar.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma ištar-pì-lá-ah-ma 3 ma-na an.na hi-na-a i-na <gap> ú-kà-al-ma
english: say to elamma, thus ištar-pilah: hinnāya holds 3 minas of tin and one must not open (the packet) lest he gets angry.

akkadian: lá i-pá-ṭù-ru-nim li-bu-šu lá
english: take care to send me 1.5 mina of silver.

akkadian: šu-ma za-<gap> ša-lim-a-šùr šu-ma a-ší-it ša-al-ma-at <gap> ma <gap> a-na
english: if za<gap> šalim-aššur.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um i-dí-ma lu ta am li ú <gap>
english: if ašet is safe <gap>

akkadian: a-dí-ni i-ṣé-ri-a na-dí kù.babbar
english: do not send any silver to the city.

akkadian: mì-ma a-na a-lim{ki} lá tù-šé-ba-lá kù.babbar a-na
english: give the silver to my servants and let it remain in my house.

akkadian: ṣú-ha-ri-a dí-na-ma i bé-tí-a li-bi-ší a-sú-ri a-wa-tum e im-qú-ta-ma ma-ma-an a-na ba-áb dingir-lim e
english: god forbid that the matter descends on me so that someone makes me go to the gate of the god and i and you too become unhappy.

akkadian: le-pu-šu ù
english: send them to me.

akkadian: e-na-a-šùr a ša-pár-tim ú-kà-al i-na a-lá-ak dumu a-na-<gap> ú maškim ša ì-lí-pí-ú-ṣur
english: when ana-x's son and ili-pi-usur's attorney come here they will pay me the silver and i will release the gods.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-ša-qú-lu-ni-ma i-li ú-ša-ar
english: as for the tablet, it will be cancelled.

akkadian: ku-li-a i-ša-qá-lam itu.kam kán-mar-ta li-mu-um a-šùr-sipa
english: month ix, eponymy of assur-re'i, son of ili-emuqi.

akkadian: dumu ì-lí-e-mu-qí i-nu-mì kù.babbar áš-qú-lu e-na-a-šùr ú a-mur-{d}utu dumu
english: when i paid the silver ennam-assur and amur-samas, son of ili-pi-usur, acted as beru.

akkadian: ili₅-pì-ú-ṣur be-ru-ú i-zi-zu igi a-šur-ma-lik igi sú-kà-li-a igi ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šur
english: in the presence of assur-malik, of sukkaliya, of mannum-balum-assur.

akkadian: šu-ma kù.babbar-pì i-ma-šu-hu té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma úz-ni pí-tí 1
english: send me a message if they try to rob me of my silver and keep me informed.

akkadian: a-na ku-zi-zi-a lá-qé-ep ù a-na-a-na qí-bi-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na a-na-a-na qí-bi-ma lá-ma a-na kà-tí-lá a-li-ku 5 na-ru-uq
english: to kuziziya, lā-qēp and anna-anna from ennam-aššur; to anna-anna: before i went to katila i left you 5 sacks of wheat and 2 sacks of barley in addition.

akkadian: gig ú 2 na-ru-uq še-am e-lá-nu-ma e-zi-ba-ki-im a-ha-ma 17 na-ru-uq
english: further, they carted 17 sacks 2 jars of wheat and 17 sacks 2 jars of barley from tumliya.

akkadian: 2 dug gig ú 17 na-ru-uq 2 dug še-am
english: all the grain plus the silver from the natives my father had designated for me.

akkadian: iš-tù tù-um-li-a iš-du-du-nim mì-ma ú-ṭí-tim ú kù.babbar
english: urgent, do not open it up for the lady and give her nothing.

akkadian: ša nu-a-e a-bi i-a-tí-ma e-ta-aṣ-ra-am
english: also, i sent her directions with ewarimuša.

akkadian: a-pu-tum a-na a-wi-il₅-tim lá ta-pá-ṭí-ri ú mì-ma lá ta-dí-ni-ší-im ú iš-tí e-wa-ri-mu-ša
english: my dear brothers, instruct her there so that there will be no wrongdoing in my storeroom to make me unhappy.

akkadian: ta-hi-tám áš-pu-ur-ší-im a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-ma-kam
english: do place my tablets and furniture under guard.

akkadian: na-hi-da-ší-ma i-na hu-ur-ší-a ší-lá-tum lá i-ba-ší-ma li-bi
english: inform me how much grain was spent for the mourning-ritual.

akkadian: lá i-ma-ra-aṣ ṭup-pí-a ú ú-tù-up-tí lu tù-ša-ṣí-ir ma-lá
english: until my brother reveals to me my father's assets i shall be delayed.

akkadian: ú-ṭù-tum a-bi-ki-tim i-gi₅-im-ru úz-ni pí-té-a a-dí bu-lá-tí ša a-bi-a
english: before i came ali-ahum had opened the strong-room and even taken out the assets.

akkadian: kišib e-la-lí dumu i-ku-nim kišib ša-lim-a-hi-im dumu dan-a-šur kišib en-na-sú-en₆ dumu sú-kà-lí-a kišib i-dí-a-šur dumu a-šur-ma-lik ša 1 ma-na 1.5 gín i-ṣé-er dingir-šu-gal dumu
english: seal of elalī, son of ikūnum, seal of šalim-ahum, son of dān-aššur, seal of ennam-suen, son of sukkalliya, seal of iddin-aššur, son of aššur-mālik, that ilšu-rabi, son of bulāli, owes 1 mina 1.5 shekel of silver to elamma.

akkadian: bu-la-lí e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù itu.kam áb-ša-ra-ni li-mì-im
english: from month v?, eponymy of šu-hubur? he will pay within 3 months.

akkadian: kà-ri-im ú-ṣa-áb kù.babbar iš-ri-iq-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš a-na šu-šál-šum i-dí-šu
english: he had stolen silver and the colony had convicted him to (pay) the triple.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na ni-qé igi ku-bi-a igi a-šur-pí-lá-ah
english: witnessed by kūbiya (and) aššur-pilah son of amur-aššur.

akkadian: ku-ku-ra-nim a-dí-in igi kàr-ri-a ša é sú-kà-li-a
english: witnessed by karriya from the family of sukkalliya.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma a-hi a-ta eb-ri a-ta ú a-ta ki-ma a-hi-ú-tim
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: althought you are my brother and friend, as if we were strangers you do not inform me.

akkadian: a-mì-ú-tim a-ta-kà-al ki-ma a-na-ku a-na tí-ir-tí-kà na-hi-da-ku-ni ù a-ta a-na tí-ir-tí-a lá ta-hi-id
english: although i personally pay attention to your instructions, you have not paid attention to my instructions.

akkadian: <gap> a-dí ha-am-ší-šu tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-kum
english: my instructions have come to you five times!

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša 12 ma-na <gap>-ba-tim <gap> a-na-ku we-da-ku <gap> i-dí
english: the tablet concerning 12 minas of silver <gap> i am alone. <gap> have <gap> paid.

akkadian: <gap> ša-áš-qí-il₅ ki-ma ṭup-pá-am ta-áš-me-ú kù.babbar ša-qí-il₅ lá ša-qí-il₅ tí-ir-ta-kà a-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na
english: as you hear the letter send me word to wahšušana whether or not the silver is paid, and pay the goods.

akkadian: dumu puzur₄-a-na igi a-du-du-wa dumu en-na-ma-nim igi en-na-sú-in dumu i-tur₄-dingir igi šu-a-nim dumu šu-sú-in
english: witnessed by anah-ilī son of puzur-anna, by aduduwa son of ennam-anum, by ennau-suen son of itūr-ilī, by šu-anum son of šu-suen.

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-ba-ni-ma a-na šu-pé-e-nu-ma-an um-mì-iš-ha-ra a-ší-tí-šu ú ha-nu qí-bi₄-ma a-wa-tim lá dam-qá-tim
english: from aššur-bāni to šuppi-numan, ummī-išhara, his wife and hanu: i have heard words that were not good but diminishing.

akkadian: ma-áš-ha-tim áš-me a-pu-tum a-ma-kam é bé-tám ù ṭup-pé-e
english: it is urgent that you guard the house, the tablets and anything else there!

akkadian: ú-lu mì-ma-a-ma ša-ṣí-ra šu-ma a-<gap> a <gap> a-šùr-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ ú a-šur-sipa mì-ma-ša-ma lu ṭup-pè-e e-ri-šu-ku-nu
english: if a<gap>, aššur-muttabbil or aššur-rē’ī asks you for anything, also tablets, then it is imperative that you do not give them anything!

akkadian: a-pu-tum lá ta-da-na-šu-nu-šu a ma-lá ha-nu ša-hu-zu-ni 1 gín.ta ma-lá ṭup-pè-e
english: as hanu has been instructed, every shekel that he receives in accordance with the tablets is hanu’s share.

akkadian: i-lá-qé-ú qá-sú
english: do not hold it back!

akkadian: ša ha-nu
english: let him receive it.

akkadian: lá ta-kà-lá-a li-il₅-qé ú šu-ma kà-lá ṭup-pè-e e-ri-iš-ku-nu lá ta-kà-lá-a-šu
english: also, if he demands all the tablets from you, then do not hold him back but let him take them.

akkadian: li-il₅-qé ṭup-pá-am ša ni-pì-il₅-tí be-lá-nim dumu šu-a-šur ša a-na um-mì-ni e-zi-bu ha-nu a pá-ni-a
english: as for the tablet concerning the balance payment of bēlānum son of šu-aššur that i left for our mother, hanu should bring that to me.

akkadian: lu-ub-lá-šu a-pu-tum ša-ṣí-ra-ma
english: it is urgent that you stand guard!

akkadian: ṭup-pè-e qá-tí ha-nu li-iṣ-ba-at
english: as for the tablets, let hanu take them!

akkadian: ṭup-pè-e qá-tí a-sà-nim dumu šu-hu-bur ú a-he-e-a e iṣ-ba-at-ma é a-bi₄-ni a-na a-wa-tim e
english: he must not take the tablets in the hands of asānum son of šu-hubur or my brothers and you must not set our father’s house up for a lawsuit.

akkadian: ta-dí-a eṭ-lúm lá
english: the young man is no good.

akkadian: sig₅ ih-da-ma ša-ṣí-ra
english: take care and stand guard!

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma ší-im an-ni-ki-kà a-dí a-na-ku a-na
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: as to the price for your tin, before i arrived at šalatuwar the silver was not paid.

akkadian: i-na ša ṭup-pí-šu 4 ma-na kù.babbar
english: the silver should pass overland in the name of šukkutum to kanesh.

akkadian: šu-kà-tám ú-ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu ku-nu-ki ša šu-ki-tim šu-hu-bur na-áš-a-kum gán-lam₅ a-šu-mì šu-ki-tim a-dí kà-ni-iš{ki}
english: total of your silver, both the proceeds from the tin and that from šukkutum, 15 minas 12 shekels of silver, šu-hubur brings to you.

akkadian: lu ša šu-ki-tim 15 ma-na
english: silver for purchases and he <gap> set down with šu-hubur.

akkadian: a-na en-um-a-šùr qí-bi-ma um-ma a-na-na-ma iš-tù a-bu-kà me-tù a-hu-kà a-na a-lim{ki} ṭup-pá-am ú-šé-bi-lá-ma mì-ma ú-nu-tám i-na é a-bi-kà i-ba-ší-ú i-na qá-at a-hi-kà a-na ki-dim tù-uš-té-ṣí a-ta a-na ú-nu-tim ša
english: to ennam-aššur from anna-anna: after your father died your brother sent a letter to the city and all the goods that were in your father's house you / she brought outside into your brother's hands.

akkadian: qá-at-kà ik-šu-du a-ta ki-ma ša-zu-úz-tám tù-ša-zi-zu-ú pá-al-ha-ku-ma mì-ma ú-lá e-pá-áš ù mì-šu ša ta-áš-ta-na-pá-ra-ni um-ma a-ta-ma a-na <gap>
english: as for you, for the goods that you got hold of - since you yourself appointed an agent, i am afraid and shall do nothing.

akkadian: na <gap> tí-ni <gap> 1 ma-na ú-lu 2 ma-na <gap> a-ta we-dí-kà <gap> tí-<gap> ma-a-ma we-dí-kà-ma a-na a-bi₄-kà lá-am-da-tí ù
english: also, why do you constantly write to me, saying: for <gap> 1 or 2 minas <gap> you alone <gap> and you alone have been for your father.

akkadian: ri-ik-sà-am ša tù-šé-bi₄-lá-ni i-na ṭup-pí-kà a-na <gap> lá <gap> lá-pí-it <gap> 0.3333 ma-na <gap> a-na bi₄-ki-tim i-dí-nu i-na wa-ar-ki-tim <gap> tí
english: also, as to the bundle that you sent me, in your letter - <gap> was written <gap> 0.3333 mina of silver they paid for the mourning ceremony.

akkadian: 22 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im
english: iddin-abum owes 22 minas 10 shekels of refined silver to aššur-malik.

akkadian: a-šur-ma-lik i-šu a-na a-lá-ak
english: he is to pay before šu-illil arrives.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb igi a-šur-e-mu-qí igi en-nam-a-šur dumu me-na-a
english: witnessed by aššur-emūqī, by ennam-aššur s. of menaya.

akkadian: a-šur-iš-ta-kál i-šu itu.kam ku-zal-le li-mu-um
english: month kuzallu, eponymy aššur-imittī, the skipper.

akkadian: a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-hu-um a-na 3 itu.kam i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: he is to pay within 3 months; if he has not paid (in time) he shall add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb kù.babbar a-le-e
english: he is to pay the silver wherever we meet.

akkadian: ni-na-mu-ru-ú i-ša-qal igi ṣí-lu-šu-da-ga-an dumu ištar-pí-lá-ah igi a-lá-hi-im dumu ša-lim-a-šur
english: witnessed by ṣilluš-dagān son of ištar-pilah, by ali-ahum son of šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-ba-ku-um itu.kam qá-ra-tim li-mu-um en-na-sú-in dumu
english: month viii, year eponymy of ennam-suen, son of šu-ištar.

akkadian: šu-ištar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um hu-ra-ma i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur
english: for these words the hurama colony made us available and before aššur's dagger we gave our testimony.

akkadian: a-ta-tí-a igi a-hu-wa-qar igi a-šur-{d}utu
english: in the presence of atatiya, of ahu-waqar, of aššur-šamšī.

akkadian: šu-ma-a šu.nígin 9 ṭup-pu-ú i-na ta-ma-lá-ki-im ša i-ša-sú-ú ta-ba-ku-tum
english: in all 9 tablets in a tablet box, to be read (and) thrown away(?).

akkadian: ha-bu-lu a-na ša-pár-tim ú-kà-al be-lí a-ta kù.babbar a-na šu-a-šùr šu-qú-ul-ma ṭup-pì
english: my dear lord, pay the silver to šu-aššur, get out my tablet and let it be with you.

akkadian: šé-ṣí-ma iš-tí-kà li-ib-ší-ú ù té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma
english: also, send me word so i can set out and leave.

akkadian: lá-at-bi₄-a-ma lá-tal-kam ù a-dí ṭup-pì-im ša {d}utu-ba-ni a-dí ma-lá ù ší-ni-šu ni-gi₅-ri-ma ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ṭup-pá-am
english: also, with respect to šamaš-bāni's tablet we sued both once and twice, but your representatives refuse to give the tablet.

akkadian: ta-da-nam lá i-mu-ú té-er-ta-kà a-ṣé-er ša ki-ma
english: send word to your (representatives <gap>)

akkadian: igi a-zu-ta-a dumu e-me-me igi ì-dí-ba-ni dumu ir-ma-a-šur
english: in the presence of azutāya, son of ememê, of idi-bāni, son of ir'am-aššur.

akkadian: šu-a-tí a-na é li-mì-im dí-ni kù.babbar a-ni-um é
english: give that silver to the office of the this silver was in elamma's house.

akkadian: e-lá-ma ib-ší 2 ṣí-il₅-a-nu ša ṭup-pé-e ku-nu-ku ša a-he-ki
english: there are still two ṣ-containers with tablets sealed by your brothers and mother.

akkadian: ù um-mì-ki i-ba-ší-ú pá-al-ha-ni-ma pá-ṭá-ra-am ú-lá
english: we did not dare to open them because we were afraid.

akkadian: ni-mu-wa lá ta-áš-ta-na-me-i ki-ma um-mì-ki iš-tù 10 ša-na-tim nu-a-um ah-zu-ma i-na é nu-a-im wa-áš-ba-at-ni
english: have you not heard that the anatolian is since ten years married to your mother and that she lived in the house of the anatolian?

akkadian: 15 ma-na urudu ma-sí-a-am i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-na ṣé-er ú-na-bi₄
english: unabi and ašiat owe 15 minas of washed copper, weighed with our stones, to luzi.

akkadian: ú a-ší-a-at lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-mu-ru-um-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da
english: reckoned from the week of amurrum-bāni and aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks.

akkadian: a-na 4 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám
english: if they have not paid (in time), they must add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: ú-ṣú-bu i-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim urudu-am i-ša-qú-lu
english: they must pay the copper in purušhaddum.

akkadian: itu.kam hu-bu-ur li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
english: month hubur, eponymy iddin-abum.

akkadian: igi i-dí-a-bi₄-im dumu i-tur₄-dingir
english: witnessed by iddin-abum son of itūr-ilī.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: before i came your tin was sold.

akkadian: i-ba-ší ki-ma
english: do not get angry.

akkadian: i-na a-li-ki
english: the silver is ready.

akkadian: dumu um-me-a-nim ša kù.babbar
english: within 5 days šu-hubur has promised to leave.

akkadian: 10 ma-na na-áš-ú lá-šu-ma
english: we shall send you your silver with šu-hubur.

akkadian: a ší-a-tí kù.babbar ni-ik-lá li-ba-kà mì-ma lá
english: i made šukkutum pay 4 minas of silver from what was in his certified tablet.

akkadian: um-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ma a-na a-li-ki qí-bi-ma a-na-kam sú-en₆-sig₅ im-hu-ur-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma li-ip-ta-num dumu qar-da-a ú-ta-ra-am a-na ta-ú-ri-šu ma-aṣ-a-ku du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr ší-pár-ni
english: thus the kanesh colony, say to the travelers: here suen-damiq has appealed to us and he said: 'i want liptānum, son of qardaya, to be brought back; i take responsibility for bringing him back'. ṭāb-šilli-aššur is our messenger.

akkadian: iš-tí du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr li-tù-ra-am
english: he must come back with ṭāb-ṣilli-aššur.

akkadian: a-tù-nu lu e-mu-uq-šu
english: you must be his executive force.""

akkadian: dumu i-ku-nim ṣí-ib-tám ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im kà-né-eš ú-ṣa-áb
english: he will add interest according to the regulation of of the kanesh colony.

akkadian: i-na 21 túg ša ša-lim-be-lí ú a-šur-pí-lá-ah na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí-ni 1 túg ša a-ki-dí-e a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí dí-na
english: of the 21 textiles that šalim-bēlī and aššur-pilah bring to you give 1 akkadian textile to ištar-lamassī.

akkadian: i-na ša-am-ší ṭup-pí ta-ša-me-a-ni túg ú-ma-kál lá ta-kà-lá a-na a-lá-hi-im
english: the very day you hear my letter do not hold back the textile a single day.

akkadian: qí-bi-ma <gap> a-na qá-tí ú-ku dí-in <gap>-nu ku-nu-ki-a
english: to ali-ahum: <gap> give <gap> to uku <gap> under my seal.

akkadian: a-šu-mì ša hu-lu-qá-e
english: for the matter of the losses.

akkadian: a-na-ku ku-ra ù šu-ištar ni-pá-hu-ur-ma iš-té-ni-iš a-na pí-lá-ah-ištar dumu ú-zu-a a-wa-tám ni-da-an igi lá-qé-ep
english: i, kura <and> šu-ištar will come together and together we will address pilah-ištar, son of uzua, with lā-qēp, ememe and aššur-idī as witnesses.

akkadian: igi e-me-me igi a-šur-i-dí šu-ma ib-tù-a-ni-a-tí iš-tí-ni i-ra-ba-áš
english: should he prevail over us, then he can present his claim together with us.

akkadian: ta-dí šu.nígin 3 ma-na šu-mì ku-ni-lim é kà-ri-im lá-pí-it
english: in all 3.5 minas have been booked in kūn-ilum's name in the colonial office.

akkadian: igi iš-ma-{d}iškur igi bu-za-zu
english: witnessed by išme-adad, by buzāzu.

akkadian: a-na a-dí-dá a-lá-hi-im ú ú-ku qí-bi₄-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-šùr-ma 13 túg ku-nu-ki-a ša e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí-ni 20 ku-ta-ni sig₅ ša-lim-be-lí ub-lá-ku-nu-tí šu.nígin 33 túg a-na ú-ku pì-iq-dá-ma a-na dur₄-hu-mì-it
english: to adida, ali-ahum and uku from puzur-aššur: as to the 13 textiles under my seal that i left with you, šalim-bēli brought you (further) 20 good - in all entrust 33 textiles to uku and have him bring them to durhumit.

akkadian: lu-ub-lam 4 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-a
english: uku brings 4 minas of tin under my seal.

akkadian: ú-ku na-ší šu-ma anše i-ha-ša-ah
english: if he wants a donkey, then buy one for him.

akkadian: ša-ma-šu-um a-pu-tum lá i-sà-hu-ur
english: urgent, he must not delay, send him!

akkadian: ṭur₄-da-ni-šu a-na ú-ku qí-bi₄-ma lá aq-bi₄-a-ku-um
english: to uku: did i not speak to you about not delaying?

akkadian: lá sà-ha-ra-am sà-ha-ar-tí na-áp-ra-ṣa-am ú maš-ki ša-pá-tí-a lá té-zi-ba-am
english: you shall not leave my small goods, a chisel and my woolen fleeces.

akkadian: am-tám ku-uk-ra ša {d}utu-a-bi dumu zu-za-nim iš-tí ṣú-ha-ri-im ša ha-da-i-kur a-lá-hi-nim ša-lim-a-šur dumu ip-hu-ri-im iš-a-am ha-ma-am ma-ah-ri-ni
english: the slave-girl kukra, which šamaš-abī, son of zuzānum, <had acquired?> from the boy of hada'ikur, the, ? šallim-aššur, son of iphurum, has bought.

akkadian: ib-tù-uq <gap> a-na a-wa-tim
english: he cut off the stalk in our presence.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni
english: for these words the durhumit colony gave us and before aššur's dagger we gave our testimony.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi lá-ba-lá-da dumu i-dí-sú-en₆ igi na-áb-sú-en₆ dumu šu-be-lim igi i-dí-ištar dumu i-dí-a-bi₄-im igi puzur₄.ištar dumu dan-a-šur
english: in the presence of labān-nādā, son of iddin-suen, of nabi-suen, son of šu-bēlum, of iddin-ištar, son of iddin-abum, of puzur-ištar, son of dān-aššur.

akkadian: šu-ha-ni-iš a-dí-na-kum um-ma a-ta-ma 3 túg ša
english: you said: 'i will bring up for you from the city 3 akkadian garments for children'.

akkadian: a-ni-ša-am lá té-ta-ar-ba-am ha-ra-kà ta-ta-lá-ak a-hi a-ta be-lí a-ta 3
english: please my brother, my lord, give these three garments for children that you brought up (from assur) to kuliya.

akkadian: a-na-ku-ma zi-ra-am a-na ma-ma-i-im
english: it is now two years that you manage my silver.

akkadian: um-ma en-na-sú-in-ma a-na en-um-a-šùr qí-bi₄-ma a-hi a-ta a-ma-kam tí-ir-tí a-ṣé-er i-tur₄-dingir i-li-kam a-dí a-wa-tim ša ma-šu-ha-ku-ni ù a-ta a-na i-tur₄-dingir pu-nu-ma ú i-na ša-ha-tí-šu i-zi-iz-ma šu-ma a-wa-tum i-sí-ú i-zi <gap> šu-ma
english: from enna-suen to ennam-aššur: my dear brother, my message came to itūr-ilī there concerning the matter where i have been treated badly.

akkadian: lá i-<gap>-ší <gap> me-et ni <gap> me <gap> i-<gap> um-ma <gap> le-qé-a-ma <gap> lá a-na <gap> ba-lá-ṭí <gap> i <gap> gi-mì-lam <gap> i-na ṣé-ri-a šu-ku-un
english: you too should turn to itūr-ilī and assist him, and if they have called a lawsuit <gap> do me a great favour.

akkadian: a-lá+lá-<gap> igi du-um-qí-a dumu a <gap> ša ku-zu-za-ri-im ù a-lá-hi-im <gap>
english: witnessed by ṭāb-aššur son of al<gap>, by dumqiya son of <gap> concerning kuzuzārum and ali-ahum.

akkadian: 2 gín kù.ki ku-pu-ur-ší-ni-in sig₅ i-ṣé-er im-lik-a-šùr
english: 2 shekels of -gold of fine quality imlik-aššur owes to ir'am-aššur.

akkadian: ir-ma-a-šur i-šu iš-tù ha-ir-uš-tim ša e-dí-na-a
english: from the week of edināya he will pay within 15 weeks.

akkadian: a-na 15 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá ìš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: if he does not pay he will add (interest) in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam qá-ra-a-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí
english: month viii, year eponymy of elālī, son of ikūnum.

akkadian: dumu i-ku-nim igi pí-lá-ah-a-šur dumu da-nu-um-ì-lí igi a-šur-ma-lik dumu a-zu-za
english: in the presence of pilah-aššur, son of dannum-ilī, of aššur-mālik, son of azuza.

akkadian: um-ma i-na-a a-na zu-zu ú puzur₄-a-šùr qí-bi₄-ma a-na zu-zu qí-bi₄-ma ṭup-pá-kà ha-ar-ma-am ša 0.6666
english: from innaya to zuzu and puzur-aššur; to zuzu: i hold your certified tablet here concerning 0.6666 mina of silver.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar a-na-kam ú-kà-al a-hi a-ta
english: my dear brother, buṣānum represents me there.

akkadian: a-ma-kam bu-za-num ki-ma i-a-tí kù.babbar a-na bu-za-nim dí-in-ma ša ki-ma ku-wa-tí šu-up-ra-ma
english: give the silver to buṣānum and write to your representatives that they should seize your tablet.

akkadian: 15 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er ma-lá-wa-áš-he
english: 15 shekels of silver malawašhe owes to the creditor.

akkadian: a-na ša-na-at ta-ša-qal šu-ma i-ma-lá u₄-me-ša lá ta-áš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im
english: if she has not paid when her term is over she will add interest in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám tù-ṣa-áb igi i-dí-a-bi₄-im
english: in the presence of iddin-abum.

akkadian: a-na a-dí-da a-la-hi-im ú ù-ku-ú qí-bi₄-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-šùr-ma i-na 21 ṣú-ba-tí ša li-bi₄-ni ub-la-ni 1 ṣú-ba-ta-am ša a-ki-dí-i a-na ištar-la-ma-sí a-ša-at
english: to adida, ali-ahum and uku from puzur-aššur: of the 21 textiles in our posession that he brought give 1 akkadian textile to ištar-lamassī, ali-ahum's wife.

akkadian: a-la-hi-im dí-na 4 ma-na an.na-ku-um ku-nu-ki-a
english: uku brings you 4 minas of tin under my seal.

akkadian: ú-ku-ú na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí an.na-kam a-na ší-mì-im dí-na-ma šu-ma e-ma-ra-am
english: sell the tin and buy him a donkey if he has asked for one.

akkadian: ih-ta-ša-ah ša-ma-šu-um ṣú-ba-tí-ša ša li-bi₄-ni ub-la-ni 13 ṣú-ba-tí ša e-zi-bu-ú ku-nu-ki-a a-na ú-ku-ú dí-na-ma lu-ub-la-am i-na 4 ma-na an.na-ki-im
english: as to her textiles in our possession that he brought, the 13 textiles that they left, give them to uku under my seal so he may bring them.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma hu-na-hu-na a-na-ah-dingir
english: to kuliya, thus says hunahuna: anah-ilī and puzur-aššur came here.

akkadian: bi-lá-nim-ma kù.babbar li-qí-a dub a-na-ku lá a-mu-a ú-šu-ra-am um-ma en-na-na-tum ri-ig-ma-am lá ni-na-dí dumu i-na-a lá i-ša-me-e ni-ip-lá-ah-ma e-na-na-tum ú a-na-ku hu-ur-šam
english: ennānātum said: "we will not file a complaint lest innaya's son hears about it." since we became afraid, ennānātum and i myself, we opened the storeroom and took out of your tablet coffer the tablet with his seal, which we gave him.

akkadian: ni-ip-té-e-ma i-na ta-ma-lá-ki-kà ṭup-pá-am ša
english: the 1 mina 6 shekels of silver i have in my possession.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-šu nu-šé-li-ma ni-dí-šu-um 1 ma-na 6 gín kù.babbar a-na-ku
english: since he did not give me your two letters i also did not release to him the tablet of aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: ú-kà-al 2 na-áš-pè-ra-tí-kà lá i-dí-nam
english: not one of your representatives came into action.

akkadian: ú a-na-ku dub ša a-šur-du₁₀ lá ú-šé-er-šu-um ma-ma-an i-na ša-zu-za-tí-kà lá i-zi-iz iš-tù ṣú-ha-ru-ú i-li-ku-ni-ni ur-ki kù.babbar
english: when the servants had come here, they were looking for the silver of ennānātum, but he had absolutely nothing available (and) he was unable to give even 1 single shekel of silver.

akkadian: e-na-na-tim i-sà-hu-ru-ú
english: it is now up to you.

akkadian: mì-ma i qá-tí-šu lá i-ba-ší 1 gín kù.babbar
english: i myself obtained 4 shekels of silver (and) i (also) took 2.3333 shekels of samaya.

akkadian: ta-da-nam lá i-le-e ma-lá-kà 4 gín kù.babbar a-na-ku al-qé
english: i myself will use that silver for buying salt and then they can make themselves ready and depart.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-sà-num-ma a-ma-a dam-qá-tù-šu ša al-pì-lí ša i-na té-ga-ra-ma ú-ta-mì-ú pa-ar-sà-ti-kà a-wa-tim u-šé-ṣí-i ú šu-um-ka sig₅ ṭá-pu-ul
english: to kuliya, thus says asānum: really, this is the friendliness of alpilī whom i made swear an oath in tegarama - he has disclosed confidential matters of you, and also your good reputation has been besmirched and i have been besmirched together with you!

akkadian: a-ta lá ta-qá-bi um-ma a-ta-ma i-qí-in-im
english: for the rumors i keep hearing, for these matters god be my witness against alpilī!

akkadian: ma-di-iš li-bi-i im-ra-aṣ a-na
english: of the two <gap> kuliya will marry one as a fine wife.

akkadian: a-wa-tim ša a-áš-ta-me-ú a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim
english: of / with the <gap> if your maid, all of them(fem.) she will bring to you.

akkadian: <gap> 2-ší-ta a-ša-tám da-mì-iq-tám ku-li-a e-ha-az
english: and because he gave her nothing they keep looking for <gap> and she is very angry.

akkadian: i-na <gap> am-tí-kà ka-lá-ší-na-ma tù-ba-lá-ku-um li-ba-kà lá i-na-hi-id e-lá-an 3 gín kù.babbar mì-ma wa-at-ra-am lá i-dí-ší-im
english: because of these matters which alpilī told her, when i had arrived for five days she refused to talk with me. <gap> i arrived here she was staying in the and both my hands are placed on the <gap> of her head.

akkadian: ú ša a-da-<gap>-tim mì-ma lá i-dí-ší-im
english: if i had not arrived at short term we would have been seriously denunciated.

akkadian: ú a-ma-tum ra-qá-ma uš-ba ú
english: she has caused me a lot of trouble until you met her personally.

english: iddin-aššur is liable for the settlement of accounts.

akkadian: i-dí-a-šùr a-na ni-kà-sí kà-ší-id iš-tù 5 ša-na-tim a-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na ú dur₄-hu-mi-it
english: since five years we keep sending messages to him to wahšušana and durhumit, but until this very day he holds us in play.

akkadian: ni-iš-ta-pár-šu-ma a-di u₄-mì-im a-nim i-ta-ba-al-ni-a-tí a-ma-kam
english: make him pay the silver over there his datum for a full share.

akkadian: kù.babbar da-a-sú ša ga-me-er-tim ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma i-qá-bi₄ um-ma
english: if he objects and says: i cannot match the full amount, make him pay for half the amount.

akkadian: kišib šu-nu-nu dumu a-mur-ištar kišib zi-ki-ki dumu a-šur-sipa kišib a-bu-ša-lim dumu puzur₄.ištar 6
english: seal of šu-nūnu son of amur-ištar, seal of zikiki son of aššur-rē'ī, seal of abu-šalim son of puzur-ištar.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-bu-ša-lim i-ri-šum i-šu
english: abu-šalim owes 6 shekels of refined silver to irišum.

akkadian: a-na bu-qú-nim i-ša-qal šu-ma
english: he will pay at the shearing.

akkadian: kišib a-šur-e-mu-qí kišib en-nam-a-šùr dumu me-na-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im
english: seal of aššur-emūqī, seal of ennam-aššur s. of menaya, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú
english: his term has expired.

akkadian: um-ma a-dí-da-ma ù a-lá-hu-um-ma a-na lá-ma-sí qí-bi-ma mì-šu ša iš-tù
english: from adida and ali-ahum to lamassī: why is it that although we have been writing for both one and two years, yet you are not able to reach a solution to the affair of our father's house?

akkadian: ša-na-at ù ší-ta ša-na-at ni-iš-ta-na-pá-ra-ni-ma
english: and if the angents who support you pay no attention to our messages, are there no others instead of them?

akkadian: ša é a-bi-ni kà-ša-dam ú-lá ta-le-e-a-ni
english: here itūr-ilī blocks the gate of the colony like a lion and we are incapable of setting witnesses for the man.

akkadian: ša i-na ša-ha-tí-ki
english: we wait for a tablet from the city and an attorney.

akkadian: a-na i-sú-ri-ik qí-bi-ma um-ma šál-ma-a-šùr-ma 15 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú i-na li-bi lu-qú-tí-kà ša šé-ep pu-šu-ki-in ili₅-ba-ni
english: to issu-arik from šalim-aššur: ilī-bāni brought you 15 minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, (the proceeds) from your goods transported by pūšu-kēn.

akkadian: a-ni a-lá-hu-um iš-pu-ra-am um-ma šu-ut-ma šu-ma i-na ša a-bi₄ i-dí-na-ku-ni mì-ma i li-bi₄-kà i-ší-a-at a-na a-hi-a lá
english: also, now ali-ahum wrote to me, saying: if any of what my father gave to you remains in your possession, do not release it to my brother.

akkadian: tù-ša-ar šu-ma tù-ta-šé-er a-na-ku ú a-ha-tí a-na a-wa-tim ni-šé-e-kà ú ša ki-ma šu-wa-tí ší-bi₄ iš-ku-nu-nim
english: if you release it, then i and my sister will sue you in the matter."also, his representatives have set witnesses against me."

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im ù a-ni-na qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šùr-ma-lik-ma 8.6666 ma-na kù ku-nu-ki-a ú-ṣur-ša-a-šùr dumu a-ta-ta
english: to ali-ahum and annina from aššur-malik: uṣur-ša-aššur son of atata brings you 8.6666 minas of silver under my seal.

akkadian: na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí kù.babbar a-dí a-lá-kà-ni a-šar a-lá-hi-im li-ib-ší
english: the silver should remain with ali-ahum until i arrive.

akkadian: ú-lá i-šu-ú igi en-na-sú-in dumu
english: in the presence of ennam-suen, son of aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: a-šur-du₁₀ a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bu-tí-a a-dí-in sí-li-ištar tap-pá-i
english: for these words the wahšušana colony gave us and before aššur's dagger i gave the tablet with my testimony. ṣilli-ištar was my fellow witness.

akkadian: ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um
english: month vii, year-eponymy of abiya, son of šu-dagan.

akkadian: a-bi₄-a dumu šu-da-ga-an a-ha-ma ṭup-pu-um ha-ar-mu-um ša be-ú-lá-ti-šu
english: separately, there still exists a valid record of his working capital.

akkadian: i-ba-ší a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-ìš a-lim{ki} nu-ta-mì-šu-nu
english: we made them swear an oath by the city for these words.

akkadian: iš-tù en-um-a-šur me-tù-ú 2 ma-na 15 gín kù.babbar a-ba-ba ra-bi-ṣú-um il₅-qé
english: after ennam-aššur died the attorney ababa received 2 minas 15 shekels of silver.

akkadian: itu.kam ku-zal-li li-mu-um en-na-sú-in dumu šu-a-šur
english: month, eponymy enna-suen son of šu-aššur.

akkadian: igi e-na-ah-dingir dumu šu-a-šur igi a-dí-da dumu ìr-ad-i-li-šu igi id-na-a
english: witnessed by enah-ilī son of šu-aššur, by adida son of warad-ilišu, by idnaya.

akkadian: ku-un-kà-ma a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí pí-iq-da ú i-ša-qá-al kù.babbar ki-ma
english: also, when the silver is paid set witnesses to prove that the wool is mine.

akkadian: ša-áp-tum i-a-tù-ni ší-be šu-uk-na ù ša-áp-tám a-na ša-lim-wa-ar-dí ù ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a sà-ni-qá-ma ma-lá ša-áp-tám i-za-ku-a-ni ší-bé-e šu-uk-na-šu-nu-tí ki-ma ša-áp-tum
english: also, check the wool for šalim-wardī and mannum-kī-iliya, and set witnesses for them about how much wool is cleared, stating that the wool and 7 donkeys belong to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: en-um-a-šur a-lá-hu-um iš-a-al um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im-ma e-ni-ma-ma na-áš-pé-er-tum ku-nu-ki-kà igi 3 ší-be ú-kà-lim-kà-ma tù-kà-i-ni-ma šu-nu-tí-ma ni-ip-qí-sú a-ma a-we-lu
english: ennam-aššur questioned ali-ahum, and ennam-aššur said as follows to ali-ahum: now here i have shown you the missive sealed by you in front of 3 witnesses, and you have confirmed it and we have entrusted it to them.

akkadian: a-ni-ú-tum li-iš-me-ú a-ma ta-ah-sí-sá-tù-ni ku-nu-ku-ú-a ú ku-nu-ku-kà i-ki-ir ú-lá kà-i-in ša
english: now, may these men listen - confirm or deny our memorandum with my seal and your seal, that you and i settled accounts and settled.

akkadian: ni-kà-sí a-na-ku ú a-ta ni-sí-ú-ma ni-iz-ku-ú lá tù-na-ha-ni a-lá-hu-um
english: do not obstruct me!" ali-ahum answered ennam-aššur, saying: "it is the memoranda with your seal and my seal.

akkadian: en-um-a-šur e-pu-ul um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma ta-ah-sí-sá-tum ku-nu-ku-kà ú ku-nu-ku-ú-a ba-am 3
english: come on, let us seize three men and let us settle in accordance with the memoranda that are sealed with our seals.

akkadian: a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak a-ma me-eh-ra-at dub ša-ni-im ú i ma-ah-ri-a-ma a-ba-ba ra-bi₄-ṣa-am
english: he among you who says as follows: i shall pay the silver, he will assist the attorney, and he shall make the one who has not paid pay.

akkadian: ni-iṣ-ba-da-kum ša i-na ba-ri-ku-nu i-qá-bi₄-ú um-ma
english: your representatives turned to me and said: the man is your colleague.

akkadian: ip-nu-ú-ni-ma um-ma šu-nu-ma a-wi-lu-um a-hu-kà kù.babbar a-na ig-ri
english: my dear brother, send to me personally 0.5 mina of silver with the first express caravan.

akkadian: 15 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu ku-nu-ki-a a-na {d}iškur-pì-lá-ah dumu a-ni-nim áp-qí-id
english: 15 shekels of silver its excise added, his transport fee paid, under my seal i entrusted to adad-pilah, son of anīnum.

akkadian: igi šu-ištar dumu šu-ki-tim igi a-šur-ma-lik dumu ša-ba-ha-nim
english: in the presence of šukutum (and) of aššur-mālik, son of šabahānum.

akkadian: kišib a-la-bi-im dumu sú-li-a kišib ki-li-a dumu en-na-nim
english: seal of ali-abum son of ṣuliya, seal of kiliya son of ennānum.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša igi gír
english: tablet from before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ša {d}a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony.

akkadian: a-na e-la-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-na-ma a-la-nu-kà a-ba-am
english: say to elamma, thus puzur-anna: i have no father and lord but you!

english: i cannot travel to make purchases (for you), i must travel for an order of our paternal house.

akkadian: a té-er-tí é a-bi₄-ni a-la-ak um-ma a-na-ku-ma i-kà-lá-a-ni-ma bi₄-il₅-tám ú-ša-ša-a-ni a-ki-am la
english: i thought: 'he might detain me and force me to carry a load (for him)' (and) for that reason i did not turn up with you.

akkadian: uš-ta-mi-er iš-tí-kà iš-tí lu-qú-tí-kà pá-ni-e-ma a-<gap>-re-a-am
english: but with your next lot of merchandise i will <gap>""

akkadian: igi a-šùr-i-mì-tí dumu du-dí-ki igi tù-ur-a-šùr dumu ú-zu-a igi en-na-sú-in
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī son of dudiki, by tūr-aššur son of uzuwa, by enna-suen.

akkadian: kišib ú-ra-a dumu ma-na-na kišib ì-lí-dan dumu i-dí-a-šur kišib ma-nu-um-ba-lúm-a-šur dumu ib-ki-im
english: sealed by uraya son of manana, by ilī-dan son of iddin-aššur, by mannum-balum-aššur son of ibkum.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: i-ba-ší šu-ma sá-ah-ra-tí tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a-šar ta-ša-pá-ra-ni kù.babbar
english: if you are delayed, send word and i shall pay the silver where you write.

akkadian: lá-áš-qú-ul ú-lá a-na hu-ša-hi-a kù.babbar
english: otherwise let me set it aside for my own needs.

akkadian: lu-pá-ni kù.babbar lá kà-ṣú-ud
english: the silver should not be idle.

akkadian: kišib ša-ar-ni-ga-a-šu kišib e-na-a-šur dumu <gap> kišib wa-al-hi-iš-na kišib pé-ru-wa kišib tù-wa-tù-ú-i <gap>
english: seal of šarnigāšu, seal of ennam-aššur, son of <gap>, seal of walhišna, seal of peruwa, seal of tuwatuwi.

akkadian: šu-ma kù.babbar i-ša-<gap>
english: if they pay the silver <gap>

akkadian: a-<gap>-ga šu-up-ra
english: peace reigns here.

akkadian: am-ma <gap>-a-šu a kà-ni-iš lu-bi₄-il₅ ú-ul a mì-ša-am lu-šé-bi₄-lá-kum 30
english: write to pn, that he may bring his <gap> to kanesh or send it to you over there.

akkadian: ma-na an.na a-na i-tur₄-dingir mì-ma lá tù-šé-ba-lam
english: by no means send 30 minas of tin to itūr-ilī!""

akkadian: ù me-er-e ha-na-na ú-lá i-tù-ar e-10+5 gín ša na-ki-le-ed ú kà-nu šu-ma wa-at-ra-am kù.babbar ha-na-na iš-tí na-ki-le-ed i-le-e i li-bi₄-ša kà-áp-sí-a tí-šu
english: if, apart from the 15 shekels, which nakile'ed has to confirm, hanana proves to have an additional claim in silver on nakile'ed, kapsiya will have a claim on her (hudida) for the (figurines of the) gods.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-lá-ma-sí dumu šu-ku-bi₄-im igi en-na-nim igi ú-ba-a igi šu-mì-a-bi₄-a igi a-mur-{d}utu
english: in the presence of assur-lamassi, son of su-kubum, of ennanum, of ubaya, of sumi-abiya, and of amur-samas.

akkadian: li-dí-na-ku-nu-tí mì-ma kù.babbar a-nim a-lá-hu-um
english: ali-ahum should receive all this silver.

akkadian: li-il₅-qé-e 4 ma-na an.na ú-ku
english: uku brought you <gap> minas of tin.

akkadian: ub-lá-kum mì-šu tí-ir-ta-kà ki-a-ma lá i-lá-kam a-na
english: why has word concerning this not come here from you?

akkadian: da-am-qá-a qí-bi₄-ma <gap>
english: to damqaya: <gap>

akkadian: kišib a-šur-i-dí kišib en-num-a-šur kišib en-num-a-šur ša

akkadian: hu-bu-ul en-num-a-šur 0.6666 ma-na
english: concerning ennam-aššur's debt.

akkadian: 5 gín an.na i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi
english: ennam-aššur owes 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of tin to luzi.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša i-tur₄-dingir ú puzur₄-ša-du-e a-na itu.kam
english: reckoned from the week of itūr-ilī and puzur-šadu'e he must pay in one month.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 gín.ta a-na 1 ma-na-im
english: if he has not paid, he will add (interest) at the rate 3 shekels per mina.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam ku-zal-li li-mu-um {d}utu-ba-ni
english: month kuzallu, eponymy šamaš-bāni.

akkadian: um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma a-na šu-ma-li-ba-a-šur ù en-um-a-šur qí-bi-ma 1 ma-na 2 gín kù.babbar li-té-e hi-la-tí-šu ku-nu-ki-a šu-ma-li-ba-a-šùr na-ší a-ma-kam
english: from iddin-abum to šumma-libbi-aššur and ennam-aššur: 1 mina 2 shekels of -silver, with exudations, šumma-libbi-aššur brings under my seal.

akkadian: le-qé-a-nim a-dí a-la-ki-a ṣí-ib-tám ša itu.kam iš-tí-in
english: i shall pay interest for a single month until i arrive.

akkadian: lá-áš-qúl a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma kù.babbar šé-bi-lá
english: my dear brothers, take care to send the silver.

akkadian: lu-mu-un li-bi-im a ku-lu-ma-a lá a-ra-ší
english: let me not have to face kulumaya's anger.

akkadian: da-da-nim ú-šé-ṣí-ú-ni-kum 20 ma-na urudu iš-tí dingir-ba-ni 8 ma-na urudu iš-tí ah-ma-a ni-il₅-qé-ma 4 túg šu-ru-tim ni-iš-a-ma en-nam-a-šur ù šu-ištar
english: we collected 20 minas of copper from ilī-bāni and 8 minas of copper from ahmaya and we bought (with it) dark textiles; ennam-aššur and šu-ištar, son of dadānum, have brought it to you.

akkadian: a-na ša-lim-a-šùr qí-bi-ma um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um i-tur₄-dingir <gap> e-na-ah-dingir ù en-nam-a-šur-ma a-na
english: to šalim-aššur from iddin-abum, itūr-ilī, <gap>, enah-ilī and ennam-aššur: we entered your house, opened for your tablets, took out the tablet concerning the debt of uṣur-ša-aššur son of aššur-malik and aššur-ṭāb son of sadaya, and entrusted it to abuwa.

akkadian: é-bé-tí-kà né-ru-ub-ma ṭup-pé-kà ni-ip-té-ma ṭup-pá-am ša
english: now, listen to the copy: sealed by puzur-ti'amtum, by aššur-imittī son of etaya, by uṣur-ša-aššur, by adada, the scribe, and by aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: hu-bu-ul ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur dumu a-šur-ma-lik
english: concerning the fact that uṣur-ša-aššur and aššur-ṭāb owe 4 minas of refined silver to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ù a-šur-du₁₀ dumu sá-da-a
english: reckoned from the week of mannu-kī-aššur and ikūnum they must pay within 6 weeks.

akkadian: ma-li-a-am ma-nu-kà-bi₄-a na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-hu ú-a a-tù-nu i-na ša-am-ší im-ma ma-nu-kà-bi₄-a e-ra-ba-ni pí-ri-kà-ni ša-ma-nim-ma
english: please, my brothers, buy on the very day mannu-kī-abiya arrives in town -textiles and send them to me with the first opportunity.

akkadian: iš-tí pá-nim-ma šé-bi-lá-nim a-na šu-a-šur qí-bi-ma ší-im kù.gi me-eh-ra-tim i-dí-ma
english: say to šu-anum: 'make the equivalent of the yield of the gold available by buying -textiles for me'.

akkadian: pí-ri-kà-ni ša-ma-nim a-ta i-na ší-im kù.gi
english: you yourself must take your silver from the yield of the gold.

akkadian: kù.babbar-áp-kà le-qé gi₄-mì-lam i-ṣé-ri-a šu-ku-un ù
english: do me this favor and (know that) i too can do you a favor!

akkadian: a-na-ku ga-ma-al-kà a-le-e šu-ma am-tum <gap>-e-ma té-ri-iš-kà dí-ši-ma ù té-er-ta-kà li-li-kà-ma kù.babbar lu-šé-bi₄-lá-kum
english: if the maid asks <gap> from you, give it her and let a report from you come here then i will send you the silver (for it).""

akkadian: lá-qé-ep dumu šu-a-šur i-da-an gán-lam₅ a-na-nu-um ù a-lá-nu-um iš-tí tí-ir-tí-šu-ma ša lá-qé-ep a-šu-mì dam.gàr
english: from here and from there (the shipment) goes overland in the name of the merchant together with lā-qēp's own orders.

akkadian: e-ti-iq igi du₁₀-a-hi dumu ir-bi-{d}im igi lá-qé-ep dumu puzur₄-ša-du-e igi en-um-a-šùr dumu ša-lim-a-šur
english: witnessed by ṭāb-ahi son of irbi-adad, by lā-qēp son of puzur-šadue, by ennam-aššur son of šalim-aššur.

akkadian: <gap> pí-ri-kà-ni ša a-na-na 1 lu-bu-ša-am 1 túg ra-qá-tám a-na a-bu-ša-lim dumu
english: <gap> belonging to anna-anna, 1 dress (and) 1 thin textile i gave to abu-šalim son of ṣill-adad.

akkadian: ṣí-lá-{d}im a-dí-in igi ma-nu-ki-a-šur igi ku-zi-zi-a
english: witnessed by mannum-kī-aššur, by kuziziya.

akkadian: šé-bi₄-lá-ma a-na ku-ša-ra lá-áš-qúl ṣí-i
english: the interest must not increase.

akkadian: ta-ma-lá-ki-im kà-bu-tim ṣa-ah-ri-im ša-ak-nu
english: in all six tablets, placed in the

akkadian: kišib a-ta-ta dumu ša-lim-a-šur kišib lá-qé-ep dumu a-šur-i-dí kišib en-um-a-šur wa-ar-dum ša hu-ra-ṣa-nim
english: seal of atata son of šalim-aššur, seal of lā-qēp son of aššur-idī, seal of ennam-aššur, huraṣānum's slave.

akkadian: 5 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur
english: ennam-aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to luzi.

akkadian: lu-zi-i šu 1 túg ku-ta-nam ša 5 gín kù.babbar en-um-a-šur
english: ennam-aššur must bring up one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver within one year.

akkadian: i-na ša-na-at ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am lá uš-té-li-am
english: if he has not brought up a within a year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here.

akkadian: i-ša-qal itu.kam té-i-na-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí sà-an-gu₅-um

english: now, realize well that since four years you use the silver of assur for trading purposes and that you have kept me waiting until this very day!

english: to your (plur.) father šalim-aššur <gap> what is present <gap> copper of good quality that he has personally <gap> deposit a memorandum before witnesses with specifications of the good copper, and set out and come here.

akkadian: um-me-a-nu ša a-bi₄-ni i-ṣa-áb-tù ù sí-ki-ni ú-kà-lu

akkadian: a-na lu-lu-ú en-um-a-šur ù a-bu-ša-lim qí-bi-ma um-ma a-šur-du₁₀-ma a-ša-me-ma a-šur-du₁₀ lá
english: say to lullu, ennam-aššur and abu-šalim thus aššur-ṭāb: i hear that aššur-ṭāb has unfortunately died.

akkadian: mì-ma kù.babbar 1 gín a-ma-kam lá i-kà-lá
english: not a single shekel of silver must be retained there!""

akkadian: um-ma a-<gap> a-na li-ba-a qí-bi-ma lu-qú-tí šál-ma-at ú a-na-ku šál-ma-ku

akkadian: ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma a-ta-ma 1 gú 30 ma-na kù.babbar

akkadian: e-zi-ib mì-iš-lam al-qé mì-iš-lam ha-la-aq
english: half of it i collected, half of it is lost.""
