akkadian: li-li-kam šu-ma a-wa-tim ta-da-na-am lá-dí-in šu-ma
english: if it is a matter of engaging in a legal case, i shall do it!

akkadian: é-tám kà-ba-sà-am lá-ak-bu-us a-wa-tim a-ni-na i-de₈
english: if it is a matter of remitting the house, i shall do it!

akkadian: a-ma-kam a-ni-na
english: annina knows the matter.

akkadian: ša-i-il₅ 4 gú 30 ma-na urudu ṣa-lá-ma-am é a-šur-iš-tí-kál dumu hi-na-a
english: ask annina there! 4 talents 30 minas of black copper is deposited in the house of aššuruš-tikal son of hinnaya.

akkadian: na-dí té-i-ra-tum ša ú-kà-lu-ma té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam
english: send me word about the orders that he holds.

akkadian: e-lá-ma ú ga-al-dá-a ni-kà-sí i-sí-ú-ma lu ú-ku-ul-tù-šu lu ga-am-ru-um ša ha-ra-nim mì-ma šu-um-šu ba-tí-iq 1 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ga-al-dá-a e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù i-ku-nim
english: elamma and galdaya settled accounts with the result that after both travel expenses and his food allowance have been deducted, elamma (still) has a claim of 1 mina of refined silver on galdaya, the son of naku.

akkadian: li-mu-um a-bi-a dumu šu-da-ga-an a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim
english: month vii, year-eponymy of abiya, son of šu-dagan.

akkadian: ni-iš a-lim{ki} it-mu-ma igi ša-lim-{d}iškur igi lá-qé-pí-im igi a-mur-{d}utu
english: separately, there still exists a valid record of his working capital.

akkadian: igi e-zé-e ṭup-pu-um ša bé-ú-lá-ti-šu a-ha-ma i-ba-ší
english: we made them swear an oath by the city for these words.

akkadian: im-dí-lim i-ša-qal šu-ma e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim a-mur-ištar la uk-ta-in kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-tí-šu e-la-ma a-na
english: if elamma fails to confirm amur-ištar('s liability) for imdī-ilum, elamma will pay the silver and the interest on it to imdī-ilum.

akkadian: a-na 6 itu.kam a-na ta-wi-ni-a lá ta-lá-kam-ma a-wa-tám lá ta-dí-nam ba-lum dí-nim ba-lúm ma-mì-tim kù ú ṣí-ba-tí-šu lá ta-dá-nam um-ma šu-ištar-ma lá-dí-na-kum a-na a-wa-tim
english: ennam-suen said: "if you do not come to tawiniya within 6 months and do not render account to me, will you then not give me the silver and its interest without resorting to legal action or oath?" šu-ištar answered: "i will give it to you".

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um ta-wi-ni-a i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am a-ni-am
english: for these words the tawiniya colony made us appear in court and before aššur's dagger we gave this tablet.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a dumu a-lá-bi₄-im dub i-dí-na-bi₄-im dumu šu-ištar gudu₄
english: to kuliya, son of ali-abum, tablet of iddin-abum, son of šu-ištar, priest of ištar.

akkadian: um-ma a-lu-lá-a ú a-mur-ištar-ma a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma a-ta-ma ší-im urudu kù.babbar ma-ma-hi-ir li-dí-na-ku-nu-tí um-ma né-nu-ma a-hu-um
english: from alulaya and amur-ištar to ennam-aššur: you have written and said: man-mahir shall give you the silver proceeds from the copper." we said (to him): "he is a brother for you.

akkadian: ku-a-tí a-wa-tum ša um-me-an a-bi₄-šu-nu ga-am-ra-at kù.babbar
english: the matter of the investors of their father has been cleared up.

akkadian: šu-ma lá qé-pu-tum hu-sà-ra-am kà-il₅ ú né-nu
english: if the things are not entrusted goods, then keep the lapis lazuli.

akkadian: lu ni-pu-ul-kà a
english: we shall then answer for you.

akkadian: ší-ba-am a-na urudu ú hu-sà-ri-im mì-ma
english: do not in any way worry about the copper and the lapis lazuli.

akkadian: 1 gín kù.babbar šé-né-en ša sí-ni-iš-tim ša 1 gín ša ṣú-ùh-ri-im
english: buy for 1 shekel of silver women's shoes, for 1 shekel shoes for children and send them.

akkadian: ša-ma-ma šé-bi₄-lam šé-né-en a-na
english: send me shoes for my own feet.

akkadian: šé-pì-a šé-bi₄-lam ší-tí kù.babbar
english: send the rest of the silver.

akkadian: šé-bi₄-lam 1 túg sig₅ ku-lu-ma-a na-áš-a-kum ší-im-šu šé-bi₄-lam
english: kulumaya brings you 1 fine textile; send me the proceeds from it.

akkadian: kišib i-dí-a-šur dumu ì-lí-dan kišib a-šur-sipa dumu i-dí-da kišib e-lá-ma dumu i-dí-sú-en₆ kišib puzur₄.ištar dumu
english: seal of iddin-aššur, son of ilī-dān, seal of aššur-rē'ī, son of idida, seal of elamma, son of iddin-suen, seal of puzur-ištar, son of aššur-mālik.

akkadian: a-šur-ma-lik ší-ma-at i-dí-a-šur dumu
english: testament of iddin-aššur, son of ilī-dān.

akkadian: ì-lí-dan be-el ší-ma-tí-a a-na ba-áb dingir lá ú-šé-ru-du
english: they shall not lead my testamentary executors down to the gate of the god.

akkadian: ša ú-šé-ru-du 10 ma-na kù.babbar i-ša-qal
english: who does lead them down shall pay 10 minas of silver.

akkadian: a-na dumu um-me-a-nim pì-qí-id-ma lu-ub-lam ša 0.3333
english: buy onions and for 0.3333 shekel of silver and send it to me.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar šu-um-ki ù du-uk-li
english: my dear brother, pay attention to my agent!

akkadian: a-pu-tum ki-ma ṭup-pá-am ša sá-ra-tim ta-áš-me-ú tí-ib-a-ma a-tal-kam
english: urgent, set out and come since you have heard a letter with falsehoods.

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-gi-im-lí-ma a-na a-zu-ú iš-ta-ah-šu ú ni-wa-la qí-bi₄-ma 10 gín
english: from aššur-gimlī to azu, ištahšu and niwala: aluwa brings you 10 shekels of tin.

akkadian: an.na a-lu-wa na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí na-ah-lá-áp-tám ša
english: amur-aššur brought you a children's dress.

akkadian: ṣú-uh-ri-im a-mur-a-šur ub-lá-ku-nu-tí tí-ir-tí ma-lá ú 2 ší-ni-šu i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí a-tù-nu šu-lu-um-ku-nu
english: i sent you word once or twice, (but) (as for?) you, no greeting whatever came from you.

akkadian: ma-tí-ma lá i-li-<gap>-kam ú šu-ma ša-hi-re-en lá tù-šé-lá-nim
english: however, send me word if you do not bring the boots up here.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-ak-nu-ma li-li-kam iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-im-ma ki-ma ṭup-pá-am ta-áš-me-a-ni tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam
english: send me word with the very first transport, as soon as you have heard the letter.

akkadian: ú ší-né-en <gap> a-na ma-ha-tí-a šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: also, send me shoes <gap> for my aunt.

akkadian: igi i-dí-ku-bi igi a-lá-bi-im dumu šu-a-šùr igi en-na-sú-in
english: witnessed by iddin-kūbī, by ali-abum son of šu-aššur, by enna-suen.

akkadian: lá i-li-kam a-hi a-ta kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu-nu-ma ù
english: my dear brother, make them pay the silver and send me word.

akkadian: ša-a-am tí-sà-ba-am ṣú-ba-sà a-zu a-na
english: azu should bring her -textile for my dress.

akkadian: i-lá-ak igi a-šur-du-ri dumu puzur₄.ištar
english: before aššur-dūrī, son of puzur-ištar.

akkadian: a-na ì-lí-a i-za-zu lu-qú-tum ša a-bi-šu-nu a-na
english: the merchandise? of their father belongs to the two of them.

akkadian: ki-lá-le-šu-nu i-za-zu id-<gap> ša-bu-a-at <gap> ta-lá-qé
english: with <gap> she is satisfied, <gap> she will take.

akkadian: qá-áb-li-tám ša 1 ma-na ì-lí-a
english: a -bowl weighing 1 mina iliya will take.

akkadian: i-lá-qé mu-ša-lam ù šu-ga-ri-a-am {d}nin.šubur-ba-ni
english: the mirror and the ilabrat-bāni will take.

akkadian: i-lá-qé igi ma-ṣí-ì-lí igi puzur₄.ištar igi en-um-a-šur
english: in the presence of maṣi-ilī, of puzur-ištar, of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: i-ku-pí-a a-na i-dí-a-šur iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma i-ku-pì-a-ma a-na i-dí-a-šùr-ma 40 gú urudu sig₅ ša um-me-a-nu i li-bi₄-kà iṣ-bu-tù-ni a-na-ku a-hu-a ù é a-bi₄-a
english: ikūn-pīya seized us against iddin-aššur and ikūn-pīya said to iddin-aššur: concerning the 40 talents of good copper that the investors seized in your possession, neither i nor my brother nor my paternal house will raise further claim against you.

akkadian: ú-lá ni-tù-ra-kum a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it ni-dí-in igi
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ba-ba-zu-a igi du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur igi šu-ištar
english: witnessed by babazua, ṭāb-ṣill-aššur, by šu-ištar.

akkadian: 50 ma-na bé-lá-num i-dí-nam šà.ba 5
english: i received all this.

akkadian: gú a-na ir-i-bi-im a-dí-in 40 ma-na a-na i-dí-sú-in a-dí-in ší-tí-tum ku-nu-ku-a i-ba-ší-ú
english: thereof: 1 talent of wool for itūr-ilī;

akkadian: 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb wa-bi-il₅ ṭup-pí-im
english: the bearer of this tab let is the creditor.

akkadian: šu-ut dam.gàr-ru-um a-ma-kam tù-ur-ištar dumu zu-ma-<gap> be-lá-a-wa-tim ša-i-il₅-šu
english: over there turi-istar, son of zuma-x, (is) the litigant, ask him.

akkadian: ša kù.ki mì-ma a-nim
english: i hear that you are going to the city.

akkadian: um-me-a-nim ke-nim lá ša ša-ha-tim wa-áš-bu ta-ma-lá-kà-am ku-nu-ki-a pí-iq-da a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu i-na
english: my dear brothers, the same day send me word about where you have left the container under my seal and inform me.

akkadian: u₄-mì-im ša a-šar ta-ma-lá-kà-am ku-nu-ki-a té-zi-ba-ni tí-ir-ta-ku-nu
english: to ali-ahum: i have shown the textile you sent me once or twice.

akkadian: a-na i-tur₄-dingir qí-bi-ma um-ma ha-na-a ú a-bu-mì-lúm-ma 20 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-kà
english: to itūr-ilī from hanaya and abum-ilum: hanaya brought 20 minas of silver under your seal.

akkadian: ša sà-i-tim <gap> gín
english: your silver has been spent for you.

akkadian: 2 a-bar-ni-e kù.babbar-áp-kà gám-ra-ku-um
english: all this amur-ištar leads to you.

akkadian: mì-ma a-nim a-mur-ištar i-ra-dí-a-kum lu-qú-ut-kà ša-al-ma-at-ma iš-tí ma-sú-e ša ú-nu-ut-kà a-bu-kà-ni ša-lim-a-hu-um i-li-kam
english: your merchandise is safe, and šalim-ahum came with the leaders with whom i dispatched your goods.

akkadian: ìr ú-šé-ṣí-am géme-tám ša ṣú-ha-ar-tim ša i-dí-in kà-ri-im ta-da-nam lá qá-bi-ú-ni ú-ṣú-ur-pì-a-šur ú-da-bi-sí-ma it-bi-ma i-lá-ak
english: the female slave belonging to the girl, whose sale was forbidden by a verdict of the colony, uṣur-ša-aššur has <gap>, whereupon he got up and went away.

akkadian: en-um-a-šur dumu šu-{d}en.líl áš-qúl
english: let him make it up to you there.

akkadian: 5 gín kù.babbar šé-ep-ištar il₅-qé a-ma-kam lu-ba-li-ṭá-ku-um 7 ma-na
english: aššur-ennam son of šamaš-bāni brings you 7 minas of silver under our seals.

akkadian: kišib ištar-pá-li-il₅ dumu šu-ku-bi₄-im kišib ni-mar-ištar dumu ba-la kišib a-bu-ša-lim dumu ì-lí-a-lúm 0.5
english: seal of ištar-pālil, son of šu-kūbum, seal of nimar-ištar, son of bala, seal of abu-šalim, son of ilī-ālum. 0.5 mina of refined silver ištar-pālil, son of šu-kūbum, owes to the creditor.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ištar-pá-li-il₅ dumu
english: from the week-eponymy of ellil-bāni, month x, he will add 1 shekel per month for this silver.

akkadian: a-šùr-iš-ti-kál dumu hi-na-a kišib a-lá-hi-im dumu sú-sà-a-a
english: from the week-eponymy of hanāya, month ix, they will add 1.5 shekel as interest per month per mina.

akkadian: kišib púzur.ištar dumu šu-ku-bi₄-im kišib
english: the silver is bound on the one of them who is solvent and reliable.

akkadian: be-lúm-ba-ni dumu
english: eponymy of hanna-nārum.

akkadian: ga-zi-a kišib áb-ša-lim dam a-lá-hi-im
english: bēlum-bāni, son of gaziya, assisted ab-šalim and the sons of ali-ahum.

akkadian: dam a-lá-hi-im ù
english: this silver was taken in the name of ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu kù.babbar i
english: from the week eponymy of aššur-taklāku, son of ali-ahum, he shall pay within 16 weeks.

akkadian: qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ú ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is li-mu-um
english: if, when his term is due, he has not paid, he will add an interest of 1.5 shekels per month.

akkadian: ha-na-na-ru-um i
english: month xi, year eponymy of maṣi-ilī.

akkadian: ša-ha-at áb-ša-lim ú me-er-e a-
english: he will pay the full amount of tin without (deducting) fees and transport costs.

akkadian: áp-qí-id 2 ri-ik-sí ša šu-be-lim dumu a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim na a-ha-ti-šu ù dumu.mí-tí-šu igi a-ta-a áp-qí id
english: two packets of šu-bēlum, son of aššur-bēl-awātim, for his sister and his daughter i entrusted (for transport) in the presence of ataya.

akkadian: en-nam-a-šùr a-lá-ha-am iš-a-al
english: ennam-aššur questioned ali-ahum.

akkadian: um-ma en-nam-a-šur-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im-ma me-er-ú
english: ennam-aššur said to ali-ahum: we are inheritors.

akkadian: me-tim né-nu mì-šu-um dam.gàr-ru
english: why do our father's customers detain us?

akkadian: a-bi-ni sí-ki-ni ú-kà-lu ba-a-am a-na dam.gàr a-bi-ni lu nu-sà-li-ma
english: come, let us plead with our father's customers and please our father's customers.

akkadian: dam.gàr a-bi-ni lu nu-ṭá-i-ib
english: do not cheat me lest they detain us.

akkadian: lá tù-ú-na-a-ni ù sí-ki-ni lá ú-kà-lu a-dí ha-am-ší-šu ù iš-ri-šu a-ha-am eb-ra-am nu-šé-ší-ib-ma a-ta
english: five or ten times we have had a colleague and friend sit down to negotiate, but you have rejected everything; so, you cheat me.

akkadian: ší-ma-at a-bi-ni ša a-lim{ki} lu ni-iz-ku lá tù-na-ha-ni ù kù.babbar 1 gín lá tù-ša-ag-ma-ra-ni lá ri-ig-ma-tum ší-bu-tum
english: do not obstruct me and do not let me waste a single shekel of silver." this is not a formal court case, it is a statement before witnesses."

akkadian: kù.babbar ša a-na zu-ku-a ha-bu-lá-tí-ni u₄-mu-kà
english: we produced the tablet with your seal and opened it and put it among your tablets in enah-ilī's house.

akkadian: il₅-qé 2 gín.ta a-na ma-na-im ki-ib-sá-tim il₅-qé ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-kà nu-šé-ṣí-a-ma
english: the proceeds from your 4 talents 47 minas of copper, at the rate 0.6666 shekel 15 grains silver (per mina) was 3.5 mina 5 shekels; 0.5 mina 2 shekels of silver: the price of 2 your donkeys.

akkadian: ni-il₅-té-šu-ma i li-bi ṭup-pí-kà i-na é
english: of that we paid 17 shekels of silver, the price of a donkey that you owed to ennānum son of abiya.

akkadian: ú-bi-il₅ igi a-di-da igi a-ba-ba igi dam-qá-a 3 gín kù.babbar i li-bi šu-li-i
english: witnessed by adida, by ababa, by damqaya. 3 shekels of silver is in the possession of šuli.

akkadian: a-na en-um-a-šùr qí-bi₄-ma um-ma tù-ta-a-ma iš-ra-am ša a-na um-ma-za ta-dí-na-ni-ni a-na-ku ù šu-ut i-na ga-bar-tí ha-ra-nim ni-mì-hi-ir-ma iš-ra-am lá
english: to ennam-aššur from tutaya: as to the belt you gave me for ummaza, when i and he met at the conclusion of the journey, i did not give him the belt.

akkadian: a-dí-šu-um té-er-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a-šar pá-nu-im pá-ni-ší
english: send me a word and dispose of it wherever possible.

akkadian: a-hi a-ta ar-ša-tim kà-ar-pá-at a-na qá-tí-im dí-in
english: my dear brother, give a pot of wheat to dispose over.

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma a-na a-na-a-na qí-bi-ma a-na-kam a-ba-ru-um ša i-tur₄-dingir ih-li-iq-ma 1 gín 15 še kù.babbar a-na
english: from ennam-aššur to anna-anna: itūr-ilī's lead has been lost here, and i gave 1 shekel 15 grains of silver to šalim-bēlī, his servant.

akkadian: ša-lim-bé-lí ṣú-ha-ri-šu a-dí-in a-ma-kam kù.babbar
english: let šalim-bēlī give you the silver there.

akkadian: ša-lim-bé-lí li-dí-na-ki-im a-pu-tum a-ma-kam lu a ba-ba-tí lu a-na é-be-tí-a lá
english: urgent, do not act rashly there with regard to either the outstanding claims or my house.

akkadian: ta-ša-li-ṭí a-wa-tí ša ì-lí-dan i-dí-a-šur ù šu-ištar al-té-qé
english: i have accepted the proposal of ilī-dan, iddin-aššur and šu-ištar.

akkadian: ha-ra-ni a-ta-lá-kam a-dí
english: i shall come on my trip.

akkadian: en-na-sú-in ša-li-ma šu-ma iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-ta-ṣa-am úz-ni pé-té-a
english: ask about enna-suen, and inform (plural) me if he has left the city.

akkadian: a-lá-hi-im i-da-an a-ha-ma a-na 1 ma-na 7 gín ša ší-ta ta-ah-sí-sà-tí-a a-za-kà-ar-šu-ma
english: further, i shall formally state to him the 1 mina 7 shekels from my two memoranda, and he must pay.

akkadian: i-ša-qá-lam₅ igi i-tur₄-dingir dumu a-mur-ištar igi a-ta-ta ha-pu-dim igi a-lu-lá-a dumu
english: witnessed by itūr-ilī son of amur-ištar, by atata the blind one, by alulaya son of isalia.

akkadian: i-sá-li-a 1 ma-na 10 gín kù.babbar iš-tí a-lu-lá-a
english: i received 1 mina 10 shekels of silver from alulaya and <gap>-šamaš.

akkadian: a-na mì-iš-li ša a-bi-ni a-dí-i ma-lá ta-az-me-ru-ni šu-mì a-bi-ni i-na é kà-ri-im lu-up-ta-ma ú mì-iš-li ša a-bi-a i-dí-ištar ù
english: write our father's name in the office of the colony for what you account for them, and then iddin-ištar and ennānum may deposit my father's (other) half-share.

akkadian: ni-kà-sí ma-ah-ri-ni i-dí-a-bu-um ù ša-lim-a-šùr i-sí-ú-ma a-na
english: iddin-abum and šalim-aššur settled accounts with us as witnesses.

akkadian: mu-lá 10 ma-na kù.gi ší-ip-kà-at i-sú-rik₁₃ ša a-na ša-lim-a-šùr ša-áp-ku é áš-du ù wa-ar-kà-sà i-dí-a-bu-um ki-ma i-sú-rik₁₃ a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-in é
english: as compensation for 10 minas of gold, issu-arik's investment that had been invested in šalim-aššur, iddin-abum gave on behalf of issu-arik ašdu's house and its legacy to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: áš-du ù wa-ar-kà-sà ša ša-lim-a-šùr igi
english: ašdu's house and its legacy belongs to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: lá-qé-ep igi a-ku-za
english: witnessed by lā-qēp, by akuza.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: i-dí-sú-in dumu i-ba-a ša a-na ša-lim-a-šùr dumu i-sú-rik₁₃ ra-bi-ṣa-am e-hu-za-ni ù ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim a-na ša-sú-hi-šu il₅-qé-a-ni i-mì-ig-ru-ma ni-iš a-lim{ki} i-na kà-ni-iš it-mu-ú i-dí-sú-in ki-ma a-ha-tí-šu
english: iddin-suen son of ibaya who had hired an attorney against šalim-aššur son of issu-arik, and had received a tablet from the city assembly about his extradition - (those two) settled (their differences) and swore an oath by the city in kanesh.

akkadian: a-hi-šu ù a-ha-at a-bi-šu i-dí-sú-in it-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na hu-bu-ul i-ba-a-a lá i-tù-ar-šu-nu-tí a-hu-um a-na a-hi-im
english: iddin-suen swore on behalf of his sister, his brother and his father's sister. šalim-aššur must not raise claim against them for ibaya's debt.

akkadian: lá i-tù-ar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim
english: the two must not raise claim against each other.

akkadian: li-mu-um a-lá-hu-um igi
english: month hubur, eponymy ali-ahum.

akkadian: en-na-nim dumu a-lá-bi-im igi a-šur-na-da dumu ar-nu-id igi kà-ta-tim dumu ma-lá-ba igi nu-ur-sú-in dumu {d}muš-mu-ta-bi-il₅ ù kišib i-dí-sú-in dumu i-ba-a-a šu.hi
english: witnessed by ennānum son of ali-abum, by aššur-nādā son of irnuid, by katātum son of malaba, by nūr-suen son of nirah-muttabbil, and sealed by iddin-suen son of ibaya, the barber.

akkadian: um-ma <gap>-ma a-na ha-nu ù a-<gap> qí-bi-ma a-na ha-nu qí-bi-ma 5 ku-ta-ni a-na 0.6666 ma-na
english: from <gap> to hanu and a<gap>; to hanu: i sold you 5 for 0.6666 mina less 2 shekels of silver.

akkadian: kà-ri-im i-dí-in a-ma-kam a-na a-bi-kà
english: raise it with your father there.

akkadian: a-na {d}mar.tu-ba-ni a-šùr-i-mì-tí ku-zi-zi-a ú en-um-a-šùr qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma 2 šu-lu-up-kà-e sig₅ 2 ra-qá-ta-an sig₅ ša lu-bu-ší ša a-bi₄-ni iš-tí lu-bu-ší ša <gap> iš-tí en-um-a-šùr ku-zi-zi-a i-na <gap> ep-ša-ku-ni
english: to amurrum-bāni, aššur-imittī, kuziziya and ennam-aššur from šalim-aššur: 2 -textiles of good quality, 2 thin textiles of good quality for clothing for our father with the clothes <gap> with ennam-aššur kuziziya in <gap> as i have been made.

akkadian: a-hu-a a-tù-nu ih-da
english: my dear brothers, take care.

akkadian: a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma um-ma a-ba-ba-a-ma a-na ma-lá pì-i na-áš-pár-tí-kà pá-ni-tim 3 ma-na
english: say to kuliya, thus says ababaya: exactly as your previous letter stated i have given 3 minas of silver to ennanatum.

akkadian: kù.babbar a-na e-na-na-tim a-dí-in a-pu-tum mì-nu-um ša
english: please, what is this, that you released silver to ennanat-assur?

akkadian: a-na e-na-na-at-a-šùr kù.babbar tù-ší-ru-ú a-na lá-ni-šu ta-tí-ki-il₅ lá é-tám lá ša-ra-am
english: you put trust in his outward appearance, but he as neither house nor child and still you released the silver!

akkadian: i-šu ú kù.babbar tù-ší-ir a-pu-tum a-na me-ra um-mì-a-nim <gap>-be <gap> ma-na-ah-tí
english: please, to an independent trader <gap>. <gap> as for my misery / expenses, ask bur-istar (about it).

akkadian: bur-ištar ša-i-il₅ mì-ma ša a-dí-nu-šu-i-ni a-na a-šur-ṣú-lu-li
english: all i gave him for assur-sululi has been registered on a wax tablet.

akkadian: i-na ṭup-pì-im ša
english: please do not act highhandedly.

akkadian: i-is-ku-ri-im lá-pu-ut a-pu-tum lá ta-ša-lá-aṭ ṭup-pá-am ša é bé-lúm-ba-ni na-áš-pár-ta-kà li-li-kam
english: as for the tablet of / in the house of belum-bani - when your letter comes we will obtain its release.

akkadian: lu nu-šé-ṣí-šu a-ha-at-kà a-na a-bi-kà ma-da-tí-ma ta-ta-wu i-na
english: your sister talks a lot to your father and she tries to make him forget you!

akkadian: li-bi a-bi-kà tù-šé-ṣa-kà lá ta-ša-lá-aṭ mì-ma lá ta-pá-lá-ah e-lá-nu-kà
english: do not act highhandedly, you have nothing to fear since your father has nobody but you.

akkadian: a-bu-kà lá i-šu a-pu-tum a-ni-qí ša a-mu-tim <gap> ù ki.du-ra-am a-šùr-ṣú-lu-li <gap> lu-ub-lam
english: please, the rings of meteoric iron <gap> and the <gap>, let assur-sululi take them along to bring (them) to me.

akkadian: ki-ma a-šur-i-dí ša-lim-a-šur i-da-an ṭup-pu-um ha-ar-mu-um ša hu-bu-ul a-šur-i-dí i-na é ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur dumu a-šur-ma-lik i-na li-bi₄ ṭup-pì-šu e-li-a-ma ù a-na
english: this certified tablet concerning aššur-idī's debt appeared in the house of uṣur-ša-aššur son of aššur-malik among his tablets, and thereafter they entrusted it to aššur-malik son of ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-šur-ma-lik dumu a-lá-hi-im ip-qí-du-šu a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in igi a-ta-ta dumu šu-ku-bi₄-im igi šu-a-šur dumu id-n
english: witnessed by atata son of šu-kūbum, by šu-aššur son of iddin-aššur; aššur-rabi was on that very day our thir (witness partner).

akkadian: 1 túg ku-ta-nam šu-li dumu puzur₄-a-bé-eh a-lá-ha-am a-hu-šu a-na e-lá-ma ú-kà-a-an šu-ma
english: šuli, son of puzur-abeh, will bring proof that ali-ahum, his brother, owes 1 -textile to elamma.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-šùr-ma-lik ṣa-lá-mì-im ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im a-na 1 ma-na-e-em ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb lí-mu-um ša qá-té ba-zi-a
english: starting from the week eponymy of assur-mālik, the black one, he will add interest per mina according to the regulation of the colony.

akkadian: dumu šé-pá-lim itu.kam na-ar-ma-ak-a-šur ša ki-na-tim igi ir-ma-a-šùr
english: eponymy of the successor of baziya, son of šēp-ālum, month iii.

akkadian: igi na-ar-me-a igi en-nam-{d}iškur igi ri-ma-nim
english: witnesses: ir'am-aššur, nar'am-ea, ennam-adad, rimānum

akkadian: 5 gú urudu iš-tí ku-ur-zi-a ù
english: 5 talents of copper is owed by kurziya and šu-nisaba.

akkadian: šu-ni-sà-ba iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša a-bi-ì-lí a-na 4 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of abī-ilī they are to pay within 4 weeks.

akkadian: i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu itu.kam a-lá-na-tim
english: if they have not paid (in time) they are to add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: li-mu-um a-al-du₁₀ 3 gú 23 ma-na urudu iš-tí ì-lí-iš-ta-kál 5 gú urudu iš-tí ku-ra
english: month allanātum, eponymy ali-ṭāb. 3 talents 23 minas of copper is owed by iliš-tikal; 5 talents of copper is owed by kura.

akkadian: u₄-mu-šu 1 itu.kam e-tí-qú 4 gú urudu ki a-šur-i-mì-tí
english: his terms are overdue by 1 month. 4 talents of copper is owed by aššur-imittī.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša ku-lu-uk-lu a-na 3 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of kuluklu he is to pay within 3 weeks.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb itu.kam
english: if he has not paid (in time) he is to add interest according to the rule of the colony.

akkadian: ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša i qá-tí a-al-du₁₀
english: month ša-sarrātim, eponymy he who took over from ali-ṭāb.

akkadian: il₅-qé-ú ša mì-ma a-we-li a-ni-ú-tim ṭup-pì-šu-nu ha-ru-mu-tim a-na a-ta-ta dumu lugal-sú-in
english: with respect to all these men i have left their certified tablets with atata son of šar-suen.

akkadian: e-zi-ib igi a-šur-i-mì-tí igi a-al-du₁₀ igi ah-ša-lim dumu i-dí-ištar
english: witnessed by aššur-imittī, by ali-ṭāb, by ah-šalim son of iddin-ištar.

akkadian: kišib da-da-a dumu šu-ku-bi-im kišib ì-lí-tab.ba dumu
english: seal of dadaya son of šu-kūbum, seal of ilī-tappā'ī son of aššur-ṭāb, seal of aššur-rē'ī son of aššuriš-tikal.

akkadian: a-šùr-du₁₀ kišib a-šùr-sipa dumu
english: aššur-rē'ī son of aššuriš-tikal owes 1 mina of silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-šur-iš-tí-kál 1 ma-na kù.babbar
english: month ša-sarrātim, eponymy after that of aššur-imittī the skipper.

akkadian: i-ṣé-er a-šur-sipa
english: he will pay 0.3333 mina per year.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-ab kišib ku-ku-a dumu ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a kišib da-da-a dumu bu-zi kišib
english: from the capital on the wool that they are going to pay him, ilī-dan son of iddin-aššur shall give 6.6666 minas of good -silver to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: ì-lí-dan dumu i-dí-a-šùr 21 gú ša-áp-tám ša kà-né-eš ša é.gal-lim
english: if ilī-dan has not paid ennam-aššur's representatives from the capital on the wool, he shall add interest at the rate 1.5 shekels per month per mina.

akkadian: dumu i-dí-a-šur a-na en-um-a-šur i-ša
english: i left the certified tablets in kuburnat.

akkadian: <gap> ù sà-he-er-tám ša ha-tim a-na ha-ra-an sú-ki-nim a-na e-ra-bi-ni li ik nim ì.giš sà-ar-dam bi
english: <gap> and let him <gap> small goods from hattum to the narrow track when we arrive.

akkadian: ma tù-ub-ša <gap> le-qé-a-nim a-dí <gap> lá tù-us-tí-<gap> ba-ni-<gap> li-<gap> ta-ah-sí-sà-tí-ku-nu le-qé-a-ni-ma
english: take olive-oil <gap> take your memoranda for me and <gap>

akkadian: gín kù.babbar ša ma-nu-um-ki-ì-lí ma-nu-um-ki-a-šùr
english: thereof anna-anna, ennam-aššur's maid, paid 2 minas less 5 shekels of silver.

akkadian: ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um a-na
english: to ennam-aššur: i have left on a journey to wahšušana.

akkadian: a-mì-ša-am na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí
english: take care to send word to me.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ù
english: also, conduct ennam-aššur to me.

akkadian: i-na li-bi-kà a-dí-i igi a-šur-gal dumu a-sú-a igi šu-sú-in a-hi-kà igi ša-lim-a-hi-im i-na é-tí-kà
english: witnessed by aššur-rabi son of asuwa, šu-suen, your brother, and šalim-ahum we settled accounts in your house.

akkadian: ni-kà-sí ni-sí kù.babbar a-na li-ip-ta-nim dí-in-ma ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a li-il₅-qé-am
english: give the silver to lipit-anum and let him acquire a profitable purchase for me.

akkadian: ha-nu-nu ṣa-áb-ta-ma 1 ma-na 1 gín kù.babbar
english: seize hanunu and have him pay 1 mina 1 shekel of silver.

akkadian: ša-áš-qí-lá-šu ú-mu-šu ma-al-ú
english: his terms are complete.

akkadian: ša i-ba-ší-ú a-na a-lá-hi-im ù a-lu-a dí-in-ma lu-ub-lu-nim a-na da-áš-i-šu ba-a-nim lu
english: every textile that is available give that to ali-ahum and aluwa so they may bring it.

akkadian: iš-té-ni-ú-tù-ma kù.babbar lu
english: leave in the spring.

akkadian: ší-im hu-sà-ri lu ší-im ṣú-ba-tí lu <gap> ki bu <gap> ú <gap> ku-nu-tí tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-ik-ma kù.babbar <gap>
english: may for the very first time the silver, the proceeds from the lapis lazuli or from the textiles. <gap> send me word <gap>

akkadian: 62 ku-ta-ni a-na ir-i-bi-im ù
english: i left 62 kutānus with ir'ibum and šēp-ištar.

akkadian: šé-ep-ištar e-zi-ib šà.ba 30 ku-ta-ni a-na šu-pu-nu-ma-an ni-dí-in 5 túg
english: we gave thereof 30 kutānus to šuppunuman; 5 textiles for the guide from išhianit.

akkadian: a-na ra-dí-im iš-hi-a-ni-tí-im 11 ku-ta-ni i-na na-ru-qá-tim du-ur-kà-ma a-šu-mì da-dí-a e-ez-ba
english: pack 11 kutānus in the sacks and leave them in dādiya's name until my instructions arrive.

akkadian: a-dí tí-ir-tí i-lá-kà-ni ší-tí ku-ta-ni-a
english: the rest of my kutānus - 16 textiles remain.

akkadian: 16 túg i-ší-tù-nim wa-ar-ki-a-ma a-na ší-tí-im ma-lá ta-du-nu-šu-ni a-ṣé-ri-a šé-bi-lá-šu-nu
english: after i left, with respect to the remainder, send me as much as you will sell.

akkadian: i-ša-qal itu.kam qá-ra-tum igi šál-ma-{d}iškur nu-a-ri-im igi i-dí-sú-in dumu a-ta-na-ah
english: in the presence of salim-adad, the musician, of iddin-suen, the son of atanah.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur-ma a-dí tí-sú-bi ša e-na-nim 10 gín kù.babbar ša illat-tim ša igi ú-ṣú-ra-nim iz-ku-a-ni 10 gín
english: to ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: concerning ennānum's additions, the 10 shekels of silver from the caravan that became available to me with uṣurānum as witness, pay him 10 shekels of silver out of my silver that i left with you and then set witnesses for him.

akkadian: kišib puzur₄-{d}en.zu kišib šu-bé-lim kišib <gap> 1 gú lá 10 ma-na
english: seal of puzur-suen, seal of šu-bēlum, seal of <gap>. 50 minas of copper puzur-suen owes to elamma.

akkadian: urudu i-ṣé-er puzur₄-{d}en.zu e-lá-ma i-šu i-na ad-ri-im i-ša-qal
english: at the time of the threshing he will weigh out pure copper of tappašatta.

akkadian: urudu ta-pá-ša-ta-i-am za-ak-wa-am šu-ma i-na ú-me-šu lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im tù-ur-hu-mì-it ṣí-ib-ta-am
english: if he does not pay when his term is up, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the durhumit colony.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb 10 gín kù.babbar a-ha-ma i-na ku-bu-ur ú-ṭí-tí-im i-na
english: separately he will pay 10 shekels of silver in kanesh, when the barley is ripe.

akkadian: kà-ni-iš i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul i tù-ur-hu-mì-it i-ṣé-ri-šu a-lá-qé
english: if he does not pay i will collect it in durhumit for his account.

akkadian: (4 broken lines) <gap> an-ma-ma tí-ir-tí i-sú-ri-ik a-na ṣé-ri-a i-li-kam-ma <gap> ší-ri-e a-hi-šu <gap> a-na ṣé-ri-a <gap> kù.babbar i-na <gap> a-bi-kà al-qé <gap> 1 gú ù ma <gap>-ma <gap> na na <gap>-ul <gap>-kà ú
english: <gap> issu-arik's instructions arrived to me, and <gap> let me inform you of your father's tablet and either in the city, whether silver from free loans or from the debt of your father, i had washed silver paid.

akkadian: ša ki-ma <gap> a-lim{ki} i ta-<gap>
english: he said: why do you inform me alone?

akkadian: e-ru-ub-ma ṭup-pé ša a-bi-kà lu-lá-mì-id-kà-ma
english: my brothers are not present.

akkadian: um-ma a-šur-du₁₀-ma a-na a-na-na qí-bi-ma 16 gín kù.babbar ša tù-šé-bi-lá-ni ší-im li-bi₄-šu šu-ut-ma iš-a-am la iš-e-li sà-áp-tí-nu-um
english: from aššur-ṭāb to anna-anna: as to the 16 shekels of silver that you sent me, he made purchases after his own will without asking me.

akkadian: i-na ra-mì-ni-a ú-ba-la-am
english: i personally bring you a .

akkadian: a-ni-<gap> 2 né-nu na-al-pu-ta-ni a-ša-me-ma e-pì-iš-tí
english: i hear that the man's actions are in disorder.

akkadian: a-we-lim ša-ah-lá-at šu-ma a-we-lúm é-tám i-šu-ma na-ru-qú-šu šál-ma-at a-ni-tum lá a-ni-tum tí-ir-ta-ak-nu za-ku-tum li-li-kam
english: send me a clear report whether it is so or not that the man has a house and his joint-stock capital is safe.

akkadian: šu-ma a-we-lam₅ ta-da-ga-lá-ma lá i-dum ki-ma i-a-tí mì-ta-ah-ṣa-ma ša <gap> ku <gap>
english: if you observe that the man has no sense, then do your very best, acting for me, and <gap>

akkadian: kišib a-šùr-ma-lik dumu dingir-ba-ni kišib a-la-hi-im dumu i-na-ah-dingir kišib a-mur-ištar dumu mì-šu-gal kišib a-gu-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im
english: seal of aššur-malik son of ilī-bāni, seal of ali-ahum son of inah-ilī, seal of amur-ištar son of miššu-rabi, seal of aguwa, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: ša 24 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-šu-ú
english: concerning 24 minas of refined silver that iddin-abum owes to aššur-bēl-awātim.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a ù ì-lí-iš-tí-kál a-na 20 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week if libbaya and iliš-tikal he must pay within 20 weeks.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù 6 ma-na kù.gi šu-mì a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-lá-pá-at
english: if they write his tablet, he must book 6 minas of gold in the name of aššur-bēl-awātim.

akkadian: 4 ma-na kù ṣa-ru-pá-am ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu i-na illat šu-{d}en.líl a-na i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na e-bu-ṭim i-dí-a-šùr i-dí-in
english: iddin-aššur has given 4 minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, from the caravan of šu-illil, to iddin-abum as an investment loan.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-ba-ni igi lá-qé-ep
english: witnessed by aššur-bāni, by lā-qēp.

akkadian: li-bi₄ a-hu-ša dumu
english: all this is owed by ata(ya), son of ikūnum.

akkadian: ša-du-e-šu 2-ší-na ú-kà-pè wa-dí-ú-tim a ta-ad-mì-iq-tim mì-ma a-nim i li-bi₄ na-ra-am-zu dumu kà-ki-a
english: all this asānum gave to bēlum-bāni. 11 shekels of refined silver laqēpum, the scribe, son of abaya, owes to bēlum-bāni; (for it) he will let 24 shekels of silver reach me in the city.

akkadian: ú i-dí-in-ni-ra-ah be-lúm-ba-ni i-šu igi a
english: witnessed by ikūnum, son of aššur-bāni, (and) by the son of šu-ilabrat.

akkadian: iš-pu-ru-ni-ku-um a ma-lá a-we-lu iš-pu-ru-ni-ku-ni šu-ma a-wa-tum tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam-ma a-wi-lam kù.babbar lu nu-ša-áš-qí-il₅ iš-tí a-li-ki-im
english: in accordance with what the men wrote to you, if there is a case, then send me word so we may have the man pay the silver.

akkadian: pá-ni-e-ma i-hi-id-ma tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam a-na kà-lá kù.babbar
english: pay attention and send me word with the first transport.

akkadian: lá-qá-im ú-za-kà lá i-ba-ší ku-ra-<gap>
english: do not focus on taking all of the silver.

akkadian: lá i-ša-qal a-<gap>-mì-kà
english: kura will not pay <gap>

akkadian: <gap> ú
english: <gap> and ali-ahum.

akkadian: i-dí-sú-in dumu i-ba-a-a ša a-na ša-lim-a-šur dumu i-sú-rik₁₃ ra-bi-ṣa-am e-hu-za-ni ù ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim{ki} a-na ša-sú-hi-šu il₅-qé-a-ni i-mì-ig-ru-ma ni-iš a-lim{ki} i-na kà-ni-iš it-mu-ú i-dí-sú-in ki-ma a-ha-tí-šu a-hi-šu ù
english: iddin-suen son of ibaya who had hired an attorney against šalim-aššur son of issu-arik, and had received a tablet from the city assembly about his extradition - (those two) settled (their differences) and swore an oath by the city in kanesh.

akkadian: a-ha-at a-bi-šu i-dí-sú-in it-ma ù ša-lim-a-šur a-na hu-bu-ul i-ba-a-a
english: iddin-suen swore on behalf of his sister, his brother and his father's sister.

akkadian: a-bi-šu-nu a-na i-dí-sú-in ù a-hi-šu dumu i-ba-a-a ù-lá i-tù-wa-ar-šu-nu-tí a-hu-um a-na a-hi-im
english: and šalim-aššur must not raise claim against iddin-suen or his brother for the debt of their father ibaya.

akkadian: ù-la i-tù-wa-ar a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-iš
english: the two must not raise claim against each other.

akkadian: dumu i-na-ah-dingir igi hu-ra-ṣí dumu
english: month hubur, eponymy ali-ahum son of inah-ilī.

akkadian: šé-ep-a-lim-ki igi {d}mar.tu-ba-ni dumu ma-na-na igi ṣí-lu-lu dumu ú-ku igi a-ta-dí-a dumu en-na-nim igi a-šur-iš-ta-kál dumu a-šur-sipa igi en-nam-a-šur dumu me-ra-ni <gap> dumu ni-zi-im
english: witnessed by hurāṣī son of šēp-alum, by amurrum-bāni son of manana, by ṣilūlu son of uku, by atadiya son of ennānum, by aššuriš-takal son of aššur-rē'ī, by ennam-aššur son of merani, (by <gap>) son of nizum.

akkadian: igi a-we-li a-ni-ú-tim a-wa-tum a-ni-a-tum i-gi₅-im-r
english: this case was settled before these men.

akkadian: <gap> 20-<gap> túg šu-ra-am a-na 11 gín a-na é kà-ri-im a-dí-i
english: <gap> one dark colored textile i deposited for 11 shekels at the colonial office.

akkadian: nu-kà-al-kà kù.babbar ša i-tur₄-dingir šu-qú-lam-ma urudu-kà šé-ṣí um-ma en-nu-a-šur urudu
english: pay the silver of itūr-ilī and produce your copper." ennam-aššur answered: "there is no more copper.

akkadian: igi a-zu-na-a igi du₁₀-ṣí-li-a-šur a-na a-wa-tim
english: witnessed by šalim-ahum, by azunaya, by ṭāb-ṣill-aššur.

akkadian: a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am igi gír ša a-šur ša ší-bu-tí-ni
english: the durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ú e-na-a-šur dumu šu-ul-mì-im-ša-a-šur a-šur-ma-lik
english: per mina they will add 1.5 shekel of silver per month as interest.

akkadian: dumu ku-ra-ra i-šu a-na 1
english: who of them is financially sound and available is liable for the silver.

akkadian: ša-pár-tim na-du-ú i-lu-ú i ku-nu-uk 3 be-re-e kà-an-ku i-nu-mì kù.babbar il₅-qé-ú-ni du₁₀-a-šùr dumu ili₅-pì-ú-ṣur hu-du-be-lí ir-sú 3 be-ru-ú li-ip-ta-num dumu
english: in the presence of aššur-ennam, son of bur-suen, of ennam-aššur, son of ennum-aššur, of ennam-aššur, son of pilah-ištar. 1280 minas <of copper> kuliya, son of ali-abum, amur-šamaš, son of bēlānum, and ennam-aššur, son of šulmu-ša-aššur owe to aššur-mālik, son of kurara.

akkadian: qar-da-a e-na-a-šur dumu i-ku-pì-a-šur ù
english: month xi of the eponymy of abu-šalim, the trader, son of ilī-ālum.

akkadian: a-mur-{d}utu dumu pì-lá-ah-a-nim i-na
english: per month the will add an interest of 70 minas per (talent).

akkadian: ša-ha-tí-šu-nu i-zi-zu igi a-šur-e-nam dumu
english: who of them is financially sound and available is liable for the copper.

akkadian: bur-sú-in igi e-na-a-šur dumu e-nu-um-a-šur
english: they will weigh the copper with the 10-mina-weight of tarawazi.

akkadian: igi e-na-a-šur dumu pì-lá-ah-ištar 1 li-im 2 me-at 80 ma-na urudu i-ṣé-er ku-li-a dumu a-lá-bi₄-im
english: when they received the copper 3, liptānum, son of qardaya, ennam-aššur, son of ikuppi-aššur, and amur-šamaš, son of pilah-anum, (and) ṭāb-aššur, son of ilī-pī-uṣur, and his slave hudu-bēlī assisted them.

akkadian: a-mur-{d}utu dumu be-lá-nim ù e-na-a-šur dumu šu-ul-mu-ša-a-šur a-šu
english: in the presence of ennam-aššur, son of ennam-aššur, (and) of ennam-aššur, son of pilah-ištar.

akkadian: i-dí-a-bu-um é-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ha-li-a a-hu tù-li iš-a-am a-na
english: iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where šalim-aššur is living, from tudhiliya the brother of tuli.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in igi
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: a-ku-za igi ú-ra-a igi a-šùr-ba-ni
english: witnessed by akuza, by uraya, by aššur-bāni.

akkadian: i-ga-ma-ar i-nu-mì a-na a-lim{ki} pá-<gap>-a-ni igi ú-ra-a igi mar.tu-ba-ni en-na-nam aṣ-ba-at-ma um-ma a-na-ku-ma a-na a-na ku-be <gap> šu-ma a-wa-tám ta-ga-ma-ar al-kam gu₅-mu-ur
english: when we decided to go to the city i seized ennānum with uraya and amurrum-bāni as witnesses, and i said: <gap> if you can conclude the matter, then come and conclude it!

akkadian: ša li-tab-ší-kà a-du-um ša a-gi₅-a ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni šu-ma kù.babbar uš-ta-áš-qí-il₅-šu iš-tí dumu um-me-a-nim a-kà-na-ak-ma
english: concerning the matter of agiya that you wrote about, if i have been able to make him pay the silver i shall seal together with an affiliated trader and send it to you.

akkadian: ú-šé-ba-lá-kum šu-ma kù.babbar lá uš-ta-áš-qí-il₅-šu na-pá-al-tù-šu ma-lá e-pí-li-ni tí-ir-tí i-lá-kà-kum
english: if i have not been able to make him pay the silver, my messages shall come to you with his answer that he gives to me.

akkadian: 17 ma-na lá 7.5 gín i-ṣé-er na-áb-sú-en i-sú-rik₁₃ i-šu
english: nab-suen owes 17 minas less 7.5 shekels (of silver) to issu-arik.

akkadian: ù kù.gi i-na bi-ti-a i-ba-ší
english: the silver and gold is in my house.

akkadian: igi en-nam-a-a igi en-nam-a-šur dumu da-da igi a-šur-na-da dumu a-mur-lu-ṣú
english: witnessed by ennamaya, by ennam-aššur son of dada, by aššur-nādā son of amur-luṣu.

akkadian: ar-ša-tim še-am ar-ša-tim ú kù.babbar a-na ha-ar-pé-e a-ni-ú-tim i-da-an
english: he will pay the barley, the wheat and the silver at this (coming) harvest.

akkadian: 1 túg ku-ta-num sig₅ i li-bi-šu-ma
english: he also owes 1 -textile of good quality.

akkadian: mì-ma a-nim ša wa-áš-ha-ni-a
english: witnessed by alulaya, by enna-suen son of šu-anum.

akkadian: 1 ma-na urudu a-na ša tí-tù-ri-im 1 ma-na urudu a-na é ub-ri-ni 2.5
english: when they built a house in front of the grave where our father is buried, my expense was 2 talents of copper, and 15 minas of copper was the wages of the builder.

akkadian: <gap> ša ku-a-tí ša
english: iddin-aššur and ali-ahum <gap> until today.

akkadian: en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lá-hi-im iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am na-áš-pé-er-tám la pá-tí-tám ú-kà-li-im-šu-ma um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma ṭup-pu-um a-num ku-nu-ku-kà-a lá ku-nu-ku-kà-a a-lá-hu-um iš-ta-al-ma e-pu-ul-šu um-ma a-lá-hu-um-ma ke-na ku-nu-ku-a a-na ša ki-ma
english: ennam-aššur seized us against ali-ahum and showed him a missive that was not opened, and ennam-aššur said: is this tablet under your seal or not?" ali-ahum answered, having investigated it, saying: "yes, it is my seal.

akkadian: a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-in-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: igi be-lá-nim
english: witnessed by bēlānum.

akkadian: 40 ma-na kù.babbar ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu-ú en-um-a-šùr a-na a-lu-a ù e-ni-ša-ri-im i-na ša-lá-tù-ar ku-nu-ki ip-qí-id
english: 40 minas of silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, ennam-aššur entrusted to aluwa and enišārum in šalatuwar under seal.

akkadian: qá-tí-šu-nu i-dí-in a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um wa-ah-šu-ša-na i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša
english: the wahšušana colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: a-né-ma i-ma-da-ad 3
english: he shall measure it out now.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-ú 8 baneš še-am ki e-wa-ar-nim 50 baneš še-am a-lam₅{ki} šu-ut-ma ú-ma-lá ki en-nam-{d}im dumu šu-na-a
english: three tablets. 8 3--measures of barley with ewarnum; 50 3--measures of barley - he himself will complement (it in?) the city - are with ennam-adad, son of šunāya.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur ú a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur-ma a-dí ma-lá ú ší-ni-šu
english: to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: once or twice i sent word to you.

akkadian: tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí a-na en-nam-a-šur qí-bi-ma ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma a-ta-ma ṣú-ba-tu ša dam.gàr i-na ma-a-ma ú i-na ú-ni-ip-sí-im e-zi-ib-ma illat-tum <gap>-šu 1 gín
english: say to ennam-aššur: you wrote me, saying: leave the textiles belonging to the merchant in mamma or in unipsum, and <gap> the caravan <gap> 1 shekel.

akkadian: kišib kà-ri-im ha-hi-im
english: sealed by the hahhum colony.

akkadian: kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma šu-ma šu-be-lúm ù en-na-sú-in me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi₄-im lá i-li-ku-ú-ma iš-tí šál-ma-a-šùr lá i-na-me-ru-ú-ma a-li i-ma-gu₅-ru-ni lá e-ta-wu-ú lu-qú-tám a-na šál-ma-a-šùr ú-šu-ru-ú
english: the colony passed a verdict: if šu-bēlum and enna-suen, iddin-abum's sons, do not leave and meet with šalim-aššur and do not discuss in order to come to an agreement, then they must release the goods to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: a-ba pá-šé-er a-wa-tim
english: aba was the arbitrator.

akkadian: a-a-ar-tim mì-ma a-nim a-na a-šùr-ṣú-lu-li a-dí-in ša-bu
english: all this i gave to assur-sululi, he is satisfied.

akkadian: li-ik-nu-uk-ma li-dí-na-kum ù
english: further, šu-kūbum is not reliable.

akkadian: ší-bi šu-ku-šu-um ki-ma a-šu-mì
english: he must return whatever silver he has taken.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr gán-lam kù.babbar e-tí-qá-ni ša-du-a-tám ú ni-is-ha-tim šál-ma-a-š
english: he has been expelled(?) in accordance with a verdict of the city and the attorneys.

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na ša-ta-na qí-bi-ma a-na-ku a-na ṣé-er ì-lí-dan a-na ku-bu-ur-na-at e-tí-iq-ma wa-ar-ki-tí-ma ma-ma-hi-ir
english: from ennam-aššur to šāt-anna:i have personally travelled to ilī-dan in kuburnat, and after i left man-mahir has taken a wife in marriage.

akkadian: a-ša-tám e-ta-ha-az a-na dur₄-hu-mì-it a-šu-mì-ki e-tí-iq-ma a-wa-tám ni-kà-ša-ad
english: i shall travel to durhumit for your sake, and we shall settle the manner.

akkadian: a-pu-tum a-pu-tum iš-tù qá-sú pá-ni-a-at-ni ih-dí-ma kù.babbar 1 gín i-šu qá-tí-ki lu ša ṣú-ha-ar-tim ša-ṣí-ri-ma i-na qá-tí-ki-ma li-ib-ší
english: urgent, urgent, since he is about to act, do take care and guard every shekel of silver that you have available, as well as those of the girl, and keep it in your own hand.

akkadian: ú-lu e-ra-dí kù.babbar-áp-šu 20 ma-na lu 30 ma-na ṣa-áb-tí-ma bi-za-šu ta-mì-i-ma ù i-na a-lá-ki-a a-na-ku
english: or, as to erradi, seize his silver, whether 20 or 30 minas and make (him) swear in order to and then when i arrive i shall personally advise you.

akkadian: a-ma-li-ki a-pu-tum
english: urgent, guard it!

akkadian: ša-ṣí-ri ú li-bi₄-ki mì-ma
english: also, do not get angry in any way.

akkadian: lá i-lá-mì-in a-na-ku <gap>-tí ú-bi-il₅-ki ta-ha-ší-hi-šu-ma li-dí-nu-ni-ki
english: i myself brought you <gap> if you need it they may give them to you.

akkadian: é.gal-li-im <gap> a-na ha-tim <gap>-um
english: for in your heart you know how earlier i have given you a caravan.

akkadian: <gap> iš-tí <gap> itu.2
english: my dear brother, save me while i can still be saved.

akkadian: a-na-dí-ma kù.babbar 10 ma-na ep-ša-ma ha-ra-nam a-na ṣú-ha-ri-a
english: let him enter the smuggling goods on the narrow track, and let him convert the textiles to silver.

akkadian: dí-in-ma kù.babbar
english: that is why i sent aluwa.

akkadian: 10 ma-na a-ni-ša-am ša-ak-ší-dam ù
english: sell textiles to cover my fees and write a tablet about it.

akkadian: i-a-tí ha-ra-nam dí-nam-ma ù a-na-ku i-na e-lá-i-a ku-a-tí ha-ra-nam lá-dí-na-kum ù ma-lá i-na pá-ni-tim
english: whereas brother or friend has acted in brotherhood with me over every last shekel of silver, they cannot let my smuggling goods be brought in together with their wool.

akkadian: ha-ra-nam a-dí-na-ku-ni li-ba-kà-ma i-de₈
english: clear all my goods and my wool and give me a caravan.

akkadian: a-hi a-ta a-na u₄-mu-ú e-
english: that is why i sent aluwa.

akkadian: kišib kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš
english: seal of the kanesh colony.

akkadian: kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma a-na lu-qú-tim ma-la a-na a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim i-pí-iq-du-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ú-šé-ṣí-ú ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu ša-lim-a-šùr a-na šu-ku-bi-im i-da-an a-na kur-ub-ištar šu-ku-bu-um ú-lá i-tù-a-ar šu-ma
english: the colony has passed a verdict: for all the goods that were entrusted to aššur-bēl-awātim, and which šalim-aššur had taken out, šalim-aššur will give a tablet bearing his seal to šu-kūbum. šu-kūbum will not raise claim against kurub-ištar.

akkadian: a-na šu-ku-bi-im ma-ma-an i-tù-a-ar ša-lim-a-šùr ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if anyone raises claim against šu-kūbum, šalim-aššur will clear him.

akkadian: 4 ší-it-ri en-um-a-šur il₅-qé i-na mì-ma a-nim ša i-na ma-ah-ri-ni
english: the proceeds from 9 and 4 undergarments ennam-aššur received.

akkadian: a-na wa-šu-<gap> šu-ištar dumu šu-ki-tim <gap> i-ša-qal šu-ma i-<gap> kišib lá-bi-<gap> ù a-na <gap> da <gap>
english: if he has not paid within 40 weeks as noted down <gap> šu-ištar son of šukkutum must pay <gap>

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma <gap> ù a-šur-ma-lik-ma 4 gú an.na ku-nu-ki ša a-lim{ki} ú <gap> ku-ta-ni
english: to elamma, say, thus <gap> and aššur-mālik?: 4 talents of tin with seals applied in the city and <gap> -textiles?

akkadian: um-ma ša-lim-a-šur-ma a-na i-dí-a-bi₄-im en-na-nim i-na-ah-dingir a-dí-da en-um-a-šùr a-lá-hi-im ù a-mur-ištar qí-bi-ma an.na-ki
english: from šalim-aššur to iddin-abum, ennā-num, inah-ilī, adida, ennam-aššur, ali-ahum and amur-ištar: my tin and my textiles have come to you from the caravan of anninum's son.

akkadian: ù túg.hi-tù-a iš-tù
english: you have not sent me any silver from that!

akkadian: illat-at dumu a-ni-nim i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí i-na qé-er-bi₄-im kù.babbar mì-ma ú-lá
english: my dear brothers and lords, check my certified tablets and reach an agreement where possible with those of my customers you see.

akkadian: tù-šé-bi₄-lá-nim a-hu-ú-a be-lu-a a-tù-nu ṭup-pé-e-a
english: set terms where you are able to, so you produce my silver for me.

akkadian: u₄-me-e ku-ša-hi-ku-nu ez-ba-ma ba-ab-tí za-ki-a-nim 8 ma-na kù.babbar iš-tí
english: he has held the silver for 4 years. 1 mina owed by šuppun-ahšu - he will pay interest of 20 sacks of grain annually.

akkadian: ma-na iš-tí
english: i do not need the interest.

akkadian: šu-pu-na-ah-šu 20 na-ru-uq še-am i-na ša-tim ú-ṣa-ba-am mì-šu ša a-na
english: or reach an agreement with someone else and take the agreed amount in silver, and let the man from tumliya be responsible for this.

akkadian: kur-ub-ištar dumu a-lá-hi-im tap-pá-i-a
english: my dear lords, save me while i can still be saved.

akkadian: a-šùr-mì-tí i-ša-qal igi ú-ṣur-ša-a-šùr igi sí-ki-le-i igi ir
english: in the presence of uṣur-ša-aššur, of sikile'i, and of wardum.

akkadian: u₄-me-e li-bi-ší-ú-ma šu-ta-áb-lá-ki-ta-šu-nu ma-ma-an
english: do not let anyone else approach (them).

akkadian: ša-ni-am lá tù-ṭá-ha-a
english: do not hesitate for 10 days!

akkadian: a-dí 10 u₄-me-e lá ta-ha-ta-ar a-ṣé-er e-ni-ša-ri-im
english: i have sent uṣur-ša-ištar to enišārum concerning your tin.

akkadian: a-dí an.na-ki-kà ú-ṣú-ur-ša-ištar áš-ta-pá-ar iš-tù za-al-pá
english: when they come back from zalpa, i shall send ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-lu-wa na-áš-ú-ni-kum e-ma-ru-kà
english: your donkeys should be fed.

akkadian: ša-bu-ú ṭup-pé-a iš-tí lá-ma-sà-tim i-ba-ší-ú lu ma-ma-an i-na ša-zu-uz-tí-a ú-kà-al-šu-nu a-dí
english: are my tablets with lamassutum or does someone from my representatives have them in his possession?

akkadian: ma-lá ú ší-ni-šu áš-pu-ra-ku-nu-tí
english: i have written you several times.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im ú-ṣur-ša-ištar ú zu-ku-a qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur-ma 15 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki-a ú-ṣur-ša-ištar ú ṣí-li-a
english: to ali-ahum, uṣur-ša-ištar and zukuwa from damiq-pī-aššur: uṣur-ša-ištar and ṣilliya bring you 15 minas of tin under my seal.

akkadian: a ší-tí kù.babbar-pí-a pì-ri-kà-ni na-ar-bu-tim wa-as-mu-tim ša-ma-ma li-ib-ší
english: buy, soft and pleasant, for the rest of my silver and let them be.

akkadian: šu-ma pí-ri-kà-nu lá-šu kù.babbar i ku-nu-ki-šu li-ib-ší
english: if there are no, then let the silver remain under seal.

akkadian: um-ma bu-zu-a du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur ù a-lá-bu-um-ma a-na en-um-a-šùr ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-ku-nu túg-ṣú-ba-tí-ku-nu nu-na-pì-iš-ma túg-ṣú-ba-tù-ku-nu šál-mu 4 ku-ta-ni
english: from buzuwa, ṭāb-ṣill-aššur and ali-abum to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum: in accordance with your instructions we aired your textiles and your textiles are in order.

akkadian: 12 ša a-ki-dí-e ku-nu-ki ša šál-ma-a-šùr ṣú-ha-ru-kà na-áš-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí 2
english: your servants are bringing you 4 and 12 akkadian ones sealed by šalim-aššur.

akkadian: ku-ta-ni 1 ša a-ki-dí-e 1 ra-qá-tám a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-kà a-na a-lá-bi₄-im ù i-dí-a-šùr
english: we entrusted 2, 1 akkadian one and 1 thin textile to ali-abum and iddin-aššur in accordance with your instructions.

akkadian: ni-ip-qí-id ší-tí túg-ba-tí-kà 14 mu-ta-tum 2 e-li-té-en ku-nu-ki ša šé-ep-ištar ù
english: the rest of your textiles: 14 half-packs and 2 top-packs seald by šēp-ištar and šalim-wardī.

akkadian: ša-lim-wa-ar-dí dingir-pì-lá-ah lá-šu-ma a-na dam dingir-pì-lá-ah igi 3 me-er-e um-mì-a-ni ni-ip-qí-id-ma
english: ilī-pilah is not here so we entrusted them to ilī-pilah's wife witnessed by 3 affiliated traders.

akkadian: ma-lá ù ší-ni-šu
english: make up your own mind.

akkadian: a pá-lá-ší-im i-zi-iz-ma a-ta ma-lá-kà <gap> i-hi-id-
english: take care and make a decision concerning your entrusted goods.

akkadian: a-na šu-ištar qí-bi₄-ma um-ma ì-lí-iš-tí-kál-ma ki-ma ša-nu-a-tí-ni lá a-tù-ra-am
english: to šu-ištar speak, this is what iliš-tikal says: since you were elsewhere i did not come back.

akkadian: šu-ma mì-ma ha-bu-lá-ku-um šu-šál-šu-um lá-áš-qú-ul igi
english: should i owe you anything, i will pay (it) threefold.""

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im a-ni-na ú a-šur-ma-lik um-ma zu-ku-a-ma 30 43 <gap> im am ni ri-ni be-lúm-ba-ni a-na a-<gap>-kà ša ki-ma i-a-tí ú-bi-il₅ a-ha-ma 41 pí-ri-kà-ni ku-nu-ki-a ú anše
english: to ali-ahum, annina and aššur-malik from zukuwa: bēlum-bāni brought 73 -textiles to <gap>, my representative; further, mannum-kī-aššur brought 41 under my seal and black donkeys with 2 under my seal to my representatives - in all: 114 -textiles.

akkadian: 0.8333 ma-na <gap> ú ša 10 ma-na zi-ru-<gap>
english: send me word about how much he seals for you as proceeds from my textiles.

akkadian: i-ma-qá-at be-lúm-ba-ni ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a ú kù.babbar
english: my dear brothers, pay attention to my instructions.

akkadian: ša a ma-lá
english: have (everything) cleared!

akkadian: me-hi-ri-a ša-áš-qí-lá a ma-lá ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a
english: if it is 0.5 shekel each, make him set it on a rider.

akkadian: i-kà-na-ku-nu-tí tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam a-hu-a a-tù-nu
english: send me word whether bēlum-bāni has come or not.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-ak-nu li-li-kam ṭup-pé-e ša nu-a-e ša e-lá-nu e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí-ni kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-lá-šu-nu-ma ú a-lá-hu-um li-il₅-qé a-na a-lá-hi-im
english: to ali-ahum: i left you 0.3333 mina 7 shekels of silver; so, add 10 shekels of silver of your own so it is 0.5 mina 7 shekels silver.

akkadian: qí-bi-ma 0.3333 ma-na
english: as to iddin-aššur, satisfy him!

akkadian: 7 gín k
english: do not leave him.

akkadian: a-na i-dí-a-bi-im i-tur₄-dingir en-na-nim ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma en-nam-a-šur-ma a-šu-mì lu-qú-tim ša a-bi-ni a-na
english: to iddin-abum, itūr-ilī, ennānum and ali-ahum from ennam-aššur: you have written me about dispatching our father's goods.

akkadian: ša-lá-hi-ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni-ni a-na-kam a-da-da iš-tí a-šur-du₁₀ dumu a-zu-za-a i ša-lá-ah-šu-wa i-mì-ig-ru-ma a-na ku-ša-ra a-da-da a-na
english: here adada agreed with aššur-ṭāb son of azuzaya in šalahšuwa, and adada has travelled to kuššara to have the man swear an oath.

akkadian: a-wi-lim ta-mu-im e-tí-tí-iq ma-mì-tám iš-tí a-wi-lim i-lá-qé-ma ú lu-qú-tám ša dumu a-zu-za-a-ma
english: he will get an oath from the man and then he will dispatch the goods of azuzaya's son on the narrow track.

akkadian: ha-ra-an sú-qá-ni-ma i-ša-lá-ah a-ba-ú-a bé-lu-a a-tù-nu šu-ma a-ma-kam a-wa-at kà-ri-im ù e-kál-lim da-na-ma lu-qú-tum a-mì-ša-am lá
english: my dear fathers, if the orders of the colony and the palace are strict there, then we shall not let the goods enter for that destination.

akkadian: li-ší-li-ih bé-lu-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma ṣú-ha-ri-a ṭù-ur-da
english: my dear lords, take care to send my servant.

akkadian: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-na mu-a-tim ta-ad-nu-ma é a-šùr-bé-el-a-wa-tim wa-áš-bu ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni ìr ù tám-kà-ru-šu e-ru-bu-ma um-ma ša ki-ma ili₅-ba-ni-ma ni-kà-sí iš-tí-ni ší-sí-ma um-ma i-dí-a-bu-um-ma ṭup-pí-ku-nu kà-i-lá ù ṭup-pu-a lá-pu-tù-ma i-ba-ší-ú ša-lim-a-šur a-hi li-li-kam-ma iš-tí-šu
english: when iddin-abum was dying and was staying in aššur-bēl-awātim's house, the representatives of ilī-bāni, wardum and his customers, came in(to the house) and ilī-bāni's representatives said: settle accounts with us!" - but iddin-abum answered: "hold your tablets ready, for my tablets are written and available.

akkadian: ší-sí-a ù am-ma ša ki-ma i-a-tí
english: let my brother šalim-aššur come, and then settle with him.

akkadian: šu-{d}en.líl ù a-mur-ištar i-ša-ha-at a-hi-a li-zi-zu a-dí a-hi-i
english: then my own representatives, šu-illil and amur-ištar may assist my brother.

akkadian: a-na e-lam-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma dumu.mí a-šur-dan dumu zi-zi-im ra-bi₄-ṣa-am iš-tù a-lim{ki} ta-aṣ-ba-at-ma ú-ṣa-am a-ma-kam
english: say to elamma, thus šu-bēlum: the daughter of aššur-dān, son of zizum, has obtained an attorney from the city, who has left (and) is staying over there.

akkadian: šu-ma a-na am-tim ú-la é-tí ú-ṭá-hi be-tù ù a-ma-tum ša
english: if he makes an attempt at a slave-girl or the house, the house and the slave-girls belong to the lady!

akkadian: a-wi-il₅-tim a-na ni-ší a-wi-il₅-tim qí-ib-a-ma iš-tí-šu-nu le-ta-wu
english: say to the personnel of the lady that he must negotiate with them.""

akkadian: 13 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-mur-ištar ù a-šur-i-mì-tí
english: iddin-abum owes 13 minas of refined silver to amur-ištar and aššur-imittī.

akkadian: i-šu-ú iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36
english: reckoned from the week of karriya he must pay in 36 weeks.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb igi a-šur-e-mu-qí igi en-nam-a-šur dumu me-na-a
english: witnessed by aššur-emūqi, by ennam-aššur son of menaya.

akkadian: um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr a-na i-dí-a-bi₄-im en-na-nim i-na-ah-dingir a-dí-da en-um-a-šùr a-lá-hi-im ù a-mur-ištar qí-bi₄-ma <gap> a-hu-ú-a be-lu-ú-a a-tù-nu hu-sà-ru-um ik-ri-bu ša a-šùr ha-al-qú
english: from šalim-aššur to iddin-abum, ennānum, inah-ilī, adida, ennam-aššur, ali-ahum and amur-ištar: my dear brothers and lords, the lapis lazuli that is the votive offering of aššur has been lost.

akkadian: i-pá-li-lu lu-ta-me ú ú-nu-tám lu-na-dí-id a-hu-ú-a be-lu-a a-tù-nu i-dí-ku-nu dí-na-ma
english: my dear brothers and lords, you must make an effort and do a favour to aššur and to me.

akkadian: <gap> ma-na kù.babbar a ma-at <gap>
english: furthermore he should give 0.3333 mina to you and <gap> mina of silver.

akkadian: a-li-li <gap> gín kù.babbar ú
english: he will give 5 sacks of barley before the seizing of the sickle.

akkadian: ku-bu-ur ú-ṭí-tí-im i-ša-qú-lu <gap> kù.babbar a-na ša-ni-tim ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu 5 na-ru-uq še-im a
english: as to the tablet concerning 0.3333 mina 2.5 shekels of silver, the debt of the wife of šuliman, lurmea and haššuili and her son - their terms are exceeded by much.

akkadian: ṣí-bi-it ni-ga-lim i-da-an ṭup-pá-am ša
english: seize them and make them pay the silver and its interest.

akkadian: i qá-qá-ad a-ší-tí-šu ú
english: the silver is jointly owed by the three of them.

akkadian: lu-ur-me-a ú ha-šu-i-li ú me-er-e-ša
english: say as follows: <gap> the silver is the debt <gap>" "

akkadian: mì-ma a-na kù.babbar-pì-kà 1 gín li-ba-am lá i-pá-ri-id ú
english: do not worry about a single shekel of your silver, and do not remove trust from your heart.

akkadian: ma-as-hu-ru-tám i-na li-bi-kà lá té-ṭí-ir šu-ma-a-mì-in hu-ru-um a-mì-um pá-té-a-ma ma-a áš-ri-ša-am ú-šu-ra-ku a-dí-mì-in u₄-mì-im a-nim ša a-lu-wa i-li-kà-ni ma-a kù.babbar 10
english: if indeed that opportunity was open for me and i would indeed be free to go there, would then until this day, when aluwa came, at least 10 minas of silver not have come to you quickly with a fast transport?

akkadian: ma-na pá-ni-am-ma iš-tí ba-tí-qí-im lá i-li-kà-ku-ni a-ta-ma tí-de₈-e ki-ma na-ru-qá-at me-ra a-šur šu-um-šu i-na i-dí-im a-mì-im
english: you know very well that they deal with any assyrian's joint-stock capital in that understanding, and that at least 10 minas of good silver results for them.

akkadian: i-ba-šu-lu-ma kù.babbar 10 ma-na sig₅ ú-ṣí-a-šu-nu-tí-ni tí-de₈-ma i-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na ú ša-lá-tù-ar mu-uš-té-bi-lu
english: you know that in wahšušana and šalatuwar those who do business realise at least 10 minas of silver for the capitalists.

akkadian: lá-li-ik-ma iš-tí a-we-lam lá-na-me-er-ma
english: if the iron <gap>

akkadian: 20 ma-na urudu sig₅ i ší-im ku-uk-ra i-ri-ih-ma i-ṣé-er {d}utu-a-bi lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu
english: 20 minas of refined copper that remained from the price for kukra are owed by šamaš-abī to lamassutum.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša e-na-ah-dingir a-na 10 ha-am-ša-tim
english: from the week eponymy of ēnah-ilī within 10 weeks he will pay.

akkadian: i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ku-uk-ra am-tum am-tí
english: if he does not pay the slave-girl kukra is my slave-girl.

akkadian: itu.kam té-i-na-tim li-mu-um šu-sú-in dumu ba-bi₄-lim
english: month x, year eponymy of šu-suen, son of babbilum.

akkadian: igi a-šur-ni-im-ri igi be-lá-nim igi a-mur-a-šur
english: witnessed by aššur-nimrī, by bēlānum, by amur-aššur.

akkadian: 10-tim ú ša-du-a-tám li-qé-a-ma ša ba-ri-ni li-li-kam-ma gír ša a-šur
english: do not fail to produce aššur's dagger in the presence of kuliya and people shall not spare each other!

akkadian: li-it-ma-ma ša-du-a-tám nu-ta-ar-šu-um i-da-ma igi ku-li-a ší-ip-ri-ni gír ša a-šur šé-ṣí-a-ma a-hu-um pá-ni a-hi-im ú-lá ú-ba-al ma-ma-an ha-ra-an sú-ki-nim
english: whoever has brought in loaded donkeys via the -road in order to do business over there, even when he is a resident of a, make him pay 3 shekels of silver per mina and let kuliya personally bring it here.

akkadian: e-ma-re sé-er-dam ú-šé-ri-ba-ni-ma a-ma-kam uš-té-bu-lu-ni lu wa-ší-ib kà-ri-im 1 ma-na-um 3 gín kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-lá-šu-ma ku-li-a
english: if he protests, saying: "i will go to clear myself in kanesh", still make him pay the silver and let him come here afterwards in order to clear accounts with us.

akkadian: kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú šu-qú-ul um-ma šu-ut-ma šu-ma-ba ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-ul a-bi-a tù-kà-al ku-nu-uk a-bi-a a-ma-ar-ma mì-nam a-qá-bi₄ a-ša-qal hu-bu-ul a-bi₄-a igi
english: he answered: "if you really have in your possession a debt-note with the seal of my father i will inspect it and - how could i protest? - i will pay, (for) it is my father's debt".

akkadian: um-ma la-ma-sí-ma a-na a-la-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma mì-šu ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni um-ma a-ta-ma a-ma-kam a-na kù.babbar 1 gín e-né-ki a-hi-e-iš
english: from lamassī to ali-ahum: why have you written me as follows: your eyes are fixed together on every shekel of silver.

akkadian: 1 gín e-né-a a-na-ší-ma ù ú-ša-ra-ší <gap> kà tù-kà lá
english: should then i covet a single shekel of silver and then release her?

akkadian: ta-ša-kán lá ú-ša-ra-ší mì-šu-um a-ma-kam um-ma kà-lá-na-šar a-hu-kà
english: you will not place <gap> and i shall not release her.

akkadian: kišib sú-kà-lí-a dumu a-mur-a-šùr kišib a-ku-za dumu šu-a-nim kišib ú-ra-a dumu
english: seal of sukkalliya son of amur-aššur, seal of akuza son of šu-anum, seal of uraya son of manana.

akkadian: ma-na-na a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave the tablet with our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: qá-tí a-šùr-mu-ta-pì-il₅ ni-dí-in 0.3333 ma-na
english: aššur-imittī took 0.3333 mina of tin.

akkadian: 24 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim
english: iddin-abum owes 24 minas of refined silver to aššur-bēl-awātim.

akkadian: i-šu iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a ù ì-lí-iš-tí-kál a-na 20
english: reckoned from the week of libbaya and iliš-tikal he must pay within 20 weeks.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma ṭup-pu-šu i-la-pu-tù 6 ma-na kù.gi šu-mì a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-la-pá-at
english: if they write his tablet, he must book 6 minas of gold in the name of aššur-bēl-awātim.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-ma-lik igi a-lá-hi-im igi a-mur-ištar igi a-gu-a
english: witnessed by aššur-malik, by alāhum, by amur-ištar, by aguwa.

akkadian: ša-bu a-na en-um-a-šùr ì-lí-ba-ni ú-lá
english: ilī-bāni must not raise claim against ennam-aššur.

akkadian: i-tù-a-ar igi en-na-nim dumu <gap> igi be-li-a igi šé-ep-ištar du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur ta-pá-šu-nu
english: witnessed by ennānum son of <gap>, by bēliya, by šēp-ištar. ṭāb-ṣill-aššur was their (absent) partner.

akkadian: a-bi-a ha-bu-lá-tí kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú im-tí-da-kum
english: the silver and the interest on it has become a great sum for you.

akkadian: igi ni-mar-ištar igi en-um-a-šùr a-šùr-na-da dumu šu-{d}en.líl tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: witnessed by nimar-ištar, by ennam-aššur; aššur-nādā son of šu-illil is our (absent) partner.

akkadian: um-ma šu-hu-bu-ur-ma ù ha-nu-ma a-na a-la-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma a-šu-mì ša a-lu-lá-a ša ta-áš-pu-ru-ni a-na-kam ni-ṣí-ba-sú-ma um-ma né-nu-ma kù.babbar šu-qú-ul
english: from šu-hubur and hanu to ali-ahum: concerning the matter of alulaya that you wrote about, we seized him here and said: pay the silver!" he answered: "but i have sent him the silver.

akkadian: i-ša-qú-lu-šu-um i re-eš₁₅ ṭup-pì-a i-ša-qú-lu-šu-um
english: they shall pay it to him according to my tablet.

akkadian: ša né-zi-bu 5 le-ú 1 gú šu-qú-ul-ta-áš-nu 1 le-um
english: as for the tin we left, 5 bars weighed 1 talent, 1 bar 3.8333 minas.

akkadian: 3.8333 ma-na 2 ma-na urudu a-na ṣú-ha-ri dí-na-ma a-na é ub-ri a-šar
english: give 2 minas of copper to the servants and let them bring it to the inn where the tin is.

akkadian: an.na i-ba-ší-ú lu-ub-lu-nim a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-ku-nu a-na-hi-id
english: i shall pay attention to your instructions.

akkadian: a-na šu-ta-mu-zi e-lá-a a-ba-ba ù lá-ma-sí qí-bi-ma um-ma a-dí-da ù a-lá-hu-um-ma kišib ma-ma-hi-ir dumu a-mur-ištar kišib en-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi₄-im 18.6666 gín 15 še a-ni-qí ša
english: to šu-tammuzi, elaya, abada and lamassī from adida and ali-ahum: under the seal of man-mahir son of amur-ištar (and) enna-suen son of iddin-abum itūr-ilī gave 18.6666 shekels 15 grains in the form of rings of iron to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: a-mu-tim i-tur₄-dingir a-na en-um-a-šur i-dí-in eq-lam a-na-num ù
english: from here and from there it will pass overland in the name of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: ku-ta-ni dam-qú-tim i-tur₄-dingir a-na en-um-a-šur a ší-a-ma-tim i-dí-in a-na-num
english: itūr-ilī gave 0.3333 mina of beads(?) plus 2 good to ennam-aššur for purchases.

akkadian: ù a-lá-num eq-lam a-šu-mì i-tur₄-dingir e-tí-iq a ma-lá
english: from here and from there it will pass overland in the name of itūr-ilī.

akkadian: ṭup-pì-im ha-ar-mì-im ša ú-kà-lu a-ma <gap>
english: in accordance with the certified tablet that i hold <gap>

akkadian: lim ša šál-ma-a-šùr ša ba-áb né-bi-ri-šu
english: get a tablet from the city with this content and send it with tutaya.

akkadian: a-wa-sú iq-bi₄-ú-ma
english: do not cause him any delay.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um a-na i-li-a
english: here we are agreed with tutaya.

akkadian: dumu e-lá-lí pá-aq-du-ni
english: write his name in the tablet from the city.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um šu-ut i-mu-tù-ni ṭup-pá-am ša dí-in
english: to ummaza: take care to assist lā-qēpum and get a tablet from the city.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} le-qé-a-nim-ma ša
english: we too are men capable of doing favours.

akkadian: ki-ma ṭup-pu-um
english: we shall show you one!

akkadian: ša a-na i-li-a
english: tutaya brings a belt for your waist.

akkadian: um-ma a-šur-{d}utu-ši ù da-da-a-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma 1 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-ni
english: from aššur-šamšī and dadaya to ali-ahum: ilī-wēdāku brings you 1 mina of silver under our seals.

akkadian: ili₅-we-da-ak na-áš-a-kum 10 gín hu-sà-ru-um sig₅
english: take 10 shekels of extra-fine lapis lazuli for me.

akkadian: wa-at-ra-am le-qé-a-am ší-tí kù.babbar sà-am-tum mì-iš-lúm kà-bu-tum mì-iš-lúm a-ra-ak-tum lu ra-bi₄-a-at ku-nu-uk-ma a-na ili₅-we-da-ak dí-in-ma iš-tí a-li-ke-e pá-ni-ma
english: for the rest of the silver seal carnelian, half of it heavy, half long - it should be big! - and give it to ilī-wēdāku and send him with the first travellers.

akkadian: ṭur₄-da-šu a-we-el gi₅-mì-li né-nu
english: we are men who can do favours.

akkadian: ša-du-a-sú ša-bu ku-lu-ma-a na-áš-a-kum kù.gi da-mì-iq wa-ta-ar a-na-kam-ma
english: the gold is of extremely good quality, even here it costs 10:1 (in silver).
