akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr ù šu-be-lúm dumu i-dí-a-bi₄-im ni-kà-sí ma-ah-ri-ni i-sí-ú-ma 1 gú 13 ma-na urudu lá-mu-nam i-ṣé-er šu-be-lim ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na šu-be-lim-ma i pì i-sú-sud a-bi₄-a qá-ta-at a-bi₄-kà
english: šalim-aššur and šu-bēlum son of iddin-abum settled accounts before us, and šalim-aššur set down 1 talent 13 minas of bad copper as a claim on šu-bēlum. šalim-aššur said to šu-bēlum: on the orders of issu-arik, my father, i wrote myself as your father's guarantor.

akkadian: al-kam ṭup-pì-a lu-kà-li-im-kà-ma um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma mì-nam we-dam i-a-tí
english: let me show you my tablets!" šu-bēlum answered: "why do you inform only me?

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šur ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave (our testimony) before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: kišib a-šùr-e-mu-qí kišib en-nam-a-šùr dumu me-na-a kišib i-dí-a-bi-im
english: seal of aššur-emūqi, seal of ennam-aššur son of menaya, seal of iddin-abum.

akkadian: ša hu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im 13 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am
english: concerning the debt of iddin-abum of 13 minas of refined silver.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36 ha-am-ša-tim
english: reckoned from the week of karriya he must pay within 36 weeks.

akkadian: ú-ṣa-áb ša a-mur-ištar ù a-šùr-i-mì-tí
english: concerning amur-ištar and aššur-imittī.

akkadian: um-ma i-ku-pí-a-ma a-na en-um-a-šùr i-dí-a-bi-im ù lá-qé-ep qí-bi-ma 10 ma-na kù.babbar ku-nu-ki-a en-um-a-šùr na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí
english: from ikūn-pīya to ennam-aššur, iddin-abum and lā-qēp: ennam-aššur brings you 10 minas of silver under my seal.

akkadian: sà-áp-tí-ni <gap>-bi sig₅ ša tal-ha-at pì-ri-kà-ni na-ar-bu-tim ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a ša-ma-nim-ma šé-bi-lá-nim e-ma-ri-šu a-na <gap> i ša-tim
english: until my servant arrives, with the rest of my silver make a profitable purchase of good from talhat, (and) soft and send them to me.

akkadian: iš-tí tám-kà-ri-a ú <gap> a-na <gap> ih-da-ma <gap>
english: his donkeys <gap> per year together with my customers <gap>

akkadian: a-na kur-ub-ištar i-ku-pì-a šu-ištar a-dí-da ù a-mur-ištar qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na kur-ub-ištar qí-bi-ma a-hi a-ta be-lí a-ta hu-sà-ru-um ik-ri-bu ša a-šùr
english: to kurub-ištar, ikūn-piya, šu-ištar, adida and amur-ištar from šalim-aššur; specifically to kurub-ištar: my dear brother and lord, the lapis lazuli that was the votive offering to aššur has been lost.

akkadian: a ma-lá dí-in a-lim{ki} a-li ra-bi₄-ṣú-um i-pá-li-lu lu-ta-me ù ú-nu-tám lu-na-dí-id ù
english: according to the verdict of the city wherever the attorney interrogates, he may impose an oath and search the goods.

akkadian: šu-ma ba-tí-qum ma-ma-an e-tí-iq ra-bi₄-ṣú-um le-tí-iq-ma ú-nu-tám ša ba-tí-qí-im lu-na-dí-id a-hu-ú-a be-lu-a a-tù-nu
english: also, if anyone has departed with an express caravan, the attorney will travel and search the goods of the express caravan.

akkadian: a-na u₄-mu-ú e-ṭá-ri-im eṭ-ra-ni gi-mì-lam i-ṣé-er
english: my dear brothers and lords, save me while i can still be saved.

akkadian: a-šùr ù i-ṣé-ri-a šu-uk-na
english: do this favour for aššur and for me.

akkadian: a-na kù.babbar a-nim ma-ma-an a-na a-lá-hi-im i-tù-a-ar a-ni-na dumu man-a-na ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if anyone raises claim against ali-ahum for this silver, annina son of puzur-anna will clear him.

akkadian: igi a-šur-ba-ni dumu ku-ta-a igi ili₅-ba-ni dumu a-mur-ištar
english: witnessed by aššur-bāni son of kutaya, by ilī-bāni son of amur-ištar.

akkadian: i-ba-ší-ú mì-ma li-ba-kà
english: do not worry at all.

akkadian: lá i-pá-ri-id ú ša-lim-{d}a-šùr ik-ri-ba-am pu-ta ú pu-i bu-ma-ni a-na a-lim{ki} ha-ra-ni
english: also, šalim-aššur <gap> the votive offering <gap> my journey to the city is approaching.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-na qá-tí-kà lá ma-qí-it a-ni-tám lá a-ni-tám tí-ir-ta-kà
english: send me word whether or not any silver has fallen into your hands.

akkadian: li-li-kam e a-ta-lá-ak-ma li-ba-kà e tù-lá-mì-nam
english: if i do not depart, do not be angry with me.

akkadian: i-hi-id-ma tí-ir-ta-kà li-li-kam
english: take care to send me word.

akkadian: a-ki-a dumu puzur₄-a-šùr <gap> {d}utu-ba-ni dumu en-na-sú-in ma-nu-um-ki-a-šùr dumu a-hu-wa-qar a-wi-lu a-ni-ú-tum da-a-nu
english: akiya, son of puzur-aššur, šamaš-bāni, son of ennam-suen, (and) mannum-kī-aššur, son of ahu-waqar - these gentlemen were the judges.

akkadian: i-bé-el iš-tí kù.babbar
english: he is held by the silver.

akkadian: i-dí-a-bu-um é-tí ša bu-ri-im a-šar ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu iš-tí tù-ud-ha-li-a a-hu tù-li iš-a-am a-na
english: iddin-abum has bought the houses by the well, where šalim-aššur is living, from tudhaliya the brother of tuli.

akkadian: 10 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša {d}utu-ba-ni ù a-šur-ma-lik a-na ha-mu-uš-tim ša ta-la-kà-ni ú-šé-ba-lam
english: 10 shekels of refined silver he will send to me reckoned from the week eponymy of of šamaš-bāni and aššur-mālik not later than the coming week-eponymy.

akkadian: šu-ma lá uš-té-bi₄-lam 15 gín kù.babbar
english: should he not send it to me then he will pay 15 shekels of silver.

akkadian: i-ša-qal igi en-na-nim igi a-šùr-mu-ta-pí-il₅
english: in the presence of ennānum, of aššur-mutappil.

akkadian: i-a-am ú 2 <gap> ú 2 gín 2 ma-na 3 gín qá-dum
english: also, 2 <gap> and 2 shekels <gap> imdī-ilum brought you 2 minas 3 shekels including its transport tariff.

akkadian: a-na sú-ú-a-a ù
english: to sūaya and ennam-aššur.

akkadian: en-um-a-šur ki a-šur-i-dí
english: seal of aššur-idī.

akkadian: 15 gín kù.babbar en-nam-a-šùr a-na ú-ṣú-ur-pì-a-šur
english: 15 shekels of silver ennam-aššur gave to uṣur-<pī>-aššur.

akkadian: i-na-ah-dingir igi ša-lim-ištar igi a-šùr-<gap> igi ma-sà-a-a igi a-šùr-ma-lik
english: in the presence of ēnah-ilī, of šalim-ištar of aššur-<gap> of mas(s)āya, of aššur-mālik

akkadian: 18 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er ki-da-ah-šu ù me-er-i-šu
english: kid-ahšu and his sons owe 18 shekels of silver to ali-ahum.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um i-šu 6 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lam še-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tum i-na ha-ar-pé-e i-ma-da-ad 15 gín kù.babbar iš-tí ha-ar-šu-um-nu-ma-an 5 na-ru-uq mì-iš-lúm še-um mì-iš-lam₅ ar-ša-tim i ha-ar-pé-e
english: he will measure out 6 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat at harvest time. 15 shekels of silver is owed by haršumnuman; he will measure out 5 sacks (of grain), half barley, half wheat, at harvest time.

akkadian: i-ma-da-ad kù.babbar a-ni-am
english: waldi-ilum gave this silver.

akkadian: wa-al-dí-dingir i-dí-in igi ha-pu-a-šu igi ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur
english: witnessed by happu-aššu, by mannum-balum-aššur.

akkadian: 17 ma-na hu-sá-ru-um 21 gú urudu sig₅ 8 anše ṣa-lá-mu ù ú-nu-sú-nu 20 ma-na ší-ku-um 1 me-at 10 ṣí-pá-ra-tum a-na iš-ri-šu ší-na-tum mì-ma a-nim a-na ma-ma-hi-ir
english: 17 minas of lapis lazuli, 21 talents of good copper, 8 black donkeys and their harness, 20 minas of šikku-copper, 110 bronze pins, 10 sets of teeth — all this salim-aššur entrusted to man-mahir.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr ip-qí-id a-na ší-a-ma-tim <gap>
english: man-mahir brought it away for purchases.

akkadian: ma-ma-hi-ir ú-bi-il₅ igi en-na-sú-en dumu i-ku-a igi sá-li-a dumu i-dí-a-šùr igi sig₅-pì-a-šùr igi a-šùr-na-da dumu en-um-a-šùr
english: witnessed by enna-suen son of ikuwa, by salliya son of iddin-aššur, by damiq-pi-aššur, by aššur-nada son of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-ša-dí-dingir a-mur-ištar du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr ì-lí-a-lim a-nu-pí-a ù a-ba-ba-a-a-i a-na ku-li-a qí-bi-ma a-wa-tí-kà ša
english: thus aššur-šad-ilī, amur-ištar, ṭāb-ṣilli-aššur, ilī-anum, anuppiya, and ababayai, say to kuliya: we have settled your affair concerning sabasiya's house, includeing the setting of a term for you.

akkadian: é sà-ba-sí-a qá-du-um ša u₄-mu-kà ša-ak-nu-ni ni-ig-mu-ur-ma a-ṣé-er kù.babbar ù
english: and in addition to the silver and gold you had left behind we borrowed 1.3333 mina from ṭāb-aššur, son of ṭāb-ilī, at an interest of 7 shekels per mina.

akkadian: 7 gìn a-na ṣí-ib-tim ni-il₅-qé-ma kù.babbar nu-ša-bi₄-šu-nu-ma
english: your wife has sealed (the debt-note) together with us, (dated to) the ivth month of the eponymy of dān-ea.

akkadian: kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú šé-bi₄-lá-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-ni
english: confirm our claim on it, then it is you who can make the purchases and we will establish our claim on them.

akkadian: šu-hu-bu-ur i-da-na-ku-nu-tí-ni i-na li-bi ṭup-pí-a šu-uk-na-ma i-na ku-nu-ki-ku-nu
english: and the bundle should remain with ali-ahum under my seal until i arrive.

akkadian: ku-un-kà ú ri-ik-sú-um i-na ku-nu-ki-a a-dí tí-ir-tí i-lá-kà-ni a-šar a-lá-hi-im li-ib-ší a-šu-mì kù.babbar
english: five times i have sent word to you concerning iddin-aššur's silver, but you have written nothing to me to inform me.

akkadian: ša i-dí-a-šur a-dí ha-am-ší-šu tí-ir-tí i-li-kà-ku-nu-tí ú a-tù-nu mì-ma-ša-ma lá ta-áš-pu-ra-nim-ma
english: you have not sent me word to inform me whether he has paid the silver and its interest or not.

akkadian: a-na a-šur-sig₅ qí-bi₄-ma um-ma a-bu-ša-lim-ma a-na-kam áš-kà-pu ša a-na lú-ùh-ra-ah-na ha-bu-lu-ni maš-kà-am ša gu₄ iš-tí a-mu-ri-e il₅-qé-ú-ma 1.5 ma-na 5
english: to aššur-damiq from abu-šalim: the leatherworkers here who owe <gap> to luhrahna have received the hide of an ox from the amorites, and i am the guarantor for 1 ½ mina 5 shekels of copper.

akkadian: gín urudu a-na-ku qá-ta-tù-um ù ší-ni-am i-a-tí
english: also, they promised <gap> for me, (but) they have given me nothing.

akkadian: iq-bi₄-ú-nim mì-ma la i-dí-nu-nim a-na-kam a-mu-ri-ú
english: here the amorites seized (them) with you as witness.

akkadian: ma-ah-ri-kà-ma iṣ-bu-tù a-ma-kam ṣa-ba-sú-nu-ma urudu li-dí-nu-ni-ku-um
english: seize them there and have them give you the copper.

akkadian: pá-šu-um a-na ša-pá-ar-tim na-dí
english: an ax has been deposited as security.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma ù kur-ub-ištar qí-bi-ma um-ma i-dí-a-šur-ma 2 gú 10 ma-na an.na ku-nu-ki 50 túg ku-ta-ni qá-de₈ ša li-wi-tim 3 anše ṣa-lá-me-e mì-ma a-nim
english: say to elamma and to kurub-ištar, thus iddin-aššur: 2 talents 10 minas of tin under seals, 50 -textiles, including those for wrapping (the tin), 3 black donkeys - all this ēnah-ilī entrusted to me (for transport).

akkadian: e-na-ah-dingir ip-qí-dam mì-li-ik lu-qú-tí-ku-nu mì-il-kà
english: consider what to do with your merchandise.""

akkadian: 14 gú urudu sig₅ ša-bu-ra-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur dumu dan-a-šur puzur₄.ištar a-hi-šu ù i-ku-pí-a dumu a-šur-i-mì-tí iš-ma-a-šur i-šu
english: iddin-aššur son of dan-aššur, puzur-ištar, his brother, and ikūn-pīya son of aššur-imittī owe 14 talents of good broken copper to išim-aššur.

akkadian: i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ù ke-ni-šu-nu
english: they are jointly liable for the copper.

akkadian: ra-ki-is igi a-mur-a-šur dumu a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim igi sú-in-sipa dumu a-mur-ištar
english: witnessed by amur-aššur son of aššur-bēl-awātim, by suen-rē'ī son of amur-ištar.

akkadian: i-na té-er-tí-a i-da-an-šu-nu-tí ša 3
english: he will give it to them by my instruction.

akkadian: gín kù.babbar sí-ba-ra-tim a-na ah-ša-lim
english: for 3 shekels of silver for ah-šalim.

akkadian: i-na ṣé-ri-a i-dí-ú-ni mì-ša-al kù.babbar
english: for half the silver the terms have expired.

akkadian: i-na 10 ma-na kù.babbar ša ta-ad-mì-iq-tí-šu ša ṭup-pì-a ha-ar-mì-im ša šu-ku-bi₄-im <gap> dumu e-lá-lí 5 ma-na
english: of the 10 minas of silver from his in my certified tablet belonging to šu-kūbum son of elāli he has received 5 minas of silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar il₅-qé igi a-ší-tí-šu igi me-er-i-tí-šu gu₅-ba-áb-tim igi e-lá-lí me-er-i-šu
english: witnessed by his wife, by his daughter, the priestess, by elāli, his son.

akkadian: ra-bi-ṣú-um ša ša-lim-a-šùr a-na en-um-a-šùr ú a-lá-hi-im me-er-e ša-lim-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma ra-bi-ṣú-ma ṭup-pá-am ša a-bu-ku-nu kù.babbar i-na li-bi-ku-nu i-dí-ú-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am um-me-a-nu a-bi-ku-nu ú-kà-i-lu-ni-ma i-na ma-ha-ar kà-ri-im um-me-a-nu iš-ku-nu-šu-ni kà-ru-um i-a-tí
english: šalim-aššur's attorney seized us against ennam-aššur and ali-ahum, šalim-aššur's sons, and the attorney said: your father's investors kept the tablet stating which silver your father set down as owed by you, and the investors placed it in front of the colony.

akkadian: ip-qí-id-šu ba-a-nim a ma-lá
english: the colony entrusted it to me.

akkadian: il₅-qé šu-ma a-šur-ma-lik a-na bu-zi-a i-tù-ar šu-ištar
english: if aššur-malik raises claim against buziya, šu-ištar will clear him.

akkadian: igi da-dí-a igi {d}utu.du₁₀ igi tù-ta-a {d}utu-e-nam
english: witnessed by dādiya, by šamaš-ṭāb, by tutaya. šamaš-ennam.

akkadian: ra-bi₄-ṣú-um ub-lam-ma
english: which day are you waiting for?

akkadian: ù a-tù-nu a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim sà-ah-ra-tù-nu a-am
english: you (plur.) do not come and clear the affairs of your paternal house, and the eponymn tries to seal up the house.

akkadian: u₄-ma-am tù-qá-a la ta-lá-ka-nim-ma é a-bi₄-ku-nu
english: urgent, if you are truely my brother, don't you keep hearing there that conditions here are harsh?

akkadian: lá tù-za-kà-a ù a-na-kam li-mu-um é-tám ik-ta-na-na-ak a-pu-tum šu-ma
english: do you not know that our father left me in an empty house, so we have to borrow money for food for the household to have something to eat?

akkadian: a-hi a-ta a-ma-kam lá ta-áš-ta-na-me-e
english: why do you not send me a single shekel silver in my name in a shipment?

akkadian: ki-ma da-nu-tù-ni ki-ma a-bu-ni e-zi-bi₄-ni
english: if you are truly my brother - as for me, whom can i look to apart from you?

akkadian: ú-ku-ul-tí nu-ha-bu-lu-ma
english: conditions are harsh in the city.

akkadian: ni-ku-lu kù.babbar 1 gín šu-mì a-hi
english: urgent, as you hear my letter, clear yourselves, set out and come and save your father's house.

akkadian: a-na-ku-ba a ma-nim da-nu-tum a-lim{ki} ki-ma ṭup-pì za-ki-a-nim-ma é
english: if aluwa attends to you there, let him do so - or if that is not the case - hand him over for a working capital and send me the working capital .

akkadian: iṭ-ra-a a-na be-ú-lá-tim dí-šu-ma be-ú-lá-tí ra-qá-tám
english: also, he owes me 13 shekels of silver - seize him and have him pay the silver and send it.

akkadian: ar-be i-na-mì-tim ru-pu-ša ga be im <gap>
english: adida brings you a thin textile, four cubits wide and ten long, under my seal. <gap> adida.

akkadian: ku-lu-ma-a en-um-a-šur ub-lam šà.ba 2
english: two of these are abarnian ones, one is -textile.

akkadian: <gap> ša-ma <gap>-dí-na
english: <gap> that šalim-aššur left behind <gap> let us go to the city.

akkadian: a-lá-hu-um-ma a-hu-kà-ma ba-a-nim ma-lá a-bi₄ kù.babbar
english: do not obstruct me." ennam-aššur answered the attorney ababa: "i submit to the tablet of the city and the attorney of my lord.

akkadian: i ṭù-pì-im il₅-pu-tí-ni lá-áš-qúl-ma ù
english: yesterday you questioned me and i answered you, saying: 'when my father died in durhumit i was not present.

akkadian: a-na a-lim{ki}
english: my brother ali-ahum took care of my father.

akkadian: lá-zi-iz-ma kù.babbar
english: even today let us depart for the city.

akkadian: kù.babbar ma-lá a-bu-šu
english: yesterday you questioned me and i answered you as follows: 'come along!

akkadian: ù tù-na-ni-a al-kam ba-a-nim
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša igi šu-ga-ri-a-e ša
english: the tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'u of aššur.

akkadian: a-šur wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ha i-dí-ni-ma ší-bu-tí a-dí-in
english: the station at šamuha gave me and i gave my testimony.

akkadian: a-na a-dí-da ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pì-i-a-šur 14 gín kù.babbar a-mur-ištar
english: to adida and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: our own amur-ištar owes me 14 shekels of silver.

akkadian: ni-a-um ha-bu-lam kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-lá-šu-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: make him pay the silver and send it to me.

akkadian: 1 túg sig₅ zu-zu-a
english: zuzuwa brings you 1 good textile.

akkadian: na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí ṣú-ba-tám dí-na-ma kù.babbar ku-un-kà-ma šé-bi-lá-nim
english: sell the textile, seal the silver and send it to me.

akkadian: zu-zu-a lá i-sà-hu-ur
english: zuzuwa must not delay.

akkadian: 2 ṣú-ba-tí-šu na-ší
english: he carries 2 textiles of his.

akkadian: ṣú-ba-tí-šu dí-na-ma lá i-sà-hu-ur ṭur₄-da-ni-šu
english: sell his textiles and send him without delay.

akkadian: a-hu-a a-tù-nu i-ih-da-ma lu ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a lu ša a-mur-ištar kù.babbar ku-un-kà-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim a-na a-dí-da qí-bi-ma
english: my dear brothers, take care to seal both the proceeds from my textiles and those of amur-ištar in silver and send it to me.

akkadian: a-pu-tum we-da-ku i-dí-in-{d}mar.tu
english: to adida: urgent, i am alone.

akkadian: iš-tí zu-zu-a ṭur₄-da-nim iš-tí kà-ni-<gap>
english: send iddin-amurrum together with zuzuwa.

akkadian: i-a-am ma <gap> be-ú-lá-tù <gap> a-ha-ma 10 gín kù.babbar <gap> i-na ha-hi-im
english: with <gap> mine <gap> working capital <gap> also, 10 shekels of silver <gap> in hahhum.

english: we take responsibility for their forced transfer." let the men there be extradited together with šēp-ištar, our messenger, and you must be the executive arm for our messenger."

english: i shall not obstruct you." witnessed statement."

akkadian: šu-ma a-ha-tí a-tí a-wa-tim sà-ra-tim lá ta-áš-ta-na-pá-ri-im a-na kù.babbar mì-ma lá ta-ša-pá-ri-šu-um
english: he tells me: 'since, not being my maid, she refuses to come here, you must not mention her name to me again, lest you will no longer be my sister!' why are others ruling your children and your household, while you are staying there?

akkadian: a-šu-mì kù.babbar aq-bi-šu-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma
english: please do not make your children perish and do not estrange me from the gentleman's house.

akkadian: gi₅-mì-lam₅ i-ṣé-er um-mì-ša ú-ul a-hi-ša lá-áš-ku-un ú-ul
english: the day pilah-ištar arrived here, since you had not accompanied him, he felt very unhappy and for five days did not leave his house.

akkadian: a-hu-a a-tù-nu be-lu-a a-tù-nu ih-da-ma ṭup-pá-am da-na-am le-qé-a-nim ki-ma kù.babbar 1 gín lá i-ru-qí-ni-ma a-ma-kam a-na a-hi-a <gap>-tim dí-na
english: my dear brothers and lords, take care and get hold of a strong tablet, so that not a single shekel of silver will elude me, and there give <gap> to my brothers <gap>

akkadian: um-ma šu-be-lúm-ma a-na en-na-sú-in ú a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma 11 túg qá-du-um ša ṣú-ha-ri-im ú ší-na ma-áš-ku-nu zu-ba ù {d}im-ba-ni
english: from šu-bēlum to enna-suen and ali-ahum: zuba and adad-bāni, the smugglers, bring you 11 textiles, including those belonging to the servant, and two covers.

akkadian: ṣú-ha-ru-um lá i-sà-hu-ur ṭù-ur-da-ni ša 1 gín kù.babbar
english: buy shoes for 1 shekel of silver and some shoes for women and send them.

akkadian: ší-ni-in ú šé-na-tim ša sí-ni-iš-tim ša-ma-ma šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: urgent, as for the textiles, sell them as well as you can.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma šu-ut-ma a-na šu-be-lim ù en-na-sú-in-ma kù.babbar 1 gú ù 2 gú a-na hu-bu-ul a-bi₄-ku-nu
english: šalim-aššur seized us and said to šu-bēlum and enna-suen: i have paid some 1 or 2 talents of silver for your father's debt out of my joint-stock capital.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} i-ba-ší-ú šu-ma-ba i li-bi₄ a-bi₄-ni ta-áb-tù-ra-am ša-al-ma-am i-na a-lim{ki} lá-qá-am lá ta-mu-a um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma a-na šu-be-lim-ma kù.babbar ša eq-lim a-na-ku pá-hu-ra-am qá-bi₄-a-ku mì-šu-um
english: if indeed you can establish anything as owed by our father, will you refuse to take it complete in the city?" šalim-aššur answered šu-bēlum: "i have personally promised to collect the silver that is in anatolia.

akkadian: a-šùr ni-dí-in igi a-ku-za igi lá-li igi šu-ku-bi₄-im
english: witnessed by akuza, by lalum, by šu-kūbum, by aššur-imittī, by itūr-ilī.

akkadian: 4 ku-ta-ni ša qá-tim 3 túg tí-sà-bi ša na-ah-ri-a 5 túg ni-ib-ra-ru ša za-al-pá 3 ma-na an.na 1 pí-ri-kà-nu-um ša kà-ni-iš mì-ma a-nim tám-kà-ru-um a-na šu-ištar <gap> ú <gap>
english: 4 of ordinary quality, 3textiles from nahria, 5 -textiles from zalpa, 3 minas of tin, 1 from kanesh - all this the merchant gave to šu-ištar. <gap> witnessed by kura, by aššur-šamšī.

akkadian: igi ku-ra igi a-šur-{d}utu-ši a-ha-ma 2 ší-it-ru 4.5 túg wa-dí-ú-tum ša a-na-na a-na šu-ištar a-na ší-a-ma-tim ta-dí-in igi a-wi-li a-ni-ú-tim
english: further, 2 undergarments, 4.5 -textiles belonging to anna-anna were given to šu-ištar for purchases.witnessed by these men.

akkadian: kà-ru-um ha-hu-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma šu-ma šu-be-lúm ù en-na-sú-in me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi₄-im <gap> a-na kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš{ki} lá i-li-ku-ma iš-tí šál-ma-a-šùr lá i-na-me-ru-ú-ma a-li i-ma-gu₅-ru-ni lá e-ta-wu-ú lu-qú-tám a-na šál-ma-a-šùr ú-šu-ru-ú
english: the hahhum colony has passed a verdict: if šu-bēlum and enna-suen, iddin-abum's sons, do not go to the kanesh colony and do not meet with šalim-aššur and do not discuss in order to come to an agreement, then they must release the goods to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: 0.8333 ma-na a-na kà-tù-ú
english: i paid 0.8333 mina to katu.

akkadian: áš-qúl 0.3333 ma-na 5 gín a-na eb-lá-i-im
english: i paid 0.3333 mina 5 shekels to the man from ebla.

akkadian: áš-qúl mì-ma a-nim a-šu-mì a-mur-{d}utu áš-qúl
english: i paid all this in the name of amur-šamaš.

akkadian: a-ha-ma 1 ma-na kù.babbar i-ší-im sú-ub-ri-im pá-tim ki-ma i-a-tí i-tur₄-dingir il₅-qé
english: further, itūr-ilī took on my behalf 1 mina of silver from the price of the first slave.

akkadian: mì-ma a-nim a-šu-mì šu-ištar ú-ša-qí-il₅
english: all this i paid for the sake of šu-ištar.

akkadian: ù na-bi-zu al-pu-ut-ku-nu a-hi a-ta šu-ma a-ha-tí-a i-na a-lim{ki} ap-lam tal-qé-a-am tí-ir-ta-kà za-ku-tum iš-tí a-zu-ú wa-bi-il₅ ṭup-pí-im li-li-kam-ma li-bi
english: my dear brother, if my sister has acquired an heir in the city, then let an exhaustive report come here with azu, the one who brings (this) letter, so i shall be happy.

akkadian: dan-a-šùr sí-ki e-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi₄-im ú-kà-al-ma a-na ha-nu dumu i-tur₄-dingir a-na qá-ta-tim
english: dan-aššur detains enna-suen son of iddin-abum and he gave him to hanu son of itūr-ilī as guarantor.

akkadian: i-dí-šu um-ma dan-a-šùr-ma a-wi-lam tù-ta-ra-am
english: dan-aššur said: you will return the man.

akkadian: šu-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ša-ba-e tí-šu bi-lam-ma ṭup-pá-am du-uk a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-ìš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in igi na-zi igi puzur₄-a-na igi ah-ša-lim
english: but if you have a quittance, then bring it and invalidate the tablet." the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.witnessed by nazi, by puzur-anna, by ah-šalim."

akkadian: li-bé-e da-da-a i-na kà-ni-iš i-ša-qal igi
english: witnessed by adad-bāni, by our own amur-ištar.

akkadian: {d}im-ba-ni igi a-mur-ištar ni-a-im kù.ki a-ma-kam li-iš-qú-lá-ku-ma a-dí a-lá-kà-ni
english: have him pay the gold there to you and let it remain there until i come.

akkadian: li-ib-ší šu-ma i tí-ki-ir-kà a-na da-ni-tim pí-kà dí-šu-um
english: if he contests it with you, then give him a harsh talking-to.

akkadian: a-na ku-ku-a en-na-sú-in ù ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur qí-bí-ma um-ma šu-ištar-ma a-ma-kam a-am-tám sà-ni-qá-ma i-na ú-zi-ni-im e té-pu-uš-ma nu-a-am e
english: say to kukua, ennam-suen and uṣur-ša-aššur, thus šu-ištar: keep the maid there under conrol and let her not operate in uzinum and not affect the native anatolian.

akkadian: ta-al-pu-ut a-ni-ša-am ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma ší-it-ma šu-up-ra-ma ší-me-a ma-ma-an
english: she wrote me here as follows: 'send (somebody) to collect the price due to me'.

akkadian: li-il₅-qé a-hu-a-tù-nu a-ma-kam am-tám sà-ni-qá-ma ú sí-li-a-ší-ma um-ma a-tù-nu-ma a-na ṣé-er be-li-ki-i i-ra-de₈-ú-ki
english: may dear colleagues, keep the maid there under control and cheat her by telling her: 'one will conduct you to your lord.

akkadian: lu sà-he-er-tí-ki lu kù.babbar 1 gín tí-šu-i pá-hi-ri-ma ki a-li-ki-im pá-ni-ma a-na ṣé-er be-li-ki-i ta-li-ki a-na-ma tù-pá-hu-ru-ni ṣú-ba-sà-a ù ša qá-qí-dí-ša-a eṭ-ra-ma a-na ta-al-ha-tí-i-im dí-na-ší
english: collect your small goods and any silver you have and then you will go to your lord with the first caravan!' and as soon as she is gathering her belongings deprive her of her garment and her head-dress and sell her to somebody from talhat.

akkadian: a-na dumu a-šùr ù dumu kà-né-eš
english: do not sell her to an assyrian or to a citizen of kanesh.

akkadian: lá ta-dá-ší ha-li-qá-áš ù ma-at kà-né-eš lá i-na-mar
english: get rid of her and she shall never (again) be seen in the land of kanesh!""

akkadian: a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà-ma lá i-lá-kam ma-lá-ma kù.babbar 10 gín ba-áš-tám ú-lá ar-ta-áš-a-kum ù gi₅-mì-lá-kà
english: have i not acquired dignity for you worth just 10 shekels of silver, and have i not been able to return your favours?

akkadian: gi₅-im-mì-lá-kà ta-ú-ra-am <gap> ki-ma ṭup-pí <gap> a-nim ta-ša-me-ú ṭup-pá-am <gap> ša ṣú-ha-ri-im
english: when you hear this letter <gap>, the tablet <gap> of the servant give it to lalūm's son so he may bring it.

akkadian: um-ma i-ku-pì-a-ma a-na en-um-a-šur la-qé-pì-im i-dí-a-bi₄-im ù {d}im-pí-lá-ah qí-bi₄-ma 10 ma-na
english: from ikūn-pīya to ennam-aššur, lā-qēpum, iddin-abum and adad-pilah: ennam aššur has brought you 10 minas of refined silver.

akkadian: kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am en-um-a-šur ub-la-ku-nu-tí ša
english: buy good tin for 2 minas of silver and seal that seperately.

akkadian: ša-ma-nim-ma a-ha-ma ku-un-kà-ni-šu ša
english: to ennam-aššur: you owe 40 minas of good tin.

akkadian: ší-tí kù.babbar ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a ša-ma-nim a-na
english: my dear brother, send me the tin with the first transport as a favour to me.

akkadian: en-um-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma 40 ma-na an.na
english: my dear brothers, take care that my servant is not delayed.

akkadian: sig₅ i li-bi₄-kà a-hi a-ta an.na dá-mì-iq-ma iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-e-ma šé-bi₄-la-nim a-hu-a a-tù-nu
english: susaya son of šukkutum owes me 0.3333 mina 3 shekels of refined silver; from the month ša-kēnātim he is to pay in 30 days; eponymy buzutaya.

akkadian: ih-da-ma ṣú-ha-ri
english: it draws interest from him.

akkadian: lá i-sà-hu-ur 0.3333 ma-na 3 gín
english: i hold the tablet with my witnesses from the gate of the god.

akkadian: kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am sú-sà-a dumu
english: make him pay the silver and its interest.

akkadian: šu-ki-tim ha-bu-lam itu.kam ša ke-na-tim a-30 u₄-me i-ša-qal li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a
english: if there is any silver and its interest then let him give it to you, even though he may raise objections to you.

akkadian: a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-lá-ak-šu-um ṭup-pá-am ša ší-bi₄-a ša ba-áb dingir ú-kà-al kù.babbar ú
english: if he (pretends that he) has not become indebted to me, then open my tablets and send me the memoranda written in the name of erišum.

akkadian: ṣí-ba-sú ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma mì-ma kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú li-dí-na-ku-nu-tí-ma
english: place the tablet of ikūn-pī-ištar among my tablets and after that you four must seal.

akkadian: da-na-sú li-iq-bi₄-a-ku-nu-tí šu-ma lá i-ta-ah-ba-lam ṭup-pè-a pè-té-a-ma ta-ah-sí-sà-tim ša šu-mì i-ri-ší-im lá-áp-tù šé
english: ask ennam-aššur about a tablet concerning 2.5 minas of silver where the creditor's name has been declared, and send it to me.

akkadian: 5 gín kù.babbar i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi-i
english: ennam-aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to luzi.

akkadian: i-šu 1 túg ku-ta-na-am a-na ša-na-at iš-tù a-lim{ki} ša 5 gín kù.babbar
english: he will bring one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver up here from the city within one year.

akkadian: ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am iš-tù a-lim{ki} ú-lá uš-té-li-am 10 gín kù.babbar a-na-kam
english: if he has not brought a up here from the city in one year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here.

akkadian: i-ša-qal itu.kam té-i-na-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí sà-an-gu₅-um
english: month tē'inātum, eponymy elāli, the high priest.

akkadian: igi a-ta-ta igi lá-qé-ep
english: witnessed by atata, by lā-qēp.

akkadian: 2 me-at 7 ma-na urudu ší-kam ša i-ṣé-er i-tur₄-dingir ù e-lá-li dumu me-er-e puzur₄-a-na šál-ma-a-šur i-šu-ú urudu ki-ma šál-ma-a-šur en-um-a-šur me-ra-šu
english: 207 minas of šikku-copper that itūr-ili and elāli sons of puzur-anna owe to šalim-aššur — on behalf of šalim-aššur his son ennam-aššur has received the copper.

akkadian: il₅-qé ṭup-pu-um ša 2 me-at 7 ma-na urudu ša
english: any tablet concerning 207 minas of copper which may turn up is invalid.

akkadian: e-li-a-ni sà-ar igi šu-bé-lim dumu šu-ištar igi a-šur-re-ṣí dumu lugal-sú-in igi zu-ku-a dumu a-šur-i-dí
english: witnessed by šu-bēlum son of šu-ištar, by aššur-rēṣī son of šar-suen, by zukuwa son of aššur-idī.

akkadian: a-na ša-lim-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma en-nam-a-šur-ma ša ki-ma ku-a-tí a-na é-tí-kà e-ru-bu-ma ṭup-pí-kà ip-té-ú-ma ṭup-pá-am ša hu-bu-ul ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur ù a-šùr-du₁₀ ú-šé-li-ú-ma a-na a-bu-a ni-ip-qí-du a-ma me-he-er-šu puzur₄-tí-a-am-tim
english: to šalim-aššur from ennam-aššur: your representatives entered your house, opened for your tablets and took out the tablet concerning the debt of uṣur-ša-aššur and aššur-ṭāb and we entrusted it to abuwa.

akkadian: a-šur-i-mì-tí dumu a-ta-a-a ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur <gap> a-bu-a ú ší <gap>-ir a-šùr-du₁₀ dumu sá-da-a <gap>-ha-am áš-ta-na-pá-ar-ma a-lá-kam ú-lá i-mu-a a-dí a-e-im u₄-mì-im tí-dí-a-tù-šu <gap>
english: now, (listen to) its copy: puzur-ti'amtum, aššur-imittī son of ataya and uṣur-ša-aššur <gap>abuwa <gap> i keep writing aššur-ṭāb son of sadaya <gap> but he will not come.

akkadian: ù a-na qá-ba-im igi ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ú-lá iš-hu-ut mì-nam
english: for how long <gap> and he was not afraid to speak before your representatives.

akkadian: ma-da-tim lu-lá-pí-ta-kum iš-tù ma-ar-ṣa-am li-bi-im ú a-ší-ra-am ú-lá ni-ir-ta-ší a-bi a-ta tí-ir-ta-kà
english: why should i write at length to you, that we are unhappy and have no one to care for us?

akkadian: za-ku-tum a-ṣé-er ša ki-ma ku-a-tí ù a-ṣé-ri-a šu-up-ra-am a
english: my dear father, send a final report to your representatives and to me.

akkadian: da-ak-ni-bi₄-im igi en-na-sú-in igi i-dí-a-šur dumu ku-zi-la-nim e-<gap>
english: witnessed by taqin-abum, by enna-suen, by iddin-aššur son of kuzilānum.

akkadian: i-ší-qí-il₅ 10 ma-na-um áb-num ša ú-ša-qí-lu 0.3333 ma-na
english: the 10 mina weighing stone by which he weighed was 0.3333 mina too large.

akkadian: a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí šu-qú-ul lu gi₅-mì-lu-um i-a-tí ki-ma ag-mì-lu-kà-ni-ma ha-ra-nam a-dí-na-ku-um
english: may it be a favour for me since i have done you a favour and i have arranged a caravan for you.

akkadian: kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na ištar-lá-ma-sí ù ma-nu-ki-e-lí-a a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-dí-in
english: here kukuwa paid 2 minas 4 shekels of silver and entrusted it to šu-ištar under his seal.

akkadian: a-na-kam 2 ma-na 4 gín kù.babbar ku-ku-a iš-qú-ul-ma ku-nu-ki-šu a-na šu-ištar ip-qí-id a-na kà-ni-iš ni-lá-ak-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu
english: we shall go to kanesh and he will see the tablet with his seal, they will pay the silver and its interest to the representatives of the merchant, and we shall release their tablet.

akkadian: i-ma-ar-ma kù.babbar ù ṣí-ba-sú a-na
english: the silver will then travel overland in their name.

akkadian: šu-ištar ip-qí-id um-ma šu-ut-ma ša-áp-ra-tí-a ú-qá-ma a-na kà-ni-iš a-na
english: ababa, šalim-wardī, and šēp-ištar lead 15 talents of wool, 7 black donkeys and 7 to you.

akkadian: ṣé-er ša ki-ma ku-a-tí li-li-kam
english: have šalim-wardī credit your goods to you there.

akkadian: ša-áp-ra-tí-šu ù ṭup-pì-šu lu-šé-ru-ú 15 gú
english: the winter has become bad and until today they are delayed.

akkadian: a-na puzur₄-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma a-ni-i-a-ni-ma <gap> ma-na 13 gín ni-ga-li du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur
english: to puzur-aššur from ani-ani: ṭāb-ṣill-aššur gave me <gap> mina 13 shekels of sickels.

akkadian: du₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šur na-áš-a-ku-um šu-ma be-li a-ta iš-tí a-li-ki-im pá-ni-i-ma sà-he-er-tám šé-bi-lam
english: if you are indeed my lord, send me small goods with the first transport.

akkadian: <gap> mì-ma a-nim a-šu-ú-ma-an ù ki-kà-ar-ša-an
english: <gap> ašu-uman and kikaršan lead all this to you.

akkadian: i-ra-dí-ú-ni-ku-nu-tí 10 ma-na áb-na-am ú-ba-am i ku-nu-ki-a
english: they carry a weight-stone of 10 minas <gap> under my seal.

akkadian: a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma ša-lim-a-šur i-na té-ga-ra-ma
english: to my representatives, ennam-aššur and ali-ahum from šalim-aššur: i am staying in tegarama.

akkadian: mì-ma a-na a-lim{ki} lá tù-šé-bi₄-lá
english: do not send any silver to the city.

akkadian: i-na {d}utu-ši <gap> ṭup-pí ta-ša-me-a-ni a-lá-hu-um lu a-na hu-ra-ma lu a-na ku-ša-ra a-na ṣé-ri-a li-li-kam ù kù.babbar 1 ma-na a-na qá-tí-a
english: on the day you hear my letter ali-ahum should come to meet me either in hurama or in kuššara, and he should bring every mina of silver that is at my disposal.

akkadian: 1 me-at 6.5 ma-na urudu ša en-um-a-šùr i li-bi₄
english: 106 ½ minas of copper belonging to ennam-aššur is owed by the colony.

akkadian: kà-ri-im ší-im urudu a-nim i-na kù.babbar ša wa-bar-tim ša ša-lá-tù-ar ki-ma en-um-a-šùr ku-da-tum i-lá-qé
english: kudātum will receive the price of this copper in silver from the station at šalatuwar on behalf of ennam-aššur.

akkadian: da-šùr áš-lu-uṭ ší-tí hu-sà-ri-im i li-bi šu-ištar a-hu-ur
english: the rest of the lapis lazuli remains in šu-ištar's possession.

akkadian: i-dí-in itu.kam ma-hu-ur-dingir li-mu-um
english: month iv, eponymy of aššur-imittī.

akkadian: a-na a-la-hi-im dumu šál-ma-a-šur a-ni-na dumu puzur₄-a-na ú a-šur-ma-lik dumu a-lá-hi-im kišib
english: to ali-ahum son of šalim-aššur, annina son of puzur-anna and aššur-malik son of ali-ahum; seal of zukuwa.

akkadian: zu-ku-a a-hu-ú-a a-tù-nu a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im ih-da
english: my dear brothers, pay attention to the words of the letter!

akkadian: i-ša-qal iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša bu-zu-ta-a ù a-šùr-i-mì-tí itu.kam té-i-na-tim li-mu-um {d}iškur-ba-ni
english: reckoned from the week-eponymy of buzutaya and aššur-imittī, month x, eponymy-year of adad-bāni.

akkadian: tù-ra-a en-na-sú-in ú mu-ti-a-šùr a-wi-lu a-ni-ú-tum da-a-nu
english: tūraya, ennam-suen and muti-aššur, these men acted as judges.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma i-ku-pí-a ú zu-ku-a 1 gú
english: to ali-ahum from ikūn-pīya and zukuwa: they brought your tin, 1 talent 30 minas.

akkadian: 30 ma-na an.na-kà ub-lu-ni ú-sà-ni-iq-šu-ma
english: we checked it and 0.5 mina was missing.

akkadian: ha-nu ub-lam ú a-na a-lá-ni
english: hanu will bring you the proceeds from them.

akkadian: ú-šé-ṣí-šu-nu ší-im-šu-nu ha-nu ub-ba-lá-kum i-na ša ṭup-pí-šu ša šu-ki-tim 4 ma-na kù.babbar nu-ša-áš-qí-il₅
english: we made šukkutum pay 4 minas of silver out of what was in his tablet; šu-hubur brings it to you under his seal.

akkadian: ku-nu-ki-šu šu-hu-bur-ma na-áš-a-kum gán-lam₅ a-šu-mì šu-ki-tim-ma
english: it passes overland in the name of šukkutum as well.

akkadian: e-tí-iq ší-tí kù.babbar-pí-kà ša li-bi šu-ki-tim nu-ša-áš-qá-al-šu-ma iš-tí ší-im pí-ri-kà-ni-kà nu-šé-ba-lá-kum a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma
english: we shall make šukkutum pay the rest of your silver owed by him and send it to you with the proceeds from your pirikannus.

akkadian: um-ma zu-ku-a-ma mì-šu ša a-dí 5 ha-am-ší-šu áš-pu-ra-ni-ma úz-ni lá ta-pá-tí
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: why is it that i have written five times but you do not inform me?

akkadian: a-hi a-ta úz-ni
english: my dear brother, inform me!

akkadian: pè-té kù.babbar ša i-dí-a-šur ha-bu-lá-ni ša-qí-il₅ lá ša-qí-il₅ tí-ir-ta-kà
english: send me word whether the silver owed by iddin-aššur has been paid or not.

akkadian: a-na e-lá-ma qí-bi-ma um-ma a-hu-wa-qar-ma ta-áš-pu-ra-am um-ma a-ta-ma ṭup-pu-um i-hu-lá-pí-im lá-wi pá-nu-šu kišib a-lá-hi-im a-na
english: say to elamma, thus ahu-waqar: you wrote me as follows: '(there is) a tablet wrapped in a rag, on the face of which is written: 'seal of ali-ahum to hinnāya and elamma'.

akkadian: hi-na-a ú e-lá-ma lá-pí-it i li-bi₄
english: we looked for it among the tablets of aššur-ṭāb, but it is not there.

akkadian: ṭup-pé ša a-šur-du₁₀
english: we have now sent a letter to aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: né-mu-ur-ma lá-šu a-na a-šur-du₁₀ ni-iš-tap-ra-am té-er-tù-šu li-tù-ra-am-ma a-šar
english: when his message (telling) where it has been placed comes back we will send it to you.

akkadian: 10 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pu-um ni-is-ha-sú diri ša-du-a-sú ša-bu a-na hu-bu-li-a ša é a-bi-a ú-bi₄-il₅ a-ha-ma
english: i brought 10 minas of refined silver, its import duty added, its transport tariff paid for, for my debt to my father's house.

akkadian: šé-bi-lá-nim a-lá-ku-nu lá tù-qá-a gi-mì-lam
english: do not wait until you leave (yourself).

akkadian: um-ma pá-ru-ur-tum-ma a-na i-dí-a-bi-im qí-bi-ma a-ha-at
english: from parrurtum to iddin-abum: your father's sister is dead.

akkadian: a-bi-kà me-ta-at um-ma a-hu-ni-ma
english: our brothers say: there is no heir.

akkadian: 37 ku-ta-nu qá-du-um ta-ad-mì-iq-tim ša šu-ištar 2 túg ni-is-ha-tum 3 gín kù.babbar 3 túg a ší-mì-im
english: 37 -textiles, including (those) as free loan, belonging to šu-ištar, 2 textiles import-tax, 3 shekels of silver (balanced), 3 textiles for pre-emption.

akkadian: ší-tí túg-tí-šu 32 túg
english: the rest of his textiles: 32 textiles.

akkadian: 3 gín kù.babbar i-na hu-lu-qá-e ik-šu-da-šu
english: his share in the losses amounted to 3 shekels of silver.

akkadian: ša tù-šé-bi₄-lá-ni-ni ṭup-pu-šu ha-ar-ma-am ša hu-bu-li-šu šu-nu-nu na-áš-a-ku-nu-tí a-hu-a a-tù-nu a-ma-kam ih-da-ma ší-im ṣú-ba-tí-a
english: my dear brothers, take care there to have šalim-wardī and šu-nūnu credit you with the proceeds from my previous shipment of textiles and tin.

akkadian: ú an.na-ki-a pá-ni-im ša-lim-ar-dí ù šu-nu-nu lu-ba-li-ṭù-ni-ku-nu-tí-ma urudu
english: then seal the copper with your own seals, and send it to me as soon as possible.

akkadian: i-na ku-nu-ki-ku-nu ku-un-kà-ma ki a-li-ki pá-ni-e-ma šé-bi-lá-nim ù e-wa-ri-mu-ša ṭù-ur-da-nim <gap>-tí-a bé-lu-a a-tù-nu gi-im-lá-ni-ma ih-da ú a-na-ku a-we-el gi-mì-lam 25 túg
english: also, send me ewarimuša. <gap> my dear lords do me a favour, and take care, for i too am a man of favours. 25 -textiles, <gap> minas of tin, 15 shekels of silver <gap> šu-nūnu and ewarimuša <gap> will lead to you.

akkadian: ku-ta-ni <gap> ma-na
english: urgent, keep an eye on my servants.

akkadian: a-pu-tum e-ku-nu i-ṣé-er ṣú-ha-ri-a
english: and why is it that you sent šu-nūnu here?

akkadian: zu-ur-zu 1 ma-at-li-iš-hu-um 2 eb-le sí-kà-tim 1 ma-as-ra-dum 1 nu-hu-um ša ì.giš ù pá-at-ru-um mì-ma a-nim ki hu-hu-<gap> zu-ur-zu 1 ma-at-li-iš-hu-um 1 ma-as-ra-dum ki puzur₄-a-na
english: pouches, 1 packing-rack, 2 ropes with pegs, 1 packsaddle, 1 skin container with oil and 1 dagger - all this is with huhu <gap> pouches, 1 packing-rack, 1 saddlecloth, with puzur-anna

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma zu-ku-a-ma 12 ma-na kù.babbar i-dí-a-šur ha-bu-lam ṭup-pu-šu
english: to ali-ahum from zukuwa: iddin-aššur owes me 12 minas of silver; i left the certified tablet with you.

akkadian: ha-ar-ma-am e-zi-ba-ku-nu-tí iš-tù ú-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ni i-na ma-ah-ri-a 22
english: after his loan came due his terms have become overdue for me by 22 weeks.

akkadian: tí-ir-ta-ku-nu a-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na li-li-kam šu-ma kù.babbar ú ṣí-ba-sú i-ší-qí-il₅ ma-lá
english: if the silver and its interest has been paid, inform me about how much silver has been paid.

akkadian: kù.babbar i-ší-iq-lu úz-ni pé-té ṭup-pí ša nu-a-e ša e-lá-nu e-zi-bu
english: as to the tablets concerning anatolians that i left as well, take care to have the silver paid.

akkadian: i-hi-id-ma kù.babbar ša-áš-qí-il₅ a-du-um puzur₄-a-šur tí-ir-tí i-lá-ak-šu-um
english: with respect to puzur-aššur, my instructions will go to him.

akkadian: urudu ma-lá e-pu-šu-ni iš-tí-a-ma a-na pu-ru-uš-ha-dim ú-šé-ra-áb-šu
english: what copper i shall make i shall bring into purušhaddum with me.

akkadian: šu-ma puzur₄-a-šur mì-ma iš-pu-ra-kum na-pá-al-tù-šu šu-up-ra-ma úz-ni pé-té
english: if puzur-aššur has written anything to you, send me his answer to inform me.

akkadian: ú šu-ma a-na anše iš-tap-ra-kum e-ma-ri ú <gap>
english: also, if he has written to you about donkeys, send him donkeys and <gap>!

akkadian: šé-bi-il₅-šu-um a-hi a-ta a-na tí-ir-tí-a
english: my dear brother, pay attention to my instructions.

akkadian: i-hi-id ṭup-pá-am ma-tí-ma lá tù-šé-ba-al
english: do not ever send the tablet.

akkadian: um-ma a-ta-ta šu-a-nu-um da-na-a ù la-ma-sí-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma a-na ma-la tí-ir-tí-kà ṭup-pá-am ša a-lim{ki}
english: from atata, šu-anum, dannaya and lamassī to ali-ahum: in accordance with your instructions we got a tablet of the city for you; also, we hired an attorney for you.

akkadian: ni-il₅-qé-a-ku-um ù ra-bi-ṣa-am ni-hu-za-ku-um i-na dí-in a-lim{ki} ṭup-pá-am ša a-na ì-lí-a dumu e-lá-lí pá-aq-du a-na ra-bi-ṣí-im ú-šu-ru-ma kù.babbar ša
english: following the verdict of the city they must release the tablet that was entrusted to iliya son of elāli to the attorney, and the silver from the tablet the attorney <gap> he who pays must assist the attorney.

akkadian: ra-bi₄-ṣí-im i-zi-iz-ma kù.babbar ša li-bi₄ a-hi-kà
english: come here yourselves and discuss about the testament concerning you.

akkadian: ša-áš-qí-la-šu-ma kù.babbar
english: ababa is our attorney.

akkadian: ku-un-kà-ma <gap> a-na ra-bi-ṣí-im
english: his wages were 0.6666 mina 8 shekels of silver.

akkadian: dí-na-ma lu-ub-lam a-tù-nu al-kà-nim-ma a-na
english: damiq-pī-aššur gave him 0.3333 mina 8 shekels of silver.

akkadian: ší-ma-tí-ku-nu a-ta-wa a-ba-ba
english: give him 0.3333 mina of silver there.

akkadian: ra-bi₄-iṣ-ni 0.6666 ma-na 8 gín
english: travel expenses and <gap> - give him 8 shekels of silver.

akkadian: kišib {d}iškur-pí-la-ah dumu a-ni-nim kišib a-šur-lá-ma-sí dumu la-qé-eb kišib
english: seal of adad-pilah, son of anīnum, seal of aššur-lamassī, son of lā-qēp, seal of nazi, son of puzur-banini. 3 minas of refined silver aššur-lamassī, son of lā-qēp, owes to elamma.

akkadian: 3 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er
english: if he does not pay when his term is up, he will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: a-šur-lá-ma-sí dumu la-qé-ep e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù
english: month i, eponymy of the successor of šu-hubur. 8 minas of refined silver šuli, son of puzur-abeh, owes to elamma.

akkadian: ha-muš-tim ša e-lá-ma
english: he will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akkadian: ṣí-ib-tám i-na itu.kam-im
english: he will pay within 8 weeks from the week of ānah-ilī.

akkadian: a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ša qá-té ba-zi-a
english: if he does not pay he will add interest per mina in conformity with the rule of the colony. (another tablet) apart from this tablet that turns up is invalid.

akkadian: dumu šé-ep-a-lim kišib dingir-ba-ni dumu ib-ni-lí kišib a-šur-ma-lik
english: seal of zuba, son of aššur-rē'ī, seal of šu-ištar, son of sūaya, seal of balṭu-šar, son of sukuhum. 0.5 mina of refined silver balṭu-šar owes to elamma.

akkadian: gú 32 ma-na urudu ha-bu-ra-ta-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur dumu puzur₄-a-be-eh
english: seal of iddin-suen, son of itūr-ilī, seal of nāb-suen, son of abī-ilī, seal of idnāya, son of kutaya. 12 shekels of refined silver iddin-suen, son of itūr-ilī, owes to aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ha-muš-tim
english: from the week of pūšu-kēn and ennum-bēlum, month iv, eponymy of aššur-idī.

akkadian: ša a-šur-re-ṣí a-na 14 ha-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-t
english: seal of aššur-šamšī, son of ilī-tūram, that ištar-ilšu, son of azuzaya, owes 45 shekels of refined silver to aššur-ṭāb. <from> the eponymy of ali-ahum he will add 1.5 shekel per (mina, per month) as interest.

akkadian: a-na a-šur-re-ṣí en-um-a-šur da-dí-a ú a-ta-a qí-bi₄-ma um-ma e-la-ma-ma um-ma a-tù-nu-ma 17 ma-na urudu i ší-im qá-qí-ri ša é nu-ri-i-li ki a-šur-re-ṣí a-hu-ur 8 ma-na urudu
english: say to aššur-rēṣī, ennam-aššur, dadiya and ataya, thus elamma: youplur said: '17 minas of copper from the price for a house-plot of nūr-ilī is still due from aššur-rēṣī. 8 minas of copper belonging to ilī-bāni, son of ibni-ilī, is due from ataya'.

akkadian: ša dingir-ba-ni dumu ib-ni-lí ki a-ta-a urudu ma-lá i-na li-bi₄-šu-nu i-ba-ší-ú
english: settle accounts for all the copper they still owe and collect it and add it to that derived from the gold.

akkadian: šé-ṣí-a-ma li-qí-a ú a-ṣé-er ša kù.gi ṭí-ih-a-ma ú šu-ma i-na ba-áb-tí-a
english: moreover, if you have collected anything of my outstanding claims, buy for itiles and send them to me.

akkadian: kišib lá-qé-pì-im dumu i-zi-za-am-dingir
english: seal of la-qēpum, son of izzizam-ilī.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-na-ni-ma igi gír ša a-šùr <gap>
english: for these words the kanesh colony made me available and before aššur's dagger i gave my testimony.

akkadian: 16 ma-na kù ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šùr-eš-tí-kál ù i-dí-a-bi₄-im i-sú-rik₁₃
english: aššuriš-tikal and iddin-abum owe 16 minas of refined silver to issu-arik.

akkadian: i-šu igi a-ku-za igi ib-ni-sú-in
english: witnessed by akuza, witnessed by ibni-suen.

akkadian: qá-at-kà i-na kù.babbar ša sá-li-a ù ì-lí-dan ha-bu-lu-ni ú-ša-áš-ki-nu-ma lu-qú-tám
english: if salliya has not placed the goods before you, salliya must give purchases in the city of assur to šalim-aššur.

akkadian: a-na sà-ah-ri-dingir ù en-um-a-šur dumu
english: here i seized ilī-dan and made him pay 2 minas of silver.

akkadian: šu-be-lim ip-qí-du šu-ma lu-qú-tám sá-li-a i-na ma-ah-ri-kà lá iš-ta-kán ší-a-ma-at a-lim a-šùr sá-li-a a ša-lim-a-šùr
english: we received 2 minas of silver of my fees. 2 minas 15 shekels of silver with your fees from the man of tumliya<gap> here i keep a close watch over your outstanding loans.

akkadian: i-da-an a-na-kam ì-lí-dan aṣ-ba-at-ma 2 ma-na kù.babbar ú-ša-áš-qí-il₅-šu 2 ma-na
english: also, suen-nādā is staying in wahšušana; when he enters here i shall make him pay the silver and its interest.

akkadian: i-re-ší ba-áb-tí-kà a-za-az
english: with respect to your instructions <gap>.

akkadian: ù sú-in-na-da i-na wa-ah-šu-ša-na
english: i keep a close watch over your outstanding loans.

akkadian: wa-ša-áb e-ra-ba-
english: do not be nervous.

akkadian: kù.babbar ša en-um-a-šùr igi
english: the silver belongs to ennam-aššur.

akkadian: i-dí-{d}im dumu a-šùr-du₁₀ igi tù-ur-a-a dumu me-na-a igi kur-ub-a-šùr dumu ṣí-li-a
english: witnessed by iddin-adad son of ašsur-ṭāb, by tūraya son of menaya, by kurub-aššur son of ṣilliya.

akkadian: ra-bi-ṣú-um ša ša-lim-a-šùr en-um-a-šùr ú a-lá-ha-am me-er-e ša-lim-a-šùr iš-a-al ba-a-nim a-na ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša
english: šalim-aššur's attorney questioned ennam-aššur and ali-ahum, šalim-aššur's sons: come on, show me where the assets, your father's silver is in accordance with the tablet of the city, then i shall release it to you.

akkadian: a-lim{ki} a-šar
english: do not obstruct me, me, the attorney!

akkadian: bu-lá-tù kù.babbar-áp a-bi-ku-nu
english: keep in mind what was sworn by the city and the king!

akkadian: i-ba-ší-ú kà-li-ma-ni-ma lu-šé-ra-ku-nu-tí lá tù-na-ha-ni ra-bi-ṣa-am i-a-tí ša ni-iš a-lim{ki} ú
english: since they kept petitioning me i said: 'come on, take me (to court), then i shall release the assets, your father's silver to you.' but they refused to come, or to show me.

akkadian: a-bi-ku-nu lu-šé-ra-ku-nu-tí
english: i did not send you to court.

akkadian: šu-nu a-lá-kam ú kà-lu-mì-i lá i-mu-ú-ni a-lá-ak a-na
english: you did indeed come to collect our father's assets, and once or twice you have questioned me, and i have not rejected you.

akkadian: a-dí-na-ku-ni tám-kà-ru-um en-um-a-šur lu-qú-tám ma-lá ta-áš-a-ma-šu-ni a-na en-um-a-šur dumu ša-lim-a-šur dí-in-ma tí-ir-ta-ku-nu le-zi-ba-am
english: any goods you have bought for him you must give to ennam-aššur son of šalim-aššur, and let him leave me a message from you (plural).

akkadian: ma-lá tí-ir-tí-a le-pu-uš ú tí-ir-ta-ku-nu kù.babbar
english: also, send me word about how much silver you have given him.

akkadian: ma-lá ta-dí-na-šu-ni li-li-kam ṭup-pì-a ú hu-ur-ša-am
english: you have to seal for my tablets and the store-room.

akkadian: a-tù-nu-ma ku-un-kà e-na-na-ta-am na-hi-da-ma ba-lu-ku-nu ṭup-pè-e-a ma-ma-na lá i-pá-té ma-ma-an
english: give ennanātum instructions that no one must open for my tablets without your permission.

akkadian: e is-li-ší
english: no one must deceive.

akkadian: 5 gú 50 ma-na urudu ša ku-zi-zi-a 2 gú 35 ma-na urudu ni-im-hu-ur šà.ba 1
english: of the 5 talents 50 minas of copper from kuziziya we received 2 talents 35 minas of copper.

akkadian: kišib en-na-nim dumu a-lá-bi₄-im kišib a-šùr-na-da dumu ir-nu-id kišib kà-ta-tim dumu ma-la-ba kišib nu-ur-{d}en.zu dumu {d}muš-mu-ta-bíl ša
english: sealed by ennānum son of ali-abum, by aššur-nādā son of irnuid, by katātum son of malaba, by nūr-suen son of nirah-muttabbil, by iddin-suen son of ibaya.

akkadian: ša-lim-a-šùr ù i-dí-sú-in dumu i-ba-a-a a-na
english: concerning šalim-ašsur and iddin-suen son of ibaya.

akkadian: a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im a-ni-im ni-iš a-lim{ki} it-mu-ú-ni-ma a-hu-um a-na a-hi-im la i-tù-ru
english: they swore by the city concerning the words of this tablet, and no one must raise claim against the other.

akkadian: wa-ar-kà-at an.na lá-šu
english: later, there was no tin.

akkadian: iš-tù a-na en-num-be-lim ta-da-na-ni ù a-na e-ru-ba-tí a ma-lá tí-ir-tí-a ta-da-na a-ni ší-tí
english: after you give it to ennam-bēlum you will also give it for a pledge according to my instructions.

akkadian: a-ša-me-ma a-na ku-ta-ni ší-mu-um i-na kà-ni-iš
english: i hear that there is a market for in kanesh.

akkadian: a-we-el <gap> tí ri
english: until i come <gap>

akkadian: <gap> 20 ma-na kù.babbar
english: <gap> 20 minas of refined silver.

akkadian: ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tù ha-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im a-na 13 ha-am-ša-tim <gap>
english: reckoned from the week of the he must pay within 13 weeks <gap>

akkadian: kišib lá-ba-na-da dumu i-dí-sú-in kišib na-áb-sú-en₆ dumu šu-be-lim kišib i-dí-ištar dumu i-dí-a-bi₄-im a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim
english: seal of labān-nādā, son of iddin-suen, seal of nabi-suen, son of šu-bēlum. seal of iddin-ištar, son of iddin-abum seal of puzur-ištar, son of dān-aššur.

akkadian: kà-ru-um dur₄-hu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in ṭup-pu-um
english: for these words the durhumit colony made us available and before aššur's dagger we gave our testimony.

akkadian: a-šu-mì ku-uk-ra ša dumu zu-za-nim
english: a record concerning kukra of the son of zuzānum.

akkadian: a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi₄-ma um-ma ha-nu-ma a-na-kam šu-{d}en.líl
english: to ali-ahum from hanu: here your agent and i seized šu-illil.

akkadian: ša-zu-úz-ta-kà ù a-na-ku ni-iṣ-ba-at 20 u₄-me-e
english: we set a term of 20 days for him to pay the silver.

akkadian: a-na kù.babbar ša-qá-lim ni-iš-ku-un-šu-um u₄-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ma
english: his term is up, but he has gone to the land harabiš.

akkadian: šu-ut-ma a-na ma-at ha-ra-bi₄-iš i-ta-lá-ak
english: he said: do not bother me for 10 days.

akkadian: a-ma-kam a-mur-ša-ra-sà ša-i-il₅-ma a-šar ṭup-pu-um
english: ask amur-šarrassa there where the tablet is.

akkadian: uk-ta-al igi lá-qé-pì-im igi a-mur-{d}utu

akkadian: šu-ma šál-mu-ma e-ru-bu lu šé <gap> li-ib-ší-ú
english: they should deduct 1 shekel each on the smuggling of my textiles there.

akkadian: 21 ma-na 10 gín urudu
english: sell it for silver, seal the silver and let it remain.

akkadian: li-bi₄ ṭup-pì-a šu-uk-na 6 na-ru-qá-tim 22 túg
english: i left 6 sacks with 24 textiles <gap> under my seal in the store-room.

akkadian: sig₅ 8 qá-áb-li-ú-tum 4 ṣú-ba
english: sell those for silver.

akkadian: ša-áš-qí-lá-šu šu-ma kù.babbar lá-šu i-na ṣú-ba-tí qá-at-ku-nu lu-ša-áš-ki-ku-nu a-ba-ú-a a-tù-nu
english: if there is no silver, then i will let you make a claim to the textiles.

akkadian: šu-ma lá ta-ša-kà-na kù.babbar <gap> ni i-<gap>
english: my dear friends, if you do not lay claim, <gap>

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šùr-ma a-na lá-qé-ep ù a-na-na qí-bi-ma mì-šu ša ṣú-ha-ru-a a-dí u₄-mì-im a-nim a-ma-kam wa-áš-bu-ni ù
english: from ennam-aššur to lā-qēp and anna-anna: why have my servants stayed there until this day, so that i am delayed here because of them?

akkadian: a-na-ku a šu-mì-šu-nu a-na-kam sà-ah-ra-ku-ni
english: urgent, take care to send me my servants.

akkadian: ša-li-iṭ-ma iš-tí-ša-ma li-bi-ší a-dí a-lá-ki-a lu ú-ṭá-tám lu
english: collect both grain and firewood from the anatolians before i come.

akkadian: e-ṣí ša nu-a-e
english: there must be no misconduct.

akkadian: pá-hi-ra ší-lá-tum lá i-ba-ší a-ša-me-ma en-na-sú-in
english: i hear that enna-suen has come up from the city.

akkadian: iš-tù a-lim{ki} e-li-am šu-ma ke-na-ma e-li-am za-ku-sà a-na mì-ma tí-ir-tí-a iš-tí ba-tí-qí-im šu-up-ra-nim-ma úz-ni
english: if he has really come up, send me a report concerning all my merchandise ordered with an express caravan to inform me.

akkadian: pè-té-a ù šu-ma i-tur₄-dingir e-ki-ip-ma ha-ra-šu a-na a-lim{ki} i-ta-lá-ak i-na <gap>-ri a-lim{ki} šu-up-ra-nim-ma lá-tal-kam
english: also, if itūr-ilī is about to go or has already gone to the city, then write me <gap> of the city so i can come.

akkadian: ma-na 5.83334 gín 17
english: thereof we paid 42.5 shekels as excise.

akkadian: ma-na 4 gín kù.babbar a-ni-nu-um
english: there remain of your silver 16 minas 19.5 shekels.

akkadian: lu-bu-šu 1 gín kù.babbar
english: all this dān-aššur has led to you.""

akkadian: im-dí-dingir il₅-qé šu-ma um-me-a-nu i-ku-pì-ištar ú-la me-er-ú-šu a-na e-lá-ma i-tù-ru im-dí-dingir ú-ba-áb-šu
english: if the investors of ikūn-pī-ištar or his sons raise a claim against elamma imdī-ilum will clear him.

akkadian: kišib {d}mar.tu-ba-ni dumu ma-na-na kišib pu-šu-ke-en₆ dumu sú-e-a
english: seal of amurrum-bāni son of manana, seal of pūšu-kēn son of sueyya.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dì-ni-a-tí-ma igi gír ša {d}a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before aššur's dagger.

akkadian: túg.hi-tí-kà ú-šé-ṣí-ú ṭup-pá-am a ší-a-tí a-ti-a-kum
english: therefore i drew up a tablet for you and i named you my witnesses.

akkadian: ú ší-bé-a az-ku-ra-kum ší-bé-a a-na ba-áb dingir ú-šé-ra-da-ma ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-ku-nu ša 4
english: i am ready to lead my witnesses down to the gate of the god so that you can acquire a tablet with their seals, those of these four men.

akkadian: šu-nu-tí ta-lá-qé a-hi a-ta
english: please my brother, are we men to fight?

akkadian: ša a-wa-tim né-nu šu-ma a-na ma-mì-tim ta-pá-li-li mu-ru-úṣ li-bi-kà a-na ša ki-ma ku-a-tí lá-pí-ta-ma
english: if you wish to start a judicial procedure to make me swear, write down your grievances for <your> representatives, so that they can make me swear.

akkadian: lu-ta-mì-ú-ni ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-a ša tù-kà-lu-ú a-na ša

akkadian: ki-ma i-a-tí dí-in šu-ma la ta-da-an ša-sí-hi-ma
english: if you do not wish that, have me transferred here, so that i can come to swear.

akkadian: mì-ma a-nim bé-lá-num ú {d}im-ba-ni i-ra-dí-ú-ni-kum
english: all this bēlānum and adad-bāni lead to you.

akkadian: ṣé-er 12 gín 13 gín kù.babbar a-na a-šur-mu-ta-pì-il₅
english: in addition to 12 shekels 13 shekels of silver for aššur-mūtappil.

akkadian: kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma a-na lu-qú-tim ma-la a-na a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-pí-iq-du-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ú-šé-ṣí-ú ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu ša-lim-a-šùr a-na šu-ku-bi-im i-da-an a-na kur-ub-ištar šu-ku-bu-um ú-lá i-tù-a-ar
english: the colony has passed a verdict: for all the goods that were entrusted to aššur-bēl-awātim, and which šalim-aššūr had taken out, šalim-aššur will give a tablet bearing his seal to šu-kūbum. šu-kūbum will not raise claim against kurub-ištar.

akkadian: šu-ma a-na šu-ku-bi-im ma-ma-an i-tù-a-ar ša-lim-a-šùr ú-ba-áb-šu

akkadian: gín ša sà-e-tim kù.babbar
english: the silver has been spent for you.

akkadian: ga-am-ra-kum mì-ma a-nim ku-nu-ki-ni i-dí-a-bu-um i-ra-dí-a-kum
english: iddin-abum leads all this to you under our seals.

akkadian: um-ma en-um-a-šur-ma a-na en-na-sú-in ù dingir-ba-ni
english: from ennam-aššur to enna-suen and ili-bāni: i am well.

akkadian: qí-bi-ma šál-ma-ku lu ha-dí-a-ni₇ mì-ma i-ṣé-ri-a
english: let us be glad! šalim-aššur took nothing on my account.

akkadian: šál-ma-a-šur lá il₅-qé é a-bi-ni
english: as for our paternal house, i and you are happy!

akkadian: a-na-ku ù a-tù-nu
english: urgent, set out and come.

akkadian: na-am-ra-ni a-pu-tum tí-ib-a-ni-ma a-tal-kà-nim 1 gín kù.babbar ší-tám ša dingir-ba-ni en-na-sú-in ub-lam ša i-na-sú-in
english: enna-suen has brought 1 shekel of silver the rest that belongs to ilī-bāni. šar-adad has not brought anything belonging to enna-suen.

akkadian: lugal-{d}im mì-ma lá ub-lam ù šu-ma be-ú-lá-tí-ku-nu ba-at-qá-tù-nu a-na-ku
english: also, if you are in arrears with your working capitals, i shall personally pay them.

akkadian: ú-ša-ba iš-tí a-ba-ba ta-ma-ku
english: i have sworn together with ababa.

akkadian: i-sú-rik₁₃ a-na a-lim{ki} i-lá-ak-ma é-tí-šu ša bu-ri-im a-šar a-ni-i ša-lim-a-šùr wa-áš-bu-ni a-na tù-ud-ha-li-a a-hu tù-li a-na ší-mì-im i-dí-šu-nu
english: as issu-arik will go to the city, he sold his houses by the well, where at present šalim-aššur is living, to tudhaliya the brother of tuli.

akkadian: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni igi gír ša a-šùr ni-dí-in igi sú-kà-li-a
english: the kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings, and we gave a tablet with our testimony before the dagger of aššur.

akkadian: 1 ma-na 15 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur dumu a-ta-ta

english: reckoned from the week of aššur-malik son of sukkalliya he is to pay within 12 weeks.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šur ù a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma um-ma sig₅-pí-a-šur-ma me-at 60 ṣú-ba-tù ša tám-kà-ri-im šà.ba 19
english: to ennam-aššur and ali-ahum from damiq-pī-aššur: as to the 160 textiles belonging to the merchant, thereof 19 are your textiles.

akkadian: ṣú-ba-tù-kà mì-li-ik lu-qú-tim mì-il₅-kà
english: take a decision concerning the goods.

akkadian: ṣú-ba-tù sig₅ diri ša tám-kà-ri-im a-hu-a
english: the textiles of extra-fine quality belong to the merchant.

akkadian: a-tù-nu kù.babbar ší-im a-ni-ki-a ša e-ni-iš-ta-ru-um ub-lá-ku-nu-tí-ni a-na pá-ni-a šé-bi₄-lá-nim e-ni-iš-ta-ra-am

akkadian: lá i-sà-hu-ur ṭù-ur-da-ni-šu-ma uz-né-kà id-a sà-he-er-tám

akkadian: ša 5 gín kù.babbar šé-bi-lá-ni-im

akkadian: e-ni-iš-ta-ra-am <gap>-a-šur <gap>-im i-tal-kam <gap> ri-im-ni a-ar-tám <gap> sà-he-er-tám šé-bi₄-lá-nim
english: eništārum<gap>-aššur <gap> has come <gap> of our <gap> cowrie-shell <gap> send me small goods.

english: from enam-aššur to mannum-balum-aššur and ennam-aššur; specifically to ennam-aššur: a tablet stating that aššur-taklāku owes 5 minas of silver to puzur-anna is in your house.

english: look at my tablets there, and if the tablet is indeed there, show it to ennam-aššur and then let the tablet be in your possession.

akkadian: a-ṣé-ri-a li-li-kam
english: also, send word to me.

akkadian: kišib e-lá-ma dumu i-dí-sú-en₆ kišib zu-za-a dumu i-sí-hi-im kišib en-na-sú-en₆ dumu

english: my dear brothers, take care to satisfy the investors there for the copper that i have balanced with the investors of your father, and withdraw mine.

akkadian: i-a-tí ša-hi-ṭá šu-ma lá ki-am ma-lá um-me-a-ni ú-ra-ki-sú-ni-ni li-ba-ak-nu i-ma-ra-aṣ
english: if this does not happen, you will be sorry about everything the investors have contracted with me.

akkadian: i-na ší-mì-šu-nu kù.babbar sig₅ diri e-pu-uš a-dí

english: please, my brother, send me the price that the scarfs of the temple-fund yield with the first caravan.""

akkadian: i-šu-ú kù.babbar <gap> a-šur-du₁₀ ša-bu

akkadian: igi ì-lí-áš-ra-ni igi dumu du-ur-a-šur
english: in the presence of ilī-ašranni son of tūr-aššur

akkadian: ša 2 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er en-na-nim dumu a-zu-a
english: that ennānum, son of azua, owes 2 minas of refined silver to elamma.

akkadian: igi e-na-a-nim igi la-qé-pì-im a-na 11 túg ku-ta-ni a-mur-ištar ù a-la-hi-im a-na e-la-ma a-šùr-la-ma-sí
english: for 11 -textiles aššur-lamassī will confirm to elamma (the liability of) āmur-ištar and ali-ahum within 5 months.

english: in the presence of abu-šalim son of iddin-erra, of iddin-aššur, son of bursa / isum.

english: concerning 1 mina 5 shekels of silver he has left a certified tablet about the debt of ennam-rēṣum to ikūn-pīya.

english: 1 mina of silver belonging to hinnāya elamma dispatched to iddin-suen, ṣeher-ilī brought it away.

akkadian: igi na-ni-a igi a-šur-du₁₀
english: witnessed by naniya, by aššur-ṭāb.

akkadian: iš-tù ha-muš-tim ša a-šùr-i-dí ù šu-ištar itu.kam kán-wa-ar-ta li-mu-um {d}iškur-ba-ni a-na 4
english: from the week of aššur-idī and šu-ištar, month ix, eponymy year of adad-bāni, they will pay within 4 weeks.

akkadian: ú-ṣú-bu kù.babbar i qá-qá-ad
english: they are jointly liable for the silver.

akkadian: šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is igi du₁₀-a-šur igi šu-ištar
english: in the presence of ṭāb-aššur, of šu-ištar.

akkadian: a-na puzur₄-a-šur qí-bi-ma um-ma a-ni-wa-a-ni-ma iš-tù 3 itu.kam ta-ta-lá-ak-ma mì-ma
english: to puzur-aššur from ani-wani: you left 3 months ago and you have sent me nothing.

akkadian: ú-lá tù-šé-bi₄-lam a-na-kam dan-a-šur 2 gín kù.babbar i-dí-nam
english: dan-aššur has given me 2 shekels of silver here, he himself.

akkadian: šu-ut-ma a-ba-ru-um ma-ma-an lá-qá-am lá
english: as to the lead, no one will take it.

akkadian: i-mu-a-šu 4 né-nu mì-nam
english: us four, what are we to eat?

akkadian: ni-kà-al qá-du-um ṣú-ha-ri-im ša sig₅-a-a mì-šu-um kù.babbar ú-lá tù-šé-ba-lam-ma ma i-na
english: why do you not send any silver, with damqaya's servant, for we are dying from hunger!

akkadian: bu-bu-tim ni-mu-a-at a-ma hu-bu-ru-um i-ta-al-kam
english: indeed, the netherworld has arrived.

akkadian: šu-ma kù.babbar a-na ú-ku-ul-tí-a lá tù-šé-ba-lam a-ta-be-a-ma a-tal-kam
english: if you do not send me silver for my food i shall set out and come!

akkadian: šu-ma be-lí a-ta i-hi-id
english: if you are truly my lord - take care!

akkadian: ú 30 túg šu-ul-hu ša i-na ú-lá-ma i-lá-qé-ú-ni ša-áp-tù-um <gap> e-kál-lúm <gap> ú šu-ut-ma <gap>-in <gap>-ṣí-a-am <gap> ku <gap>-ma <gap>-ma a-<gap>-ma
english: also, with respect to the 30 -textiles which they will receive in ulama, the wool <gap>the palace <gap> and he himself <gap> i shall credit to my lord.

akkadian: a-na be-li-a ú-ba-lá-aṭ a-ma-kam sà-ni-iq-šu-ma lu-ma-li-kum
english: check him there so he may pay you in full.

akkadian: mì-ma kà-ṣa-ru-um šu-um-šu <gap>
english: any harnessor whatever <gap>

akkadian: a-bi₄-ì-lí ṣú-ha-ri-kà a-dí-na-kum i-na a-wi-tí-ni šu-ma kù.babbar-pì a-bi₄-dingir lá i-dí-nam 1 ma-na
english: according to our agreement, should abī-ilī not have given me my silver, you would give me 66 shekels of silver.

akkadian: 6 gín kù.babbar ta-da-nam iš-tù a-lim{ki} té-li-a-ma
english: when you came up from the city we did not meet and you went back.

akkadian: lá ni-na-me-er-ma ta-tù-ar 2 ma-na 7 gín kù.babbar ku-nu-ki ša
english: i carry with me 2 minas and 7 shekels of silver under the seals of ennam-suen and alpilī.

akkadian: 3 ma-na i-sú-hi 0.5 ma-na 5 gín
english: if he has not paid (in time) 0.3333 mina per mina will accrue (as interest).

akkadian: 1 ma-na urudu ša bíl-li-tim 0.3333 ma-na lá 2 gín
english: of the debt of hazuwalla for huma<gap> aguwa guarantees with the silver for 1 mina of silver.

akkadian: a-na a-šur-{d}utu-ši ù en-na-sú-in qí-bi₄-ma
english: say to aššur-šamšī and ennam-suen, thus āl-ṭāb.

akkadian: um-ma a-al-du₁₀-ma a-na a-šur-{d}utu-ši qí-bi₄-ma mì-šu ša ta-áš-pu-ra-ni-ni um-ma a-tù-nu-ma al-kam ṣí-tám
english: say in particular to aššur-šamšī: why are youplur. writing me as follows: 'come here, we must submit the expenditures'?

akkadian: ni-ša-kà-an tám-kà-ru-um i-na re-ší-a i-za-az kù.babbar 1-ma-na a-ša-qá-al
english: the creditor keeps a check on me (because) i have to pay 1 mina of silver!

akkadian: ke-e lá-li-kà-am ú-lá 10 gín kù.babbar i-na qá-tí-a
english: how could i come while i do not even have 10 shekels of silver available?

akkadian: qá-i-a-ni šu-ma e-mu-qá-tám e-pá-áš-ku-nu-ma ma a kà-ri-im i-lá-ak-ma kà-ru-um i-da-ku-nu ù a-na-ku qá-dí-ku-nu-ma a-bi₄
english: if he treats you in a violent way, yea even turns to the colony and the colony makes you appear in court, then i am with you in it!

akkadian: a-ta šé-ṭù-ta-kà a-na-ku a-lá-qé a-lá-nu-kà-a
english: my dear father, could i hold you in contempt?

akkadian: a-ba-am ša-ni-am ni-šu
english: do we have any father but you?

akkadian: um-ma a-šùr-utu-ši-ma kù.babbar ú-lá a-da-na-kum a-na li-ta-tim ak-ru-ub-kà um-ma
english: aššur-šamšī answered: "i will / can not give you the silver, for i have <gap> you <gap> for <gap> ".

akkadian: zu-ba igi puzur₄-{d}iškur a-lá-bu-um dumu zi-a tap-pá-i-ni a-na
english: in the presence of zuba (and) of puzur-adad; ali-abum, son of zia was our colleague.

akkadian: kišib a-ku-za dumu šu-a-nim kišib šu-a-nim dumu <gap> ki
english: seal of akuza son of šu-anum, seal of šu-anum son of <gap>ki, seal of iddin-abum.

english: the son of aššur-dān and šumi-abiya sealed the pouches.

akkadian: kišib ku-la a-hu-ú šu-ku-tim kišib puzur₄-tí-a-am-tim dumu ištar-pá-li-il₅ kišib en-um-a-šur dumu kà-ri-a kišib en-na-sú-in dumu i-dí-a-bi-im kišib a-nu-li
english: seal of kula brother of šukkutum, seal of puzur-ti'amtum son of ištar-pālil, seal of ennam-aššur son of karria, seal of enna-suen son of iddin-abum, seal of anuli his brother.

akkadian: kù.babbar ša-bu-ú igi
english: witnessed by ilī-pilah.

akkadian: dingir-pì-la-ah šu-ma a-ma-kam wa-at-ra-am e-ri-iš-ma lu-ša-zi-za-ku-nu-tí-ma ú ra-ki-sà-šu-ma a-na ú-ku-ú
english: if he asks for more there, then let him appoint a stand-in for you and bind him over.

akkadian: qí-bi₄-ma um-ma puzur₄-a-šur-ma la-a aq-bi₄-a-ku-um um-ma a-na-ku-ma 2 ú-me-e la
english: to uku from puzur-aššur: have i not told you as follows: 'do not delay by two days.

akkadian: ta-sà-hu-ra-am sà-hi-ar-tí na-áp-ra-is ú ma-áš-ki ša-pá-tí-a la té-zi-ba-am a-ma-kam šu-ma a-li-ku-um kà-li-i 3 gín kù.babbar a-na ma-ṣa-ra-tí-im dí-na-ma ú-ku-ú ṭù-ur-da-ni-im
english: you did not leave me my small goods, a chisel and my woollen fleeces.' if the traveling party is detained there, then give 3 shekels of silver to the guards and send uku to me.

akkadian: kù.babbar ša ha-bu-lá-ku-ni iš-tí a-šur-ba-ni
english: i left 1 talent of copper with you.

akkadian: ú-šé-ba-lá-kum 1 gú an.na e-zi-ba-kum šu-ma ší-mu-um lá ša-im ší-ma-am ša ba-lá-ṭí-a lu túg tí-sà-pì ša ha-hi-im lu sà-áp-tí-ni-ma ša tal-ha-at a-hu-a a-tù-nu i ša-ha-at en-um-a-šur i-zi-za-ma ša-ma-nim
english: if the purchase has not been carried out, then make purchases profitable for me, either -textiles from hahhum or from talhat - my dear brothers, assist ennam-aššur in this, seal it and send it to me with aššur-bāni.

akkadian: kà-ni-kà-ma iš-tí a-šur-ba-ni šé-bi₄-lá-nim a-na en-um-a-šur qí-bi₄-ma šu-ma na-áš-pé-er-tum iš-tù a-lim
english: to ennam-aššur: ask whether they have brought a missive from the city and send it.

akkadian: ú-ub-lu-nim ša-il₅-ma šé-bi₄-lam a ma-lá na-áš-pè-er-tí-kà i-ri-šu-um i-na dur₄-hu-mì-it u₄-ma-am
english: in accordance with your missive i expect erišum in durhumit today or tomorrow.

akkadian: ú-ra-am a-da-gal i-lá-kam-ma a-ṣa-ba-sú
english: when he comes, i shall seize him.

akkadian: dumu qá-a-a-tim igi i-dí-a-šur dumu bu-sú-sú igi a-bu-ša-lim dumu i-dí-èr-ra
english: in the presence of iddin-aššur, son of b / pususu, of abu-šalim, son of iddin-erra.

akkadian: ší-a-ma-tim kù.babbar ma-la ta-na-dí-ú a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí dí-in ù
english: my dear brother, give whatever silver and purchases you will deposit to my representatives.

akkadian: i-a-tí qí-bi-ma šu-ma ší-ma-am i-da-na-ku-nu-tí la ta-ma-ha-ra-šu ù tí-ir-ta-ku-nu li-li-kam
english: to my representatives: if he gives you purchased goods, do not receive them but send me word.

akkadian: um-ma ku-zi-zi-a-ma ù a-mur-ištar-ma a-na a-lá-hi-im qí-bi-ma i-na 15 túg ša a-mur-ištar e-zi-bu iš-tù a-mur-ištar i-tù-ra-ni 2 túg i-ni-id-nu 4 túg ša a-bi-a-nu-um ú-šé-bi-lá-ni ú 4 túg ku-a-ú-tim šu.nígin 8 túg
english: from kuziziya and amur-ištar to ali-ahum: of the 15 textiles that amur-ištar left behind tow textiles have been sold after amur-ištar returned. 4 textiles that abī-anum sent and your own 4 textiles: in all 8 textiles are in my possession.

akkadian: ú-šé-bi₄-lam ù a-dí-ni 2 túg ší-ma-sú i-ba-ší-ú a-ma-kam a-lu-a
english: so, until now the 2 textiles agreed by him are (still) outstanding.

akkadian: a-we-lu i-na sí-kà-tim wa-áš-bu i-na e-ra-bi-šu-nu lu <gap> lu síg-tim e-ba-<gap> ú-šé-ba-lá-kum <gap> túg.hi-tí-kà 12 <gap> i-na ku-nu-uk <gap> be-lúm-ba-ni i-ba-ší-ú i-na
english: if the men are staying in the sikkātum, then when they arrive i shall send you both <gap> and the wool <gap> of your 12 textiles <gap> are present under bēlum-bāni's seal.

akkadian: ší-a-ma-tim a-d-in 5 ìr-du ù 5
english: all this, lamassutum, the wife of elamma, left behind.

akkadian: da-am-qám wa-at-ra-am ma-hi-ir i-za-zu <gap> ú ba šu <gap> ša-a-ma šu-uq-lam-<gap> ú <gap> ta nu-ša-li-<gap> um <gap> ú <gap> kù.gi pá-ša-lam da-am-qám ša
english: my dear brothers, buy tin of extra-fine quality according to the market price and <gap> pilah-ištar brings you <gap> fine -gold belonging to us jointly.

akkadian: ba-ri-ni pì-lá-ah-ištar na-áš-a-ku-nu-ti a-hu-a a-tù-nu ú ih-da-ma ki pá-ni-im wa-ṣí-im
english: my dear brothers, dispatch my goods with the first leaving caravan.

akkadian: lu-qú-ti áb-kà-nim ú a-ha-ma 40 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am ša a-na šu-mì é a-bi₄-a a-na pì-lá-ah-ištar
english: also, i further entrusted 40 minas of refined silver in the name of our father's house to pilah-ištar.

akkadian: áp-qí-id igi pu-šu-ki-in igi ku-zi-zi-a igi {d}im-re-<gap>
english: witnessed by pūšu-kēn, by kuziziya, by adad-rē'ī.

akkadian: ša i-na a-lim{ki} a-bu-ni i-ṣé-er ú-ṣur-ša-ištar il₅-qé-ú a ší-a-tí kà-áb-sà-ni a-wa-tum i-ma-qú-ut-ma a-dí
english: concerning 3.5 minas of silver that our father took on uṣur-ša-ištar's account in the city - for that we are pardoned.

akkadian: 5 u₄-me-e <gap> ú e-ma-ri iš-tí <gap> a-ṭá-ra-dam ú a-ta-ma a-ma-kam lu za-ku-a-tí
english: the matter will fail, and within 5 days <gap> and i shall send the donkeys with <gap> then you too must be cleared there.

akkadian: urudu lá-mu-nam a-na
english: convert bad copper to good.

akkadian: ta-e-er a-pu-tum ša ša-ni-ú-tim
english: do not listen to others all the time.

akkadian: la ta-áš-ta-na-me-e mì-šu ša áš-ta-na-me-ú-ma a-wa-at a-hi-ú-tim ta-áš-ta-na-me-ú
english: why is it that i keep hearing that you always listen to what strangers say?

akkadian: la ta-ša-lá-at
english: do not act rashly.

akkadian: igi a-šùr-ba-ni dumu kur-bi-a-a igi iš-me-dingir igi i-dí-ku-bi-im
english: witnessed by aššur-bāni son of kurbiya, by išme-ilum, by iddin-kūbum.

akkadian: pí-i ìr-dí-kà-ma i-a-tí ta-a-hi-ta-ni lu qá-i um-ma ša-lim-a-šùr-ma ù kù.babbar ša a-šu-mì i-dí-a-bi₄-im ša ta-al-qé-ú ṭup-pá-am ha-ar-ma-am ú-kà-lu lu a-hu-ra
english: then it will be me you can pressure on the basis of what your own slave says." "do wait!" šalim-aššur continued: "and for the silver that you have taken concerning iddin-abum i hold the certified tablet.

akkadian: ni-dí-in igi ú-ra-a igi {d}mar.tu-ba-ni bu-zu-ta-a tap-pá-i-ni
english: witnessed by uraya, by amurrum-bāni; buzutaya was our (absent) partner.

akkadian: a-na en-nam-a-šùr qí-bi-ma um-ma ištar-ra-bi₄-at-ma a-dí kù.babbar-pí-kà ša ha-bu-lá-ku-ni dumu a-ta
english: to ennam-aššur from ištar-rabiʾat: with respect to your silver that i owe you, my dear son, do not worry!

akkadian: lá ṣú-ha-ru-kà a-dí e-tí-i ha-ra-nim ṣú-ba-tí-a ú-za-kà-ma kù.babbar-áp-kà a ni-ir-tí-kà ú-qá-ra-áb
english: when the road (opens) i shall clear my textiles and have your silver delivered directly to your person.

akkadian: a-na-kam ki-a-am ša ki-ma ku-a-tí i-zi-zu-ma a-dí li-bi-kà lu-qú-tám ù e-ma-re-e qá-at-kà ša-ki-in
english: here your representatives acted like this, so for as long as you wish your claim has been placed on the goods and the donkeys.
